title: Geometry Vibes 3D
description:
Geometry Vibes 3D takes everything you loved about the original Geometry Vibes and brings it into a vibrant, dynamic 3D world. With fully reimagined levels and stunning new visuals, this version elevates your reflexes and rhythm-based skills to new dimensions.

Geometry Vibes 3D introduces exciting additions to elevate your experience:

Collectible Stars: Each level in Classic Mode has 3 stars to collect, with a total of 90 stars across all levels and difficulties (30 per difficulty). Stars serve as a badge of skill and currency to unlock exclusive items!
Market: Spend your hard-earned stars to unlock a special arrow skin or choose from dazzling 3D skins and trails to customize your vibe.
Leaderboard for Endless Mode: Compete globally and see how you stack up against players worldwide.
Difficulty Modes: Classic Mode now offers Rookie, Pro, and Expert settings, catering to beginners and veterans alike.


How is Geometry Vibes 3D different from the original Geometry Vibes?
Geometry Vibes 3D reimagines the original with fully 3D levels, new features like collectible stars, difficulty modes (Rookie, Pro, Expert), a global Leaderboard, and a Market for skins and trails. The multiplayer is streamlined to 2-Player Mode for a cleaner experience.

Can I play Geometry Vibes 3D on my phone?
Absolutely! The game is optimized for mobile devices with smooth touch controls, ensuring a seamless experience on both iOS and Android.

How do I unlock the special arrow skin?
Collect stars in Classic Mode to unlock the exclusive arrow skin in the Market. You can earn up to 90 stars by completing all levels in Rookie, Pro, and Expert difficulties.

Is there an online multiplayer mode?
Geometry Vibes 3D features local 2-Player Mode for face-to-face competition. While there’s no online multiplayer, you can compete globally via the Endless Mode Leaderboard.

 Why is there only 2-Player Mode instead of 4-Player Mode like the original?
To maintain clear visuals and avoid clutter in the 3D environment, we focused on a polished 2-Player local multiplayer experience.
instructions:
Player 1: W, Left Mouse Click, or Spacebar.
Player 2 (in 2 Player Mode): Up Arrow Key.
Mobile Devices: Tap anywhere on the screen to jump – touch controls are fully supported.

title: Nuts Bolts Sort
description:
Looking for a game that is both challenging and relaxing? Look no further than "Nuts And Bolts Sort" - the ultimate brain training challenge that doubles as a stress-relieving escape.

The objective of this game is to sort bolts and nuts by type. While the gameplay mechanics are simple, the difficulty increases as you progress through the levels, and you'll need to rely on your brainpower to remember which bolts and nuts belong together.

With beautiful graphics, soothing sound effects, and ASMR elements, "Nuts And Bolts Sort" will keep you engaged and relaxed for hours. And if you're looking for a way to unwind after a stressful day, this game is the perfect way to do it.
instructions:
-Click on any bolt to move the nut to another bolt.
-The rule is that only nuts of the same color can be stacked and sorted.
-There must be enough space on the bolt to allow movement.
-Try not to get stuck, don't worry, you can always restart the level.
-Free props to help you pass levels.

"Obby Craft: Build a Plane" — play for free, where you will become an aircraft designer!
The main mechanic is to assemble an airplane from parts in a convenient airplane constructor. Each block affects the flight!

Collect coins on the map as you fly to accumulate in-game currency. Go to the parts store, buy new items and improvements. Leveling the slingshot will allow you to launch your aircraft faster and higher!

Game Features:

Assemble your plane from dozens of parts.

Complete the level and test the car in action.

Roulette slot: spin the reel and get bonuses!

Shop for parts and skins.

2 free skins.

Save Build: Up to 4 slots for your projects.

Test your engineering skills in this exciting flight simulator! Fly the plane, pass the obstacle course (Obbi), prove that your plane is the best!

Play OBBI build a plane online for free, without downloading
instructions:
How to play "Obby Craft: Build a Plane"
1. Assemble your airplane from parts

You need to approach the plane (there is a crafting area next to it)

Select a part in the inventory at the bottom 

Click to install next to the plane

If you have run out of parts, you can buy them in the store. 

2. Upgrade your slingshot
A slingshot awaits you before takeoff. The more powerful the leveling of the slingshot, the higher and faster you will go flying. Spend coins on improvements.

3. Fly and collect coins
Launch the plane. Control it in the air. There are coins scattered on the map — collect them right during the flight. This is the main in-game currency.

4. Go to the parts store and roulette
Buy new blocks in the parts store. There are 2 free skins — take them at once. Spin the roulette wheel and you can win rare items or a lot of coins.

5. Go through the obby-tests
An obstacle course (Obbi) awaits you. Dodge the obstacles!

title: Collect Brainrot Egg
description:
Collect Brainrot Egg takes the classic collect Brainrot loop and flips it into an egg-hatching economy race. Play in 1 Player or 2 Player mode, buy mystery eggs from the center conveyor, carry them back to your base, and wait for them to hatch into random Brainrot characters! The better your lineup, the faster you generate coins, and the sooner you can afford the rarest eggs.

Egg Rarities (Lowest → Highest)
Basic, Rare, Super Rare, Void, Prismatic, SlyFox, Angel, Bonedragon, Hypertech, Firestorm, Diamond!
High-tier eggs appear much less often, but they can hatch into much more valuable Brainrots.

Core Gameplay:
Eggs spawn randomly on the conveyor. If you have enough money, buy an egg and bring it to your base. After the egg’s hatch timer finishes, your Brainrot appears and starts producing coins. Build your income step by step, then jump into higher tiers to chase the best pulls.

Of course, it’s not just farming. Defend your base from thieves by keeping it closed, or catch the rival mid-steal and hit them to save your Eggs and Brainrots. Feeling bold? You can also raid other bases and steal their loot.
instructions:
PLAYER 1:

Move: W, A, S, D
Jump: Space
Buy or Steal: E
Hit: F or Left Mouse
Sprint: Left Shift

PLAYER 2:

Move: Arrow Keys
Jump: L
Buy or Steal: O
Hit: K
Sprint: J

title: Slow Time Ninja
description: Master time and precision in this stealth ninja game! Swipe to throw your weapon, freeze time to plan, and strike with deadly accuracy. Outsmart enemies, use your surroundings, and defeat all foes with true ninja elegance.
instructions:
Swipe to throw your weapon at enemies, showcasing incredible ninja mastery.  While the weapon is in your possession, time moves slowly, giving you the chance to carefully plan each move. But as soon as you throw the weapon, time returns to its normal speed. Therefore, every action you take must be deliberate and precise to find the perfect moment for an attack. 

The mission will end when all enemies on the battlefield are defeated.  However, don’t forget to stay aware of your surroundings—some opponents may be faster, stronger, or craftier than they initially appear. 

Stay stealthy, use the environment, and take advantage of the time-slowing mechanic to secure victory.  Your task is not just to attack, but to do so with cold calculation and the elegance of a true master.

Mobile

title: Master Checkers
description: Play Checkers, the classic two-player board game! Make diagonal moves, eliminate opponents, and crown your piece as a king. Challenge the computer, a local player, or opponents worldwide in this exciting Italian Checkers version!
instructions:
Moves are only allowed on dark squares, so pieces always move diagonally. Single pieces are always restricted to moving forward (towards the opponent).
Capture pieces by jumping.
A piece that makes a capture (jump) jumps over one of the opponent's pieces and lands in a straight diagonal line on the other side. Only one piece can be captured in one jump; however, multiple jumps are allowed in one move.
Jumps (or captures) are mandatory.
If a player can make a capture, the jump must be made.

When a piece reaches the furthest row from the player who controls it, it becomes a king and can move either forward or backward.

title: Mike Lost In Desert - Hidden Object
description:
Mike Lost in Desert – Hidden Object

After a sudden engine failure, Mike was forced to make an emergency landing in the middle of an endless desert. His plane is destroyed, his supplies are running out, and dangerous bandits are on his trail.

Wandering under the burning sun, Mike must search for useful items, explore mysterious ruins, and survive against all odds. Each discovery brings him one step closer to salvation or to his doom.

Will he find civilization before the desert claims his life, or will the bandits reach him first?

Features:
Find hidden objects in beautifully hand-painted desert locations.
Follow a story of survival and determination.
Immerse yourself in the calm but tense atmosphere of the desert.

Can you help Mike survive the unforgiving sands and find his way back to safety?
instructions:
You have about 8 minutes to make your escape through five desert locations.
In each location, you must find 10 hidden objects before moving on to the next area.

If the time runs out, the bandits will catch you.
If you manage to find all the objects in all five locations before the time ends, you will escape the desert and survive.

Search carefully, stay focused, and move quickly. Your life depends on it.

title: Heroes of the Dungeons: Match-3 RPG
description:
Collect legendary heroes, defeat invading monsters, and rebuild a fallen kingdom — one match at a time!
A mysterious gate has unleashed evil creatures across the land, cutting the realm off from the outside world. As the Master of Hunters, you’re the last hope. Match gems to unleash powerful attacks, trigger epic combos, and use hero skills at the perfect moment. Loot treasures from battles, upgrade shops in your castle, and bring prosperity back to the kingdom!
Core: A unique match-3 RPG experience where players strategically match colored gems to trigger distinct in-game actions, such as performing an attack on an enemy or healing the party.
Loop: Player progression centers around extensive character development. Players must clear stages, defeat powerful bosses, and unlock chests to earn tokens, which are then used to upgrade character attributes like maximum health, attack power, and healing efficiency.
Start: The game features a streamlined onboarding tutorial, ensuring high accessibility and a low barrier to entry, providing players with an immediately engaging and enjoyable experience from the outset.
Playgama Fact: The game is fully integrated with Playgama SDK: instant login and cross-device saves between PC and mobile. HTML5. Stable performance regardless of internet quality.
Visual: Features a high-quality Stylized / Cartoon art direction.
Key Feature: A narrative-driven experience offering deep complexity, a rich cast of characters, and highly varied gameplay mechanics, focusing on the core gem-matching combat system where different colored gems trigger diverse tactical outcomes like attacks, ensuring deep replayability.
instructions:
- Match 3+ tiles to attack enemies and charge your team’s skills.
- Swap adjacent tiles to create combos and special blocks for massive damage.
- Use hero abilities when they’re ready to target enemy weaknesses and turn the battle around.
- Win the fight to earn loot and materials.
- Upgrade castle shops with your rewards to boost income and strengthen your heroes for the next stages.

title: No, I'm not a Plankton
description:
“No, I’m not a Plankton” — a dive into the wild and colorful world of Bikini Bottom, where every shift turns into a real challenge!

Original music, familiar characters, and an unpredictable storyline create an atmosphere you’ll want to plunge right into.

You play as Mr. Krabs, the proud owner of the Krusty Krab! But stay alert — among your customers are robots, disguised as ordinary visitors.
Your job is to spot the impostors using your observation skills and the telltale signs of robots. Make a mistake, and the consequences might be... tentacle-level unpleasant.

But robots aren’t your only problem! Get ready for unexpected events, inspections, and surprises — even an underwater business can sink at any moment.

description: Happy Glass: Draw to Fill is a creative and relaxing puzzle game where your goal is to fill a happy glass with water — but there's a twist! You must draw lines and shapes to guide the water flow into the glass. Think strategically, draw creatively, and use physics to your advantage as you solve increasingly challenging levels. The game features colorful visuals, satisfying animations, and a joyful glass that smiles only when full. Whether you're a fan of brain teasers or just love doodling your way through clever puzzles, this game is sure to entertain and test your ingenuity.
instructions: Use your finger or mouse to draw lines or shapes on the screen. These drawings will act as paths, ramps, or barriers to guide the water into the glass. title: Bowling Stars
description:
Enjoy a classic game of bowling with simple and fun gameplay. Earning trophies will unlock better bowling balls and help you win against more skilled opponents.

[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about? What do players need to do?
A: A classic bowling game with engaging gameplay.

Q: What is the game's unique hook? What keeps players coming back?
A: Earning trophies allows players to unlock higher-quality bowling balls, helping them defeat more experienced opponents.

[Mechanics & Progression]

Q: Are there any bosses, and how do they differ?
A: While there aren't traditional bosses, the game features skilled opponents who can be quite challenging to beat.

Q: How does the progression system work? How can players level up faster?
A: Earn trophies by bowling strikes and winning matches to unlock superior bowling balls.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What types of currency are in the game and what can they be spent on?
A: The game uses cash as its currency. It can be spent on bowling ball boosts, allowing players to upgrade weight, speed, hook, and hook control.

Q: Is there any customization? Can players change their character's appearance, use a level editor, or tune vehicles?
A: The game offers several different skins for the bowling balls.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Are there daily rewards or other features to keep players coming back?
A: There are no daily rewards, but the game does feature special events.

Q: Is it better to play with sound for immersion, or is the sound not necessary for gameplay?
A: The music complements the experience well, but it isn't required to play the game effectively.
instructions: Classic bowling rules apply. Swipe across the screen to set the trajectory and curve to the ball you throw. Defeat your opponents and upgrade your bowling balls.

title: Animal Care Tycoon
description:
Welcome to Animal Care Tycoon 🐾🏥, where the city depends on you and adorable animals need your care 💖

Build and manage your own idle animal hospital, starting from a small treatment room and turning it into the biggest veterinary center in the city 🏙️💰 Heal fluffy patients, earn coins, unlock powerful medicine, and upgrade modern equipment to save animals faster and better ⚕️✨

Become the ultimate pet doctor 🐶🐱 Treat cats, dogs, sheep, and even exotic animals like zebras 🦓 Every patient arrives with a unique problem such as colds, viruses, fractures, and more 🤒🦴 Unlock advanced tools, discover new treatments, and make sure every animal gets the love it deserves 💊❤️

title: Mine Block Party: World of Minigames

In this game you will plunge into the exciting world of mini-games!

- Competitive spirit: for every victory you receive cups and coins, which you can spend on buying new skins or improving your character. Fight for the championship and become the most skilled player!

- Variety of skins: the ability to choose any skin, which includes characters from popular games, cartoons, as well as famous YouTubers. Let your character look the way you want!

Core Gameplay & Story

Q: What is the game about? What needs to be done?

A: Mini-games with block-style gameplay similar to Minecraft.

Q: What is the game's unique feature? How can it hook players?

A: The game offers a variety of games, unique skins, character progression, and rewards like cups and coins for each victory.

Q: Are there any currencies and what can they be spent on (regular - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?

A: The game features coins and diamonds as currencies, which can be spent on skins and character upgrades.

Q: What is the leveling up process like? What needs to be done to level up faster?

A: To level up faster, players need to earn more money for purchasing upgrades by playing more and winning!

Q: What engaging content elements are there (weapons, vehicles, locations, skills, references to famous franchises, etc.)?

A: The game makes references to the world of Minecraft.

Q: Is there customization in the game? Can you customize the hero's appearance, location editor, car tuning, etc.?

A: Yes, the game offers various skins for customization.

Q: Is it preferable to play with sound to better immerse in the atmosphere, or will there be difficulties in passing without sound?

A: Music complements the game, but it is not necessary for progression.

Q: Are there mini-games within the main storyline? For example, match-three puzzles within a strategy game.

A: The entire game is a collection of mini-games.
instructions:
Controls for PC:
W, A, S, D or ↑, ←, ↓, → - move.
Spacebar - jump.
Mouse movement - camera control.

title: Bubble Tower
description:
Bubble Tower 3D is a relaxing 3D bubble-pop / color-match puzzle game.
You rotate a tower (or cylinder) loaded with colored bubbles around its vertical axis.
Your goal is to shoot bubbles, matching colors to connect groups of the same color. When matched, those bubbles pop/drop off the tower.
There are many levels; difficulty increases as you go. More bubble colors, trickier arrangements, limited shots, etc.
Also there are diamonds or special gems you can collect in certain levels. These may unlock “shiny shapes” or cosmetic things.
The graphics are clean, simple, and meant for relaxing casual play. It mixes mental challenge (where to shoot, color matching) with a soothing visual.
instructions:
A tower appears with a cluster of bubbles of various colors. There’s a shooter that holds the next bubble to fire.
You can rotate the tower around (usually by dragging left/right or using onscreen controls) to bring bubbles of matching color in position.
Tap or drag to aim, then let go (or tap a location) to shoot the bubble toward the tower. Match it with other bubbles of the same color.
When you connect 3 or more bubbles of the same color, those bubbles pop/drop off. Bubbles that are hanging (i.e. no longer connected to the base or other bubbles) also fall off.
Some levels include diamonds or special gems placed in certain parts of the bubble structure. You need to target those, maybe by matching bubbles around them or popping surrounding bubbles to let them fall.
You win a level if all bubbles (or the required ones) are cleared. If you run out of shots (or fail to clear the required bubbles), you lose and must retry.
tags: puzzle, arcade, strategy, bubble-shooter, 3d, mouse, mobile, color-matching-games, touchscreen-games, agility-games, 1-player-games

title: Wiggle Escape: Snake Puzzle
description:
Wiggle Escape: Snake Puzzle is a smart snake puzzle game. Tap snakes in order, untangle shapes, solve hundreds of levels, or create your own in sandbox mode.
Wiggle Escape: Snake Puzzle is a relaxing yet challenging logic game where you untangle tangled snakes shaped like fun emoji figures. At the start of each level, snakes form a complex structure, and your goal is to tap them in the correct order to slowly free and untangle the entire shape.

The rules are simple, but the puzzles require careful thinking, attention, and planning. Only snakes that are not blocked can move, so every tap matters. As you progress, levels become more complex with longer snakes, tighter knots, and trickier formations. The main game mode offers a huge number of handcrafted levels designed to challenge both casual players and puzzle fans.

A standout feature is the sandbox mode. Here you can freely choose shapes, experiment with mechanics, or even draw and design your own levels from scratch. Test your ideas, create unique puzzles, and enjoy endless replayability.
instructions: At the start of each level, snakes are tangled into a single shape. Your goal is to untangle it completely. Tap snakes one by one — only snakes that are not blocked can move. Choosing the wrong order will stop your progress, so think ahead. In sandbox mode, you can select preset shapes or draw your own levels and try to solve them.

title: Pixel Color Flow
description:
Pixel Color Flow is a fun, satisfying color matching puzzle game where you clear a board of pixel cubes by sending cute pigs onto a conveyor. 
Each pig drops balls onto only the cubes of the same color, so your main challenge is choosing the right order and managing the queue to clean the board efficiently.

Every pig has an ammo count (shown as a number above its head). When it runs out, the pig leaves. If ammo is still left, the pig can move into one of 5 waiting slots, ready to be sent again when you tap. The conveyor also has a capacity limit, so smart timing matters don’t overflow it.
instructions:
Check the pixel board and spot which colors need clearing first.
Tap a pig to send it onto the conveyor.
The pig will shoot/drop balls automatically onto matching color cubes only.
Watch the ammo number above the pig—each shot uses ammo.
When ammo becomes 0, the pig leaves the run.
If it still has ammo, it can move into one of 5 waiting slots.
Tap again to send pigs from the waiting slots back onto the conveyor.
Manage the conveyor capacity (if it’s full, you must wait).
Keep repeating until you clear all cubes and complete the level.

instructions:
Your goal is to arrange all the cards into four piles according to suit: from Ace to King. Start with aces, then twos, threes, and so on until you reach the king.

On the game board, you can move cards between seven piles. You can only start a new pile with a king. You can place a card of a different color and one unit of lower value on a card in the stack. Groups of cards with alternating colors and ranks can be dragged between stacks, adding tactical depth.

You can review the deck an unlimited number of times, giving you the opportunity to carefully consider each move. The game ends when all the cards are neatly placed in piles.

Test your skills in this exciting solitaire card game and enjoy every victory!

title: GT Cars Mega Ramps
description:
GT Cars Mega Ramps is an exciting driving car game that puts you behind the wheel of fully customizable super-sport cars, featuring heart-stopping mega ramps, vibrant giant bosses, and intense head-to-head races. Experience a one-of-a-kind adventure as you launch yourself off towering ramps, execute daring stunts, and outmaneuver colossal bosses in electrifying showdowns. With stylized cars and thrilling gameplay, you’ll race to conquer the ultimate title of driver extraordinaire.

How to Play GT Cars Mega Ramps
GT Cars Mega Ramps offers three exhilarating game modes: Face to Face, Mega Ramps, and Color Lands. Choose between single-player and two-player options, allowing for competitive racing fun with customizable exotic super-sport cars that you can tweak to your liking. Adjust the color panel, window tint, wheel designs, and light colors to make your vehicle truly unique.

In Face to Face mode, you and your opponent race side by side, but don’t let the simplicity fool you. This isn’t just a regular race; if one car crashes, the debris can take you down at full speed, resulting in an instant game over. Stay alert and swerve wisely, or you risk tumbling off the cliff's edge!

Color Lands presents a vibrant challenge as you navigate through roads resembling colorful Lego blocks. Obstacles lurk at every turn, and if you’re not careful, slowing down could send you spiraling into an abyss.

Mega Ramps is the ultimate test of your driving skills, packed with high-speed thrills and perilous obstacles. Dodge enormous rolling balls threatening to crush you and navigate walls made of crates and geometric shapes flying at you from all directions. It’s a wild ride that requires quick reflexes and sharp focus—so buckle up and prepare for an unforgettable experience!

title: +1 Speed per Step | Obby Mode
description:
Welcome to +1 Speed per Step | Obby Mode.

Every step makes you faster!

Complete obstacles to earn wins!

Rebirth to gain bonuses!

Upgrade your steps!

Buy new trails!

Climb to the top of the leaderboard!

[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about and what do you do?

A: It's an arcade game focused on obby and speed. You need to run to increase your speed and raise your level.

Q: What is the game's hook? What will keep players engaged?

A: A unique obstacle course, a rebirth system, leaderboards, and high-quality block graphics.

[Mechanics & Progression]

Q: How does the leveling system work? What's the best way to progress quickly?

A: The more you run, the higher your speed becomes, allowing you to travel further and earn more trophies.

Q: Is the total number of levels known? How many are there?

A: There are 5 different levels.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What currencies are available and what can they be spent on?

A: The game features two currencies: trophies and steps. Trophies are earned by reaching the end of one of the five levels, while steps can be purchased in the shop or earned through training.

Q: Are there in-game purchases? What can you buy and how do they affect the game? Does paying speed up progress?

A: Yes, there are in-game purchases. You can buy boosters, skins (colored trails for your character), treadmills to increase running speed, and instant experience (steps).

Q: Is customization available? Can you adjust the hero's appearance, use a level editor, tune vehicles, etc.?

A: Yes, you can purchase a colored trail that follows your character while running.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Are there leaderboards? How do you join them and what types are there?

A: There are two leaderboards: one for the number of trophies collected and another for time spent in prison.

Q: Is it better to play with sound for immersion, or will it be difficult to progress without it?

A: The music complements the game well, but it is not required to complete the levels.

WASD – movement

title: Word Search & Quiz
description:
🔍 WORD SEARCH & QUIZ — Train Your Brain with 5 Exciting Game Modes!

Looking for the perfect brain training game? Word Search & Quiz combines classic word puzzles with engaging trivia questions to challenge your mind every day!

🎮 FIVE UNIQUE GAME MODES:

📖 CLASSIC WORD SEARCH
Search for hidden words in letter grids. Explore themed puzzles with beautiful pictures that change with each chapter.

🖼️ PICTURE PUZZLES
Look at the image and find the related words hidden in the grid. A fresh twist on classic word search!

🤔 RIDDLE WORD SEARCH
Read clever text riddles and find the answer hidden among the letters. Test your logic and vocabulary!

✏️ WORD FROM IMAGE
See a picture, spell the word! Use the given letters to type what you see. Simple yet addictive!

❓ QUIZ MODE
Answer trivia questions on various topics. From easy warmups to challenging brain teasers — test your knowledge!

📚 PROGRESSION SYSTEM:

- Multiple chapters with unique themes and backgrounds
- Track your completion percentage for each chapter
- Replay any question to achieve 100% completion
- Unlock new ranks as you progress
- Endless mode for unlimited practice after completing chapters

🧠 DESIGNED FOR LEARNING:

Questions are carefully arranged from simple to complex. Whether you want a quick brain exercise or a deep learning session — we've got you covered.

Topics include: general knowledge, science, history, nature, culture, and more!

✨ KEY FEATURES:

- Clean, beautiful interface
- Cloud saves — keep your progress across devices
- Play anytime, anywhere
- Suitable for all ages
- Regular content updates

Play Word Search & Quiz now and start your brain training journey!

Perfect for: word puzzle lovers, trivia fans, vocabulary builders, and anyone who wants to keep their mind sharp!
instructions:
🕹️ HOW TO PLAY:

🔍 Word Search Modes (Classic, Picture, Riddle):
1. Look at the word list, picture icons, or read the riddle text.
2. Find the words hidden in the letter grid.
3. Swipe with your finger or mouse to highlight and connect the letters.

✏️ Word From Image:
1. Identify the object shown in the picture.
2. Tap the scrambled letters at the bottom to spell out the word.

❓ Quiz Mode:
1. Look at the image and read the question.
2. Choose the correct answer from the options provided.

title: TRAFFIC JAM ESCAPE 3D
description:
Clear the roads in Traffic Jam Escape 3D! Solve challenging traffic puzzles, free cars from gridlock, and master the art of strategic driving.

Get ready to play Traffic Jam Escape 3D, the addictive mobile traffic puzzle game where you control chaotic city streets and free cars from gridlock! Every second counts - one smart move can clear the road, one mistake can block it forever. Are you skilled enough to guide every car out of the jam?

In Traffic Jam Escape 3D, your goal is simple but challenging: tap cars, follow the arrows, and plan their path to freedom. Avoid collisions, dodge obstacles, and keep traffic moving smoothly. With each level, timing and strategy become even more important - one wrong move could create a crash and block the way.

Every stage offers a brand-new challenge. You’ll need to think ahead, plan the order of moves, and figure out the best escape route for each vehicle. From narrow alleys to busy intersections, the puzzles get tougher and more exciting as you progress.

Featuring a wide variety of vehicles - from tiny cars to large trucks - you’ll need to adapt your strategy to guide each one safely out of the mess. The more you play, the sharper your skills become as you conquer increasingly complex traffic jams.

Key Features of Traffic Jam Escape 3D:
Challenging traffic jam escape puzzles at every level
Intuitive tap-and-guide controls for all ages
Dynamic gameplay with busy intersections, narrow roads, and tricky obstacles
Dozens of levels with increasing difficulty to keep you hooked
Vibrant graphics and realistic sound effects for an immersive experience
Traffic Jam Escape isn’t just about clearing the streets—it’s about mastering the art of smart maneuvering. Dodge oncoming traffic, weave through tight spaces, and avoid obstacles at every turn. With dozens of levels to conquer, the game offers a constant challenge and endless fun.

Whether you’re solving quick car escape puzzles on the go or tackling more complex jam-packed streets at home, Traffic Jam Escape 3D delivers nonstop excitement and tests your problem-solving skills.

Ready to test your reflexes and strategic thinking? Take the driver’s seat in Traffic Jam Escape 3D today and see if you can clear the roads and guide every car to safety. Play now and experience the thrill of escaping the traffic jams!
instructions: Tap cars to drive them out and clear the traffic jam! Collect gems to decorate your room, finish levels fast for more points, and use boosters like rockets or helicopters to beat tough stages.

description:

title: Color Cube Puzzle
description:
Color Cube Puzzle is a relaxing logic puzzle where you need to plan every move and position shapes correctly on the board.
Move shapes to the cube conveyors. If the cube color matches the shape color, the shape starts filling with cubes. When a shape is completely filled, it disappears from the level.
Your goal is to fill all shapes and clear the level.

There are no timers, no bombs and no rush — you can take your time and think through every move. It is impossible to lose, you can always try a different solution.

As you progress, new mechanics, obstacles and puzzle elements will appear. You can also use three boosters to help you complete difficult levels.
The game is perfect for players who enjoy relaxing but thoughtful puzzle games.
instructions:
► Move colored shapes around the board
► Move shapes to the cube conveyors
► If the colors match, the shape will start filling with cubes
► When a shape is fully filled, it disappears
► Fill all shapes to complete the level
► Use boosters if the level is difficult
► Think ahead — wrong moves can block your path

Each level is a new puzzle where planning and the order of actions are important.

[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about and what is the objective?

A: It is a volleyball game simulator where the goal is to score points using serves.

Q: Is there a storyline in the game?

A: There is no formal storyline, but the objective is clear: score goals with serves.

Q: What is the game's unique feature? What makes it appealing to players?

A: Diverse and fun skins for players and balls, along with unique character physics.

Q: What engaging content elements are featured (weapons, cars, locations, skills, references to famous franchises, etc.)?

A: There are references to real-life people, as well as characters from cartoons, movies, and superheroes.

[Mechanics & Progression]

Q: Are there bosses, and if so, how do they differ from one another?

A: There are no bosses, but each consecutive opponent is stronger than the last.

Q: How exactly does progression work, and what is the best way to level up quickly?

A: Each subsequent opponent is unlocked only after you defeat the previous one.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What currencies exist in the game, and what can they be spent on (e.g., standard currency - gold, premium currency - crystals, etc.)?

A: Currency is spent on unlocking new areas, character progression, new clothing, motorcycles, and so on.

Q: Is there any customization in the game? Can the hero's appearance, locations, or vehicle tuning be adjusted?

A: Yes, skins can be changed.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Are there daily rewards or similar incentives that encourage player retention?

A: Yes, logging in every day grants a new character skin.

Q: Is it advisable to play with sound for better immersion, or will playing without sound hinder progress?

A: No, music is not necessary for game progression.

title: Color by Numbers. Anti-stress Drawings.
description:
Color by numbers is creativity and relaxation for the whole family. Our app helps you escape from worries and immerse yourself in the world of colors. This is art therapy available online and on Android.

The collection features anti-stress drawings that relieve tension. Each illustration is divided into numbered fragments — just pick the right color. The drawing process is captivating: you assemble a puzzle, but instead of pieces, you use colors.

The app is suitable for both children and adults. For kids, it's a way to learn colors and numbers, develop motor skills. For adults — an opportunity to relax and engage in creativity. No skills required.

The collection includes various genres: from pixel art to complex compositions. Color animals, flowers, mandalas, landscapes. Drawing by numbers develops attentiveness and sense of color.

The app works on Android and in a web browser. Save your works, share with friends. Coloring brings joy and harmony. Try it: choose a picture and create
instructions:
Choose a picture
Open the gallery and select a picture. Beginners will enjoy simple drawings with large fragments, experienced ones — complex compositions. The collection includes pixel art, flowers, animals, mandalas, and abstractions.

Follow the numbers
Each fragment is marked with a number. The palette shows which color to fill the area with. Tap on a fragment — it will be filled with the right color. Everything is intuitive.

Relax and create
The drawing process helps you immerse yourself in creativity and escape from worries. This is meditation and art therapy: empty outlines turn into a bright picture.

Save and share
When the drawing is ready, save it to the gallery or share with friends. You've created a real masterpiece!

Tip: Start with large fragments, gradually moving to small details. This helps you stay on track and enjoy every stage of coloring.

instructions:

The further you play, the more interesting the tasks become. More yarn, loops and tangled pieces appear, so plan every move carefully.

title: 4 Clues 1 Word
description:
Think you’re a master of language? Put your lateral thinking to the test with 4 Clues 1 Word, the word puzzle game that goes beyond the surface. Most games ask you to find a simple object; we ask you to find the hidden connection between worlds.

Whether it’s the Stock in a financial market, a pot of Stock on a stove, or the Stock in a warehouse—your job is to find the one word that rules them all. Featuring stunning, high-definition photography and curated levels ranging from "Casual" to "Mind-Bending," 4 Clues 1 Word is designed for the curious, the clever, and the linguistically brave.

It’s not just a game; it’s a workout for your synapses. Can you see the pattern?
instructions:
Observe the Imagery: Each level presents you with three or four distinct images. Look closely—one might be a physical object, another an abstract concept, and the third an action.

Find the Common Thread: Identify the single word that applies to all images. Remember: we love polysemy (words with multiple meanings). A "Draft" could be a cold breeze or a rough sketch of a masterpiece.

Type Your Answer: Use the provided letter tiles to spell out the word.

Use Your Intuition (and Hints): Stuck on a particularly "Hard" level?

Expose a Letter: Reveal a single correct letter in the word.

Remove Tiles: Get rid of letters that aren't part of the solution.

Climb the Ranks: Progress through hundreds of levels. The further you go, the more abstract the connections become.

Pro Tip: If you're stuck, try saying the names of the objects out loud. Sometimes the ear catches what the eye misses!
tags: puzzle, words, brain, logic, intelligence, guessing-games, casual-games, brain-training-games, mind-games, 1-player-games

title: Papa Cherry Saga
description:
Welcome to the world of sweets! Papa Cherry Saga is a colourful match-3 puzzle where you collect cookies, marshmallows, chocolate, and other treats.

Swap pieces to make a row of 3 or more of the same kind. Match 4 in a line to create a Striped Cookie. Match 4 in a T or L shape to make a Bomb. Match 5 in a row to get a Rainbow Bomb that clears all pieces of one color.

Combine power-ups together for devastating effects. Charge up the Chef by activating power-ups on the field, and he will reward you with a bonus.

Hundreds of levels with varied goals: collect specific sweets, break obstacles, guide gingerbread cookies to the bottom. Use boosters like the Glove, Rolling Pin, Lollipop, and Undo to beat the toughest challenges.
instructions:
Drag a piece toward an adjacent one to swap them. If the swap creates a match of 3 or more identical pieces in a row or column, they are collected and new ones drop in.

Match 4 in a line to create a Striped Cookie that clears an entire row or column. Match 4 in a T or L shape to make a Bomb that explodes in a 3x3 area. Match 5 in a row to get a Rainbow Bomb that clears all pieces of one color. Combine power-ups together for even stronger effects.

Activate power-ups on the field to charge the Chef — once full, he sends a bonus power-up to the board.

Use the boosters at the bottom of the screen — they do not cost a move. The Glove removes any single piece. The Rolling Pin clears one row and one column. The Lollipop removes all pieces of a chosen color. Undo rewinds the last move.
tags: puzzle, match-3, matching, brain-training-games, addictive-games, color-matching-games, 1-player-games

title: Flippee Ball
description:
A HYBRID ARCADE GAME OF PINBALL & BASKETBALL

-Flip the flippers and try to hit the ball into the basket.  
-Play against the CPU or another player on the same device.  
-Perfect your technique in the Academy - 100 increasingly challenging "assists" for you to try to score from.
instructions:
You control one set of flippers - either red or blue.  Flipping uses just one button and flips all five of your flippers.  See if you have what it takes to beat the computer.  The default settings are "AMATEUR" speed against the computer on "EASY" difficulty with "AIM ASSIST" enabled (this gives you a little help with shot accuracy).  Once you feel comfortable, try the other difficulties, "PROFFESSIONAL" speed, then switch "AIM ASSIST" off!

If that's not enough, try the "FLIPPEE ACADEMY" - 100 levels (50 each at "AMATEUR" & "PROFESSIONAL" speeds) where the ball is launched and you must try to score - but each level only allows for a certain number of touches - and you must score before the ball hits your opponent's flippers.

Navigate menus using:
- Mouse
- Touch
- Keyboard (arrow keys and space to action)
- Controller - direction pad and any of the main four buttons

Use the game mode button to the left of the scoreboard to select between 7 game modes:

- Longest Streak - see how many games in a row you can win against the computer:
  - Easy
  - Medium
  - Hard
  - Progressive (difficulty increases with every game)
- Career - difficulty increases with every game, but losing doesn't reset progress
- Player v Player - play against another human on the same device
- Academy - 100 "assists" for you to try to score from 

To flip:

Single player:
- Mouse - click the screen
- Touch - tap the screen
- Keyboard - LEFT CTRL
- Controller - any of the four main buttons

Player vs Player:
- Mouse - click the top left or top right of the screen to control either the left or right flippers
- Touch - tap the top left or top right of the screen
- Keyboard - LEFT CTRL (left flipper) & RIGHT ARROW (right flippers)
- Controller - any of the four main buttons (supports 2 controllers for player v player)

To pause:

- Mouse - click the scoreboard
- Touch - tap the scoreboard
- Keyboard - Press "P"
- Controller - "Start" button

To win:

SCORE MORE THAN YOUR OPPONENT!

Change the game speed from "AMATEUR" to "PROFESSIONAL" and disable "AIM ASSIST" (if you're up for a challeng!) in the SETTINGS menu.
A quick start guide is shown when the game is first run and full instructions can be found in the built-in help guide.

title: Hills Of Steel
description:
Hills of Steel is an explosive tank battle drive with realistic physics that will captivate you from the very first seconds!

Take control of your steel battle tank and race across the battlefields, destroying enemies with powerful shots. Collect rewards from defeated opponents, upgrade armor and weapons, unlock new unique tanks and challenge increasingly dangerous opponents. You will find a path from fierce battles on earth to epic battles on the futuristic Moon!

Win, gain recognition and climb the career ladder to the title of the greatest marshal of all time!

If you like heavy vehicles, dynamic battles and endless waves of enemies, play Hills of Steel right now and experience the real tank power!

Core Gameplay & Story

Q: What is the game about? What do players need to do?

A: Tank battles with realistic physics and in-game progression.

Q: What is the standout feature of the game? What can hook players in?

A: A variety of different tanks, various locations, high-quality graphics, unique tank upgrades, futuristic tanks.

Q: Are there bosses and how are they different?

A: Yes, at the end of a level, a boss in a tank can appear. It has more HP and is larger in size. Defeating it rewards more coins.

Q: Are there any currencies and what can they be spent on (regular - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?

A: The game has currencies - diamonds and gold. Gold can be spent on tank upgrades. Diamonds can be used to purchase gold, crates, and new tanks.

Mechanics & Progression

Q: How does the leveling up system work? What needs to be done to level up faster?

A: Play more and win, earning coins to upgrade your tank.

Economy & Customization

Q: Are there in-game purchases? What can be bought and what is the impact? Does making purchases speed up game progress?

A: There are in-game purchases where you can buy diamonds to later purchase coins or new tanks. Making purchases significantly speeds up game progress.

Q: What are the engaging content elements (weapons, vehicles, locations, skills, references to famous franchises, etc.)?

A: The game features futuristic tanks and 2 different game modes.

Q: Is there customization in the game? Can you customize the appearance of the hero, location editor, car tuning, etc.?

A: The game offers various skins that can be purchased for all tanks.

Retention & Engagement

Q: Are there daily rewards or something similar to encourage players to return?

A: Yes, the game provides a case to the player every 24 hours.

Q: Is it preferable to play with sound to better immerse oneself in the atmosphere, or will there be difficulties in gameplay without sound?

A: Music complements the game but is not necessary for gameplay.

The buttons will remain on the screen - you can use them if necessary.

title: Crystalia
description: A vibrant block puzzle game. Place pieces on the board so that 3 or more blocks of the same color line up next to each other — and watch them vanish in a satisfying explosion. Simple rules, endless depth, and a fierce battle for the top spot on the leaderboard.
instructions:
Step 1. A block appears in the bottom panel. Rotate it if needed and drag it onto the board.

Step 2. Place blocks so that 3 or more of the same color stand next to each other — horizontally or vertically (diagonals don't count).

Step 3. Matching blocks disappear with an explosion, and you earn points. The longer the chain, the bigger the bonus.

Step 4. Running out of space? Use boosters:

💣 Bomb — blasts 1 block and all its neighbors.
➖ Laser — clears an entire row or column.
🔀 Shuffle — reshuffles the blocks on the board.

Step 5. The game ends when there's no room left for new blocks. Your score is automatically sent to the leaderboard — try to break into the top!

Pro tip: don't rush to fill the board. Leave "corridors" open for long chains — that's how mega-combos and record-breaking scores are made.
tags: puzzle, arcade, match-3, blocks, casual-games, brain-training-games, addictive-games, 1-player-games

title: Zombie Check: Survival Shelter
description:
Zombie Check: Survival Shelter is a tense quarantine inspection simulator set during a zombie outbreak.

Survivors arrive one by one. Your job is to inspect their bodies, scan for symptoms and decide their fate:
send to camp, quarantine, or eliminate.

Symptoms can be hidden, suspicious, or evolve over time. One wrong decision can kill an innocent person or infect the entire camp.

Use the scanner, examine bodies, unlock weapons and make choices under pressure.
Each day brings new people, higher risks and tougher decisions.

Will you survive long enough to reach the bunker and save humanity?
"Core: A high-stakes social deduction and resource management game set during a global zombie epidemic, where players must identify and neutralize infected individuals to secure the survival of the human race in an underground bunker.
Loop: Progression is driven by successful identification and correct processing of incoming individuals. Flawless daily performance (correctly determining the infected from the healthy) is rewarded with in-game currency, fostering a cycle of precision and reward.
Start: A comprehensive tutorial module ensures immediate accessibility and full comprehension of the core mechanics. The high-stakes premise—total responsibility for humanity's future—provides a powerful, immediate retention hook.
Playgama Fact: The game is fully integrated with Playgama SDK: instant login and cross-device saves between PC and mobile. HTML5. Stable performance regardless of internet quality.
Visual: Features a stylized, cartoon art direction.
Key Feature: A genre-defining blend of deduction mechanics, demanding constant vigilance from players to prevent a single missed symptom from compromising the entire bunker and ending humanity."
instructions:
PC:
Rotate the camera with the cursor

title: Pixel Flow
description:
Conveyor’s ready, Tanks are on standby. Tap to send a tank onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
instructions:
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Tanks only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The tanks are ready. The cubes… not so much.
tags: arcade, funny, addictive-games, agility-games, 1-player-games, simple-games

title: 99 Nights In The Forest
description:
You find yourself in a dark and mysterious forest where the only goal is to survive for 99 nights. As darkness falls, a monstrous deer emerges from the shadows to hunt you down. Your only chance of survival is to keep the fire burning, since it is the only thing that scares the creature away. During the day, you must gather resources — wood, food, and useful items — to prepare for the night. With every passing night, the challenge becomes harder: temperatures drop, the forest grows darker, and the monster becomes more relentless.

The game combines horror, survival, and rogue-like elements. You need to carefully manage limited resources and constantly watch over the fire to stay alive. Immersive sounds and a tense atmosphere keep you on edge until the very end.

Will you survive and make it through all 99 nights?

title: Frontline Commando Shooting: Gun Games
description:
Welcome to the world of gun shooting games. Get ready to step into the world of intense gun battles, thrilling missions, and heart-pounding survival challenges in the most complete first-person shooter game. Choose from an enormous collection of authentic, modern firearms and futuristic experimental guns. Pistols, assault rifles, SMGs, sniper rifles, shotguns, heavy machine guns every weapon feels unique and powerful.

Controls:
Computer — WASD: movement, right mouse button — shooting, left mouse button — aiming, Space — jump. P — interact, R — reload, TAB — lock and unlock cursor, ESC — menu.

Mobile Device — Virtual stick: hold and direct to move the character and camera. Buttons for aiming, shooting, and reloading. Tap the buttons to perform actions.

Game Modes:
• Warfront OPS: Complete missions to steal enemy resources and secret data while shooting foes in pursuit of your ultimate goal.
• Combat Arena: Team vs. team showdown. Eliminate more opponents and win the battle.
• Silent Scope: Step into the role of a sniper, taking out enemies on the base one by one. Try to finish before you get killed.
• Dead Zone: Your enemies are not just humans, but bloodthirsty zombies. Head out to exterminate the undead, battling both zombies and bosses.
• Last Stand: You're in trouble. Alone on the enemy base, and the opponent knows where you are. Hold out until reinforcements arrive while eliminating targets.

Core Gameplay & Story
Q: What is the goal of the game?
A: You are at war! Participate in operations under various conditions. Steal enemy data and resources, engage in sniper missions, and fight on two fronts against hordes of zombies!

Q: How do you win / what counts as losing?
A: Eliminate the enemy and complete assigned tasks. And try not to die!

Q: What grabs you in the first minutes?
A: A wide selection of weapons and game modes. Weapons and new modes unlock simply by watching ads!

Mechanics & Progression
Q: How many levels are there / is the structure clear?
A: Each mode has its own number of levels. They follow one after another, and you can see how many you have completed!

Q: Does the difficulty change?
A: There is no difficulty selection in the game, but with each new level, the challenge will become increasingly difficult in each mode.

Q: What unlocks as you play?
A: With each level you complete, new ones unlock. By watching ads, you can unlock a new mode with new challenges.

Economy & Customization
Q: What can be bought/upgraded?
A: By watching ads, you gain access to selected weapons, modes, or profile avatars.

Q: Are there skins / customization?
A: Yes, you can choose a profile avatar that suits you best.

Q: What is available from the start?
A: From the very beginning, you have access to 2 game modes: Warfront OPS and Silent Scope, as well as the UMP-45 weapon. This gun will impress you with its rate of fire.

Retention & Engagement
Q: Are there daily rewards / a wheel of fortune / achievements / tasks?
A: You can earn daily rewards for logging in over 7 days! A nice start for the week.

Q: Is sound necessary?
A: Sound in the game is desirable but not essential. Want to play in silence? That's fine, go ahead. But if you do turn on the sound, it will enhance your immersion in the atmosphere.

Q: Is there onboarding in the game? What is it like?
A: The first mission will show you all the basics. Each mode is intuitive from the very first missions, so you'll quickly figure out what to do and how.
instructions:
W / Arrow Up → Move Front
S / Arrow Down → Move Back 
A / Arrow Left → Move Left
D / Arrow Right → Move Right

- To click any button use mouse

Fight and build in the World of Blocks!
Develop your abilities, defeat huge Bosses!

Core Gameplay & Story

Retention & Engagement

A: The music complements the game well but is not necessary for progression.

title: Survival Sandbox for 99 Nights
description:
Four children have gone missing in the forest. You have 99 nights to find them before the woods claim them forever.

🔦 Life-Risking Search:
Explore a vast, living forest that changes with every sunset.
The children are scattered across different, most dangerous zones of the forest. You must find and lead each one to safety.

⚔️ Survival and Defense:
Gather weapons, avoid traps, and seek shelter.
Fend off packs of hungry wolves, rogue bears, and other dangers.
Manage your basic needs: health and hunger.

🦌 The Main Antagonist — The Deer:
The Deer guards the forest's secrets and considers the children its property.
It cannot be killed with ordinary weapons. You can only drive it away, deceive it, or temporarily restrain it.

🌙 The Day-Night Cycle — Key to Survival:
Day: A relatively safe time for exploration, gathering resources, and crafting.
Night: Time of the hunt. Darkness awakens the forest's horrors. It is at night that you will encounter the Deer.
instructions:
✅ How to Play: ✅

❗️ For Computer

➡️ Movement - WASD or arrow keys.
➡️ Jump - Spacebar.
➡️ Sprint - Shift.
➡️ Use abilities - I and U.

❗️ For Phone

➡️ Movement – move your finger on the left joystick.
➡️ Camera rotation – drag your finger on the screen.
➡️ Jump – tap the button with the person icon.
➡️ Use abilities – tap the two buttons to the right of the jump button.

title: Hyper Cars Ramp Crash
description:
Hyper Cars Ramp Crash is a 3D driving stunt and crash simulation game with realistic physics and graphics. Perform incredible stunts in many different modes with great-looking cars. There are seven different super-sport car models in the garage, waiting in the garage for you to try them. Open world, stunt mode, and fall mode can be played in 1-player and 2-players. You can also drive freely in Free Style mode. Have fun with these fantastic-looking cars!

Features
Realistic car crash physics (Cars get crushed and smashed)
Customize option for cars
1 Player Mode and 2 Players Mode available
Realistic car interior camera
Drive freely and perform stunts in Free Style mode
Crazy Fall Break mode!
Side Road, Forest, Ocean, Desert Stunt Modes
Race against time with Time Trial mode
Unique damage machines in modes


Core Gameplay & Story

Q: What is the game about? What do you need to do?
A: A racing game with juicy gameplay.

Q: Is there a storyline in the game?
A: There is no storyline, but the goals and tasks in the game are clear.

Q: What is the unique feature of the game? What can hook players?
A: Stunning graphics, cool cars, lots of diverse challenges and game modes.

Q: What currencies are available and what can they be spent on (regular - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?
A: Yes, two currencies, spent on customization.

Q: What are some engaging content elements (weapons, cars, locations, skills, references to famous franchises, etc.)?
A: Gorgeous cars, well-designed and constructed tracks.

Mechanics & Progression

Q: Is there customization in the game? Can you customize the appearance of the hero, location editor, car tuning, etc.?
A: Yes, you can change the car beyond recognition.

Economy & Customization

Q: Is it preferable to play with sound to better immerse yourself in the atmosphere, or will there be difficulties in passing without sound?
A: Sound is not mandatory, but the music is luxurious, and the car sounds are fantastic.

Retention & Engagement

Q: Does the game happen in real-time or asynchronously?
A: In real-time.

Multiplayer

Q: Can you play with friends?
A: Local multiplayer.

Q: What is the room size, how many players play simultaneously?
A: Local multiplayer for 2 players.
instructions:
1 Player Mode
WASD / arrow keys = move
L-Shift = NOS
R = reset car position
C = change camera view

2 Players Mode

Player 1
WASD = move
L-Shift = NOS
R = reset car position
C = change camera view

Player 2
Arrow keys = move
N = NOS

U = change camera view

title: Bingo Mania
description:
A casual bingo progression game. Complete Kitchen Quest levels to gather ingredients, cook recipes from cupcakes to a grand feast, and unlock Bingo Battles at level 25 where you can play against other players in the game!

In Kitchen Quest, you play through 100 solo levels — numbers are called, you daub matching cells, and complete patterns (lines, corners, themed shapes) to win. Every victory earns ingredients and recipe progress through stages: gather, prep, cook, decorate, and serve.

Cook your way through five kitchen tiers: cupcake, pizza, burger, cake, and a grand feast. Serve your first dish in just 5 levels, then tackle longer recipes as difficulty ramps up with more cards, tighter timers, and special tiles.

At level 25, unlock Bingo Battles — timed head-to-head duels against rival chefs. Outscore them before time runs out in ranked Trophy Duels or casual practice matches. There’s also a Chef Battles ladder gauntlet, daily tasks, leagues, and seasonal rewards.

Portrait-first mobile design makes it easy to play on the go.
instructions:
How to play
Numbers are called one at a time — tap matching cells on your bingo card.
Complete the target pattern and the game calls BINGO! automatically.
Win ingredients and serve your first dish in 5 levels.
Reach level 25 to unlock multiplayer bingo battles.

title: The Road Home: Granny Escape
description:
The Road Home: Granny Escape is a terrifying 3D horror survival game where your only goal is to escape a haunted house filled with danger, puzzles, and fear. You're not here by accident — Granny and Grandpa brought you here on purpose, and they won’t let you go easily.

🕯 The Story
Your trip home took a dark turn. While riding a bus through a remote forest, a massive tree crashed down onto the road. You stepped out to investigate… and everything went black.

You wake up in a locked, eerie house. The windows are boarded up. The doors are sealed. And something is watching you. You soon realize the terrifying truth: you’ve been kidnapped and trapped by an evil Granny and her mad husband.

This isn’t just a place — it’s a prison designed to break you.

🎯 What You Must Do
-Explore the dark and haunted house
-Solve puzzles and unlock secret passages
-Craft useful items from the resources you find
-Avoid Granny and Grandpa — they can hear your every move
-Survive deadly traps and unpredictable chases
-Make your way to freedom before it’s too late

⚙️ Game Features
-A chilling 3D horror experience with immersive atmosphere
-Evil and intelligent enemies who react to sound and movement
-Multiple escape paths and secret endings
-A full crafting system: collect, combine, survive
-Puzzles, keys, locked rooms, and hidden objects
-A heavy dose of mental horror and psychological tension
-Every sound matters. Every choice counts.

❗️ Not Just a Game — A Nightmare
This isn’t just a scary house — it’s a living nightmare. There’s evil in the walls, and death behind every corner. Will you outsmart your captors, or will fear consume you?

Use your brain, stay quiet, and find your way out… if you still can.

Download The Road Home: Granny Escape — and see if you have what it takes to survive the fear, escape the madness, and get back home.
instructions:
WASD — Move
C — Crouch
Space — Jump

The main goal is to escape from the old people's house. Find useful items and use them to your advantage.

title: Uncle Hit: Punch the Dummy
description:
Uncle Hit: Punch the Dummy is a fast-paced, casual action game where you let out your frustration on a few dummies in all sorts of scenarios. You will need quick reflexes and punches to unleash the blows it will take to knock your opponent out. Stay sharp, keep punching, and enjoy every moment of cathartic stress relief.
How to Play Uncle Hit: Punch the Dummy
Uncle Hit: Punch the Dummy is simple on the surface and fairly easy to play, but that is exactly what makes it so addictive. You control a floating arm wearing a boxing glove, and your only mission is to punch every dummy you see, along with other objects. Move the glove, line up your swings, and knock the targets out of the scene. Once they are all knocked out, you can move to the next level.
Each level presents a new setup of dummies. Sometimes there is a single dummy sitting quietly on a bench. Other times, groups are standing together, chatting, dancing with a rat, posing like the Creation of Adam, typing at a computer, balancing on unicycles, or even a bunch of dummies carrying a casket. The variety keeps things surprising and funny as you move from one level to the next.
instructions:
There is no strict progression or difficulty curve. Some levels are very simple, while others require a bit more timing. The game runs on physics, so punches can have dramatic chain reactions. You might knock two or three dummies aside with one well-placed swing. There is no timer, no pressure, and no limit to how long you can play. The focus is pure fun. Punch the dummies, enjoy the chaos, and move on to the next scene!

Click on the screen to punch the annoying dummies.
tags: arcade, funny, physics, mobile, reaction-games, casual-games, smash-games, touchscreen-games, desktop-games, simple-games, whack-games

Join a brave cat on an epic quest in Cup Quest – Hero’s Journey, a fresh twist on the classic balls-and-cups game. This isn't just about tossing balls into cups—it's a full-blown adventure packed with clever puzzles, physics-based challenges, and one courageous kitty determined to save the day.

title: Escape Strange Girl’s House
description:
Escape Strange Girl’s House is a dark point-and-click adventure available on both web and Android.

You wake up in a locked, unfamiliar house. The windows are sealed, the doors are bolted, and it doesn’t take long to realize you’re not here by choice — you’ve been kidnapped. The only way forward is to explore, uncover clues, and piece together who lives here… and why they’ve trapped you.

Every object can hide a secret: a sofa may conceal something beneath its cushions, a flowerpot may hold a key, or a book on the shelf may reveal disturbing truths about the strange girl who owns this place. Interacting with the environment unlocks new paths, changes the protagonist’s perception, and pushes the story into darker territory.

As in every classic point-and-click adventure, you’ll collect items and use them in clever ways to solve puzzles, repair devices, and access new rooms. A simple glass of water, a sharp knife, or a roll of tape could be the difference between staying trapped forever and finding your way to freedom.

The narrative unfolds gradually, shifting from calm exploration to mounting dread. What begins as a harmless search of a living room turns into a chilling discovery of obsessions, sinister secrets, and unsettling mannequins that seem far too lifelike.

Your ultimate goal is clear: escape the house before it’s too late. But as you progress, you’ll uncover more about the girl’s twisted hobbies — and the terrifying fate that might await you if you fail.

Will you outsmart her and unlock the final door to freedom, or become just another part of her dark collection?
instructions: Explore the house by tapping on objects, collect useful items, combine them to solve puzzles, and uncover secrets that lead you closer to escaping.

title: Geometry: Black Ball
description:
Geometry: Black Ball is an exciting arcade game based on the legendary Geometry Dash. In this game, you have to control the ball and overcome various obstacles using the unique mechanics of gravity change.

The game includes 10 levels of varying difficulty, each of which is an exciting challenge and requires the player to have quick reactions and precise movements. The further you advance, the more difficult the obstacles become, adding an additional challenge to the game.

During the game, you can change the gravity of the ball by pressing the space bar or right mouse button to overcome obstacles. This will help you change the direction of the ball and overcome obstacles on the way to the finish line.

title: Hoppy Bird
description:
Get ready to flap, hop, and soar! Hoppy Bird takes the classic arcade formula to new heights with exciting new mechanics and game modes. Test your reflexes as you navigate through endless pipes, but watch out—it’s not just about flying anymore!
Key Features:
- 3 Unique Game Modes: Master the classic Normal mode, defy physics in Moon mode (Low Gravity), or test your limits in Hardcore mode (2x Speed, No Revive!).
- Power-Up Your Flight: Collect active boosters like Shields for protection, Magnets to attract coins, and Double Score to climb the ranks faster.
- Shop & Customization: Earn coins to unlock a variety of cool skins, including the stealthy Ninja, the Red Rocket, and more.
- LiveOps & Rewards: Complete Daily Quests and participate in Gold Rush events to maximize your earnings.
- Global Leaderboards: Compete with players worldwide and prove you are the ultimate bird pilot.
Simple to play, impossible to master. How far can you hop?
instructions:
Objective:
Fly as far as possible without crashing! Your goal is to navigate Hoppy Bird through an endless series of pipes to achieve the highest score. Collect coins to unlock skins and grab boosters to extend your run.
How to Play:
- Stay Airbone: Gravity pulls you down constantly. You must flap your wings to gain height.
- Dodge Obstacles: Timing is key! Pass through the gaps in the pipes. Hitting a pipe or the ground ends the game.
- Use Power-ups: Collect items like the Shield (protection), Magnet (attract coins), and 2x Score to help you survive and rank up.
Controls:
- Desktop: Press Spacebar or Left Mouse Button to fly.
- Mobile: Tap anywhere on the screen to fly.

title: Frost Land - Snow Survival
description: Frost Land - Snow Survival is a strategic base-building game where you battle the harsh cold to stay alive. You’ll wield a flamethrower to melt snow, uncover hidden resources, and expand your shelter. Every choice matters—manage supplies wisely and decide which frozen zones to explore as you carve out survival in a relentless winter.In the strategic realm of a winter survival game, a devastating catastrophe has plunged the world into an endless winter. Embodying the last surviving hero, you venture forth, armed with a formidable flamethrower. Battle against relentless winter weather, confront fearsome beasts, and forge alliances with fellow survivors you rescue.With immersive exploration, strategic resource management, and a thrilling quest for survival, Frost Land – Snow Survival offers an addictive and adrenaline-pumping gameplay experience that will keep you hooked in the snow game for hours on end.Features🗺️ Epic Exploration: Brace yourself for an immersive winter survival journey through a visually stunning snowy world, where uncovering hidden resources with your badass flamethrower will keep you on the edge of your seat.⚔️ Strategy Resource Mastery: It's all about strategic thinking and resource management in a base-building game. Carefully decide when and where to melt that icy snow to unveil precious resources. It ensures your winter survival and dominance in this unforgiving realm.🏰 Base-Building Awesomeness: Customize and upgrade your base. Show off your creativity and build a base that strikes fear into the hearts of your rivals.❄️ Weather Challenges and Beast Battles: Brace yourself for intense weather conditions like blizzards and freezing winds that will test your winter survival skills.🎯 Quests and Triumphs: Embark on thrilling quests and conquer objectives that shower you with epic rewards and unlock new adventures. Prove yourself as a true hero of the winter survival game and make your mark in this frozen game.
instructions:
Desktop Controls:
W/↑ (Up Arrow): Move forward.
S/↓ (Down Arrow): Move backward.
A/← (Left Arrow): Move left.
D/→ (Right Arrow): Move right.

Mobile Controls:
On-Screen Joystick: Move in all directions by dragging the joystick.

title: Summer Rider 3D
description:
Hit the waves in Summer Rider 3D, a sun-soaked surf adventure inspired by high-speed endless runners. Glide over water on a surfboard or jet-ski, collect shimmering starfish, and push your reflexes to the limit as the speed cranks up. With a colorful summer theme and upbeat tropical soundtracks, the game offers endless fun for both solo and competitive players.

[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about and what are the main objectives?
A: It's an arcade game where you surf and have to overcome various obstacles on your board.

Q: Is there a story or narrative arc?
A: There is no storyline; the objective is to avoid crashing your surfboard while navigating around rocks, waterfalls, and a lot of dangerous obstacles.

Q: What is the unique selling point of the game? What makes it appealing to players?
A: The game stands out because there are few similar surfing games. It features good graphics, enjoyable music, and many surfboard skins.

Q: What are the most engaging content elements (weapons, vehicles, locations, skills, references to famous franchises, etc.)?
A: The very relaxing, summer-themed location.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What currencies are available, and what are they used for (e.g., common - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?
A: The game has one currency, ""Sea Stars,"" which can be used to purchase different surfboards.

Q: Is there any customization in the game? Can the character's appearance, location editor, vehicle tuning, etc., be adjusted?
A: Yes, you can buy clothes and different surfboard skins.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Is it recommended to play with sound for better immersion, or will playing without sound make it difficult to progress?
A: The music is a nice addition for the atmosphere but is not essential for completing the levels
instructions:
ARROW KEYS or WASD: Move left, right, or jump to navigate waves and obstacles.
On MOBILE, tap left/right to steer, both sides to jump!

Collect starfish to unlock new surfboards or jet-skis.
Aim for the five-starfish bonuses on rocks for bigger rewards, but time your jumps carefully.
As your distance increases, the speed ramps up stay sharp to maintain control.
tags: action, arcade, skill, 3d, driving, boat, race-games, fast-paced-games, casual-games, endless-games, competitive-games

title: World Flags Quiz
description: World Flags Quiz is a fast-paced, fun, and educational mobile game that challenges players to match countries with their correct flags. Designed with simplicity and clarity in mind, the game offers a single, highly addictive game mode that tests your geographical knowledge one country at a time. In each round, players are presented with the name of a country — such as France, Brazil, Japan, or Nigeria — and must choose the correct flag from a set of four options. Only one is right, and the other three are cleverly selected to test your attention to detail and flag recognition skills. Enjoy playing this flag quiz game here

title: Deadly Catch!
description:
Dive into an exciting fishing adventure with this fun and dynamic game—where every cast counts! 

🎣 Catch Fish with Just One Tap
Cast your line, wait for a bite, and reel in your catch—just like real fishing! From small coastal fish to rare deep-sea legends, every catch brings joy and rewards. The more you play, the more species you’ll discover across diverse fishing zones. 

🔧 Upgrade Your Gear
Sell your catch to earn coins and invest in better rods and floats. Stronger gear speeds up fishing, boosts your chances of landing rare fish, and makes every session even more rewarding. Progress feels real—because you’ve earned it!

On PC:

On mobile devices:

title: Sudoku - Number Games
description:

По мере повышения уровня игра усложняется, но всегда можно вернутся к прошлым уровням и играть на более легком уровне сложности.
instructions:
Rules of Sudoku - Number Games is simple:
Inside the playing field there are 9 squares consisting of 3 x 3 cells. Each horizontal row, vertical column and square (9 cells each) must be filled with numbers from 1 to 9, without repeating any numbers in the row, column or square.

title: Run The Electricity
description:
Run The Electricity is a unique puzzle game that combines simplicity and benefits for your mind. It is designed to give relaxation, help to cope with stress and improve concentration.

Instead of intense gameplay and a race against time, a calm process awaits you here: you just need to connect lines, lamps and energy sources in a closed circuit to turn on the light.

Minimalistic design, smooth animation and soothing music create an atmosphere of complete tranquility comparable to yoga. This is not just a game, but a means to meditate and combat anxiety. You can play it at home, on the road, or at work to distract yourself and restore your mental balance.

Smart puzzles train logic and imagination, and simple mechanics allow you to have fun from the first seconds. Discover a world of light, harmony and tranquility!
instructions:
Playing this game is easy and enjoyable. All you need to do is tap on the lines and turn them until you get a closed electrical circuit.

For the light to come on, at least one lamp and a wire must be connected in it. As soon as this happens, the lines will shine, and you will get a feeling of completeness and tranquility.

Each puzzle takes only a few seconds, but it brings a lot of fun. This makes the game ideal for short pauses, trips, or waiting. You don't have to rush: the levels are unlimited in time, and you can solve them at your own pace.

With each new stage, the tasks become more interesting and diverse, training concentration and attention. Conduct Electricity will help to cope with anxiety, give positive emotions and become an excellent anti-stress remedy. Just open the game, start connecting the lines, and feel your mind calm down.
tags: puzzle, arcade, matching, brain, intelligence, mobile, relaxing-games, brain-training-games, connect-games, mind-games, 1-player-games, simple-games

title: Clash of Skulls
description:
Clash of Skulls is a tower defense game where you try to prevent enemies from destroying your base by deploying various types of units. Face a dangerous horde of evil creatures that intend to invade your lands. Combine and level up your units to have the upper hand and increase your damage output. Once you've taken care of the defense part, you can start planning your attacks to take over your enemy's territory. Hire skeleton warriors with blades, spears, scythes, explosives, battering rams, and much more... Go ahead and try it. Clash of Skulls rules!

This side-scrolling strategy game features a lane-based tug-of-war mechanic where players deploy diverse skeleton units to destroy the opponent's fortified tower. The gameplay loop centers on managing a regenerating mana resource to summon units from a card-based hand, including melee warriors, archers, and heavy-hitting bosses like the hog rider. Each unit automatically marches right toward the enemy base, engaging in combat upon contact. Victory is achieved by depleting the enemy tower's health bar displayed at the top of the screen. The visual style is a clean 2D cartoon aesthetic with flat vector graphics against a bright, tranquil backdrop of rolling green hills and blue skies. The color palette is dominated by vibrant greens, yellows, and blues, contrasting with the dark, gritty character designs of the skeletal army. A wooden HUD at the bottom tracks current mana and unit cooldowns, while the top UI displays player names and health bars. The tone is casual yet competitive, offering accessible pick-up-and-play mechanics suitable for a wide audience. Progression is indicated by an upgrade system accessible from the main menu, likely allowing players to strengthen their unit cards using earned currency to tackle more difficult bots or players.

title: Maths Puzzle
description: Maths Puzzle is a fun and engaging logic-based game that challenges your mathematical skills and problem-solving abilities. With a variety of puzzles that range in difficulty, this game is perfect for anyone looking to improve their mental agility and enjoy a fun, educational experience.
