Start the Game: Click on the puzzle to begin. You’ll be presented with an equation that is missing some parts (numbers or operators).

Solve the Puzzle: Use your knowledge of basic arithmetic (addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division) to complete the puzzle. You may need to fill in missing numbers or choose the correct mathematical operators to balance both sides of the equation.

Hints: If you're stuck, some versions of the game offer hints that help guide you towards the solution. Use them wisely to avoid wasting moves.

Levels: As you progress, the difficulty will increase. New challenges such as more complex equations or multiple missing elements will keep you on your toes.

Time and Scoring: Depending on the version of the game, you may be timed, so solving the puzzles quickly could earn you more points or rewards.

Winning the Game: Successfully solve a series of puzzles to move to the next level. Keep going to challenge your brain and improve your math skills.

title: Food Tower Defense
description: 🍔 Welcome to Food Tower Defense – The Tastiest Tower Defense Ever! 🍕🍟 Prepare your appetite and sharpen your strategy because Food Tower Defense is here to serve you the most delicious tower defense experience ever! 🍴😋 In this mouth-watering adventure, your mission is simple but savory: defend your kitchen kingdom 🍽️ from waves of hungry invaders determined to steal your scrumptious stash of food! From explosive burgers to slippery bananas, every tower brings something special to the table. 🍔🍌💥 🎯 Your Mission: Protect the Feast! The hungry hordes are coming! 😱 Waves of greedy food thieves, ravenous creatures, and snack-hungry monsters are marching toward your kitchen. You’ll need to plan your defenses carefully, combining different food towers to maximize power and coverage. Experiment with combos 🍕+🍟+🍗 to find your perfect recipe for victory! Each battle is a blend of strategy, timing, and chaos — and every victory tastes even sweeter when you pull it off perfectly! 🍰🏆 ⚙️ Key Features and Tasty Towers 🍴 🍔 Burger Mortar – Launch explosive burgers that deal massive splash damage 💥. Huge range, huge flavor, huge BOOM! 🔥 BBQ Burst – Spray sizzling BBQ bits at high speed! Medium range, rapid rate, and a mouthful of firepower! 🔥 🍟 Fries Shooter – Rapid-fire french fries that rain down on enemies like crispy golden bullets ⚡🍟. 🌭 HotDog Sniper – Precision hotdog shots with high pierce damage! Snipe enemies from afar 🎯🌭. 🍪 Cookie Roll – Rolling cookie boulders crush everything in their path 🍪💨. Perfect for crowd control! 🦃 Turkey Wall – Summon a mighty turkey barrier 🧱🦃 that halts invaders while dealing damage over time. 🍕 Pizza 360° – Spin and fire pizza slices in every direction 🍕🍕🍕! Great for when enemies surround you! 🧀 Nachos Spread – Unleash a V-shot of nachos 🔺🧀 for rapid mid-range coverage. Cheesy and deadly! 🍅 Ketchup Laser – Continuous ketchup beam that burns enemies with spicy precision 🔴💫. 🍌 Banana Slip – Toss banana peels to make enemies slip, slow down, and even crash into each other 😆🍌. 🏰 Classic Mode: Defend your base from endless waves of food raiders! 💡 Strategy Meets Flavor Mix and match towers to discover powerful combo effects — like BBQ + Fries = Sizzling Combo Bonus! 🔥🍟 Upgrade your towers, unlock rare recipes, and customize your defense style. Whether you prefer long-range sniping or all-out sauce mayhem, there’s a perfect build for every chef-defender! 👩‍🍳⚔️ 🎨 Visuals & Atmosphere Enjoy colorful, cartoon-style graphics 🍭, smooth animations, and deliciously detailed food towers that look good enough to eat (but don’t, please 😅). Every battle is a feast for your eyes — from gooey cheese explosions 🧀💥 to rivers of ketchup lasers 🍅⚡. Earn coins 💰, gather ingredients 🥕, and upgrade your towers to unlock legendary recipes and secret sauces! 🎮 Why You’ll Love Food Tower Defense ✔️ Addictive tower defense gameplay with a tasty twist 🍕 ✔️ Over 10 unique food towers, each with upgrade paths and combos ✔️ Vibrant, food-filled worlds and creative enemy designs 🍩👾 ✔️ Fun sound effects and sizzling action! 🔊 Ready to defend your kitchen from the hungry hordes? 👊🍔 Build your defenses, cook up chaos, and serve defeat to your enemies in Food Tower Defense — the most flavorful tower defense game ever made! 🌶️🎮

title: World War Camp Company
description:
Develop your camp and fight the invaders!

In your battle camp you can upgrade your troops, buy military equipment, and improve your weapons.
Buy jeeps, tanks, hire squads of fighters!

Go through all locations, defeat all opponents!
Blue vs. Red in this exciting game of squad battles!

- A large number of upgrades
- Different types of equipment
- Interesting enemies

Core Gameplay & Story

Q: What is the game about? What do you need to do?
A: It's an idle game where you need to gather troops and attack the enemy camp.

Q: Is there a storyline in the game?
A: There is no specific storyline, but the tasks are clear.

Q: What is the unique feature of the game? What can hook players?
A: There are few games with such high quality, well-balanced gameplay and fast-paced action.

Q: Are there bosses in the game and how are they different?
A: Bosses appear every few levels. They are big, tough enemies that mark the end of a level cycle.

Mechanics & Progression

Q: What currencies are there and what can they be spent on (regular - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?
A: There are two currencies: gold helmets and silver helmets. They are spent on upgrading troops.

Q: How does the upgrading system work? What needs to be done to level up faster?
A: You need to collect more helmets to upgrade the appearance and stats of your soldiers and vehicles.

Economy & Customization

Q: Are there captivating elements of content (weapons, vehicles, locations, skills, references to famous franchises, etc.)?
A: There are references to action movies.

Q: Is there customization in the game? Can you customize the appearance of the hero, location editor, car tuning, etc.?
A: Yes, the player's skin can be customized.

Retention & Engagement

Q: Is it preferable to play with sound to better immerse yourself in the atmosphere, or will there be difficulties in passing without sound?
A: Sound in the game is not mandatory.

Upgrade your army and weapons at the base in special places.

title: Capybara Let's Go: Zombie Rush
description:
Welcome to a relaxing casual game that combines merge gameplay and strategic auto battles!
Start your journey with a group of adorable pets. Drag and place them on the battlefield, and merge two pets of the same level to get stronger upgraded ones. You can refresh the pet pool to get new companions and plan your layout carefully to make the most of limited space.
Once your team is ready, start the battle! All pets will attack enemies automatically. As you clear foes, your team will level up and unlock random powerful skills, including damage boost, critical strike, healing and area attacks. Choose skills wisely to build your unique team.
Advance through dozens of regular stages, challenge tough Boss levels and explore surprise bonus stages for rich rewards. Collect more styles of cute pets, raise and star them up to unlock greater power.
Easy to pick up, fun to master! Experience endless joy with pet merging, strategic layout and exciting battles right now!
instructions:
1. Basic Setup & Controls
Start a Battle: Tap/click the "Start" button to begin a new wave
Deploy Capybaras: Drag and drop capybaras from your squad menu to the battlefield grid
Activate Skills: Tap/click on a deployed capybara to use its special ability (when the skill bar is full)
Upgrade Units: Merge two identical capybaras of the same level to create a more powerful version
Pause Game: Tap/click the pause button in the top-right corner to adjust settings or take a break
2. Battle Mechanics
Wave System: Enemies attack in increasing difficulty waves. Each wave introduces new enemy types with unique abilities
Health System: Your camp has a base health (starts at 100). If enemies reach your camp, they'll reduce your health—game over when health reaches 0
Gold Collection: Defeat enemies to earn gold, which you can use to:
Unlock new capybara units (10+ unique types available)
Upgrade existing units' stats (attack, defense, speed)
Purchase temporary battle buffs (damage boost, health regeneration)
Energy Management: Skills require energy to use. Energy recharges over time or by defeating special enemies

title: Sprunki: Collect All Characters!
description:
Sprunki: Collect All Characters! — a dynamic platformer where dangerous levels, skillful jumps, and the hunt for rare heroes await you! Complete challenging stages, collect items, and unlock more and more characters from the world of Sprunki. Can you become number one in the rankings? 🔥

🏃‍♂️ What awaits you:
• Exciting platformer gameplay — run, jump, and survive on dangerous levels ⚡
• Moving platforms and traps — test your reaction and skills 😈
• Ropes, gaps, and obstacles — every level brings a new challenge 🎭
• Character collection — unlock unique heroes from the Sprunki world ✨
• Tough moments — only the most skilled will reach the end 💪
• Player rankings — compete with others and become the best 🏆
• Fun boosters — move faster, jump higher, and play even cooler 🚀

Collect all characters, overcome every challenge, and prove that you are the true hero of the Sprunki world! 👑
[Core Gameplay & Story\]
Q: What is the game about and what do you do?
A: It is a 2D platformer where you jump across various platforms to find and collect all the Sprunkis for your collection. You must navigate obstacles and plan your moves to reach specific platforms and collect special items. Each item belongs to a specific Sprunki; you need to collect 10 items of the same type to find and unlock that Sprunki for your collection.

Q: What is the game's standout feature and why will it appeal to players?
A: The game features high-quality polish, beautiful graphics, and a wide variety of features that keep the gameplay feeling fresh and diverse.

Q: What are the most engaging content elements?
A: The Sprunkis themselves are the main draw.

\[Economy & Customization\]
Q: Are there in-game purchases? What can you buy and how do they affect the game? Does spending money speed up progress?
A: Yes, you can purchase an ad-free experience as well as unlimited boosts, such as the magnet, double jump, and increased movement speed.

\[Retention & Engagement\]
Q: Are there leaderboards? How do you join them and what types are available?
A: Yes, there are leaderboards. Your score and ranking are determined by how many Sprunki unlock items you have collected.

Q: Are there daily rewards or similar mechanics to keep players coming back?
A: There are rewards granted for every 5 minutes of play that refresh when you restart the game. these consist of boosts like the magnet, double jump, and movement speed.

Q: Is it recommended to play with sound for better immersion, or will playing without it make the game difficult?
A: It is not required, but the sound design is high quality and enhances the experience.

title: Craftsman Land
description:
Craftsman Land – build your own farm and help the town recover!

Craftsman Land is a farming and crafting game where your goal is to rebuild the inherited land, expand your farm, and support the local community.

After a devastating flood, the town is in ruins. As the heir to the land, it’s up to you to restore your farm, help the townsfolk, and bring life back to the surrounding villages. Grow crops like corn and onions, go fishing, and construct new buildings such as a house, chicken coop, and cowshed. Inside your home, you can decorate and design the interior to your liking.

Take care of your animals – feed chickens and cows, collect fresh eggs and milk, and use them for crafting or trading. Complete quests for local people, trade with merchants, and produce a wide variety of items thanks to the crafting system. Improve your skills, specialize in your favorite activities, and become a true master craftsman.

The world of Craftsman Land is constantly growing with new places, tasks, and adventures waiting to be discovered
instructions:
In Craftsman Land, playing is simple and intuitive. On mobile devices you tap the screen, while on PC you use the mouse. Actions are performed automatically – all you need are the required items and resources. With just a click, you can trigger different activities such as building houses, crafting tools, or producing goods.

Complete quests given by townsfolk to earn rewards and progress in the story. When you run out of quests, head to the crossroads where the bulletin board offers an endless supply of new tasks.

Explore the map to visit different shops:

Building materials store – get everything you need for construction.

Tool shop – find useful equipment for your farm.

Gardening store – buy seeds and expand your fields.

Not everything has to be bought! Many materials can be produced by yourself. Chop wood, fire clay into bricks at the campfire, and create other essential resources to use in crafting and construction.

Grow crops, raise animals, trade, and craft your way to success while helping the entire town thrive!
tags: adventure, strategy, simulation, multiplayer, mouse, popular, crafting, quests-games, building-games, resource-management-games

title: Mahjong Chef
description: A tile-matching puzzle game inspired by Mahjong Solitaire. Tap two free tiles of the same type to clear them from the board. Complete each stage by removing all tiles.
instructions:
How to play:
- Tap a tile to select it. Tap another tile of the same type to make a match.
- A tile is "free" when its left or right side is not blocked by another tile.
- Clear all tiles to complete the stage and earn coins.
- Some tiles are face-down — tap to reveal them first.
- Rock tiles cannot be selected. They break when an adjacent tile is matched.

Items (purchasable with coins):
- Undo — Restore the last matched pair.
- Hint — Highlight a matching pair on the board.
- Shuffle — Randomize all remaining tile positions.
- Magnet — Automatically find and remove a matching pair.
tags: puzzle, matching, mahjong, 1-player-games, mahjong-solitaire-online

title: Mini Golf Battle
description:
Mini Golf Battle is a fun and casual mini golf challenge where your goal is simple: hit the ball into the hole with as few shots as possible. The game combines easy controls with tricky levels full of slopes, angles, and obstacles that test your timing and precision.
Each level is designed to get a little harder, so you’ll need to aim carefully, control your shot power, and plan the best path to sink the ball. It’s a relaxing yet addictive golf experience made for quick play sessions.
instructions:
Drag/swipe in the direction you want the ball to move.
Pull back and release to adjust the strength of your shot.
The longer you drag, the stronger the hit.
Try to sink the ball into the hole in the fewest strokes possible.
Watch out for walls, ramps, and barriers that can deflect your ball.
Use angles to bounce around corners smartly.

Fire Power:
This bonus gives your ball a flaming speed boost.
It’s useful for long straight shots or when you want to quickly cross a large gap.
Best used when you need maximum distance in a single strike.

Wing / Glide Power:
This bonus allows your ball to glide smoothly as if it has wings.
It reduces friction and gives your ball a longer travel path with better control.
Ideal for precision shots where you want distance but also don’t want to overshoot too wildly.

Spring / Bounce Power:
This bonus acts like a spring-loaded push.
It helps your ball bounce forward with extra force, perfect for overcoming obstacles or making tricky jumps.
Best for courses with barriers, ramps, or platforms where normal shots can’t reach.
tags: arcade, sports, skill, ball, mini-golf, mobile, fast-paced-games, casual-games, challenging-games, agility-games

title: Patch Garden
description:
Patch Garden is a cozy rectangle logic puzzle where every seed clue grows into one perfect garden patch. Drag across the grid to draw rectangles, match each clue's area, and fill the whole board without gaps or overlaps.

Start with simple tutorial gardens, then progress through hundreds of increasingly clever levels with mystery seeds, exact-size clues, larger boards, and tougher deduction challenges.
instructions:
Grow the Perfect Garden! In Patch Garden, your goal is to fill the entire board with clean rectangular patches. Each seed clue belongs to exactly one rectangle, and the rectangle must match the clue's area. Think carefully, avoid overlaps, and cover every cell to complete the level.

Desktop Controls:
Mouse: Click and drag across the grid to draw a rectangular patch.
Ctrl+Z: Undo your last move.
E: Activate Erase mode, then click a placed patch to remove it.
H: Use a hint to highlight a helpful solution area.
Ad Hint Button: When your free hints run out, watch a rewarded ad to unlock one extra hint.

Mobile Controls:
Touch Drag: Drag from one cell to another to draw a rectangular patch.
Undo Button: Tap to undo your last move.
Erase Button: Tap to activate Erase mode, then tap a placed patch to remove it.
Hint Button: Tap to highlight a helpful solution area.
Ad Hint Button: When your free hints run out, watch a rewarded ad to unlock one extra hint.
tags: puzzle, logic, casual-games, brain-training-games, 1-player-games, ai-games

title: Cannon Balls
description: Try to be the master of destruction, heat up the buildings neatly and show no mercy! In 'Cannon Balls 3D' it depends on how skillfully you place the shots so that the structures collapse as efficiently as possible. Watch your ammo, because it's limited. But don't worry. There will also come a time when you will bring the cannon to the edge of functionality. Especially when the great bombs are used. So what are you waiting for?
instructions:
Aiming & Shooting:
On desktop/browser: Move your mouse to aim the cannon and click the left button to fire.
On mobile: Drag your finger (or stylus) to aim, and tap once to shoot.
Weak Points and TNT:
Target weak spots in the structure (like glass or foundation blocks) to maximize collapse.
Hitting TNT (when present) triggers chain reactions to clear multiple blocks at once.
Bomb Power-Ups:
A bomb meter fills up as you shoot shapes and earn points. When full, tap the bomb icon to switch cannonballs to bombs temporarily.
You’ll normally get only three bombs per level, so use them wisely on tougher structures or large clusters.

description:
Moto Traffic Rider puts you behind the handlebars of a powerful motorcycle and delivers a whole new level of realism while keeping the old-school spirit and simple gameplay.

title: Snowy Adventures with Noob and Pro!
description:
Snowy Adventures with Noob and Pro! — a fun snowy adventure where you play solo or with a friend, leveling up your tree to make it the coolest in the world! Collect rare toys, play mini-games, and show everyone your tree is the top 🎄❄️

❄️ What’s waiting for you:
• Play solo or co-op on one device 🤝
• Toy collection — from common to ultra-rare, decorate and upgrade your tree 💎
• Crafting — combine items to make legendary decorations 🔧✨
• Mini-games — earn coins, boosts, and rewards 🎮
• Snow battles — throw snowballs and have fun ☃️💥
• Huge tree — level it up and make it even cooler 🎄🔥
• Leaderboard — the more epic your tree and collection, the higher you climb 🏆
• Daily bonuses — gifts and freebies every day 🎁

Collect toys, craft the best decorations, and turn your tree into a legendary snowy world icon ❄️👑
[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about, and what do you do?
A: It is a 2D game where you grow and decorate your own Christmas tree by playing various mini-games. You earn ""gifts"" as currency, and the larger your tree grows, the more rewards you receive.

Q: Is there a storyline in the game?
A: Not exactly, but the premise is that you need to save Christmas and help Santa.

Q: What is the game's unique hook? What will draw players in?
A: It features Minecraft references, a wide variety of mini-games and rewards, high-quality graphics, and a local co-op mode to play with a friend on one screen. There is also a wheel of fortune, character skins, and a crafting system for Christmas ornaments.

Q: What are the most engaging content elements?
A: Minecraft-inspired references and themes.

[Mechanics & Progression]

Q: How does the progression system work? How can players level up faster?
A: Play mini-games to earn ""Bucks,"" then use them to upgrade and grow your Christmas tree.

Q: Are there mini-games within the main gameplay?
A: Yes, there are many mini-games, including catching falling Bucks while dodging bombs, delivering gifts and coal to houses, throwing snowballs at targets, and defending sweets from zombies.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What currencies are available and what can they be spent on?
A: There is an in-game currency called ""Bucks"" used to water the tree, upgrade ornaments for earning boosts, and level up mini-games. There is also a ""Gifts"" currency used to purchase more Christmas tree decorations.

Q: Are there in-game purchases? What can you buy and does it affect progression?
A: Yes, you can purchase various ""Bucks"" packs as well as character skins.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Are there leaderboards? How do you join them and what types are available?
A: Yes, your rank is determined by how much and how quickly you earn from your Christmas tree.

Q: Are there daily rewards or similar retention mechanics?
A: Yes, there is a reward system that grants prizes for every 5 minutes of playtime.

Q: Is it better to play with sound on, or can the game be completed without it?
A: It is not required, but playing with sound adds significantly to the festive atmosphere.
instructions:
Play together on one device — each controls their own character while leveling up the tree and causing snowy chaos! ❄️🎄

🎮 Player 1 Controls:
• A / S / D — move
• W — jump
• Q — action
The rest you’ll figure out on the fly 😉

🎮 Player 2 Controls:
• ← / ↓ / → — move
• ↑ — jump
• Enter — action
Everything else is pretty intuitive 😎

Work as a team, throw snowballs, play mini-games, and make your tree the coolest ever! ☃️🔥

title: Schoolboy: Escape from Parents!
description:
Welcome to “Schoolboy: Escape from Parents!” — an exciting stealth quest where you must escape the house without being seen by your parents! Explore rooms, collect items, and use them wisely to discover new paths to freedom and solve puzzles.

The game features 10 unique endings, each unlocked through clever thinking, observation, and strategic planning. Track your progress and compete with friends on the leaderboard to see who can unlock the most endings.

Combine items, distract your parents, hide, and plan every move — from an ordinary light bulb to a simple stool — every little thing can help you make your escape. The game blends stealth, puzzles, and strategy, making each playthrough unique and exciting.

See how far you can go and prove that you can outsmart even the most watchful parents!

Core Gameplay & Story

Q: What is the game about? What do you need to do?

A: It's a stealth quest where the player needs to escape from home without getting caught by their parents.

Q: Is there a storyline in the game?

A: There is no storyline, but the objective is clear: escape from home without disturbing the parents, using various items to distract them.

Q: What is the unique feature of the game? What can hook players?

A: The game is similar to the legendary game "How to annoy your neighbor." Players need to combine items, distract parents, hide, and plan every move. There are 10 different endings in the game.

Mechanics & Progression

Q: Are there any currencies in the game and what can they be spent on (regular - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?

A: The game has gold as currency. Gold can be spent on skins.

Economy & Customization

Q: Are there in-app purchases in the game? What can be bought and what does it affect? Does making purchases speed up game progress?

A: There are in-app purchases in the game, where you can buy gold.

Retention & Engagement

Q: Are there leaderboards? How to access them? What types are available (weekly, monthly, all-time, etc.)?

A: Yes, the game has leaderboards based on the number of endings unlocked.

Q: What are the engaging content elements (weapons, cars, locations, skills, references to famous franchises, etc.)?

A: Reference to the game "How to annoy your neighbor."

Q: Is there customization in the game? Can you customize the appearance of the hero, location editor, car tuning, etc.?

A: Yes, in the game, you can buy clothing items for the hero.

Q: Is it preferable to play with sound to better immerse yourself in the atmosphere, or will there be difficulties in passing without sound?

A: The music complements the game well but is not necessary for gameplay.
instructions:

title: Scale the wheels
description:
The game where size matters! Your mission is to change the size of the wheels, transitioning from small to large and vice versa, to overcome a variety of obstacles and progress through levels. But that's not all! The size of the wheels also affects the speed of your car, adding excitement to the gameplay.

With over 30 different tracks to conquer, you'll face unique challenges. Additionally, you can upgrading your acceleration, enabling you to jump farther and collect more coins at the end of each level. So, resize your wheels, and embark on the exhilarating journey to earn the highest score and become a true champion!
instructions:
Your goal is to reach the finish line. To do this, use the slider in the game to change the size of the wheels.

Small wheels allow you to accelerate. Large wheels allow you to drive into high obstacles, but because of them the car becomes slow. Also, the larger the wheels, the more the car turns into the standard position if it is not standing on all wheels at the moment.

If you get stuck, try to drastically change the size of the wheels, so the car can bounce.

In some levels, it is important to gain speed in order to hit an obstacle.

If you realize that the car is stuck, stopped and does not move even when you change the size of the wheels, then use the restart button of the level and try to pass it again.

Pump up the acceleration level so that at the end of the level the car can jump as far as possible and earn as many coins as possible.

Control on all platforms using the game interface.

title: Syntagma
description:
A puzzle adventure with platformer elements.

A suddenly arrived package contains a mysterious artifact, similar to a compass, and an ancient map pointing the way to five mysterious locations with abandoned temples.

To activate the compass and reveal the secrets of the temples, the hero must find unique crystals, symbolizing the five elements, scattered around the world.

To obtain a crystal, you can solve the puzzle only by jumping on active platforms. The correct sequence of stepping on the platforms and collecting all the keys on them opens the vault and grants access to the crystal. There are restrictions on moving across the platforms.

Moving backward and diagonally is prohibited.

Movement is only allowed forward, left, and right.

The start of movement activates defense mechanisms and obstacles that cause damage.

There are 2 difficulty levels, which can be changed in the main menu settings. After completing Level 0, the game will automatically suggest trying Level 1.
instructions:
Controls: Click on a platform with the mouse, tap for mobile, or move the hero with the arrow keys on the keyboard, or press the on-screen arrow buttons for mobile.

Avoid collisions with traps. 1) You can jump over them when moving towards them, or 2) by clicking on the hero, 3) with the spacebar on the keyboard, 4) with a touch button on mobile - this makes the hero jump on the spot at the right moment and allows you to avoid a collision with an obstacle.

title: Monster Truck Offroad
description: Monster Truck Offroad Racing Game is a rugged arcade racer where massive trucks tear through dirt, mud, and rocky terrain. Crush obstacles, jump over ravines, and smash through destructible objects as you race to the finish. The game features multiple monster trucks with unique stats — speed, crush power, and suspension. What makes it unique? Unlike standard racers, you earn points for crushing cars and destroying the environment. Bigger trucks can flatten smaller obstacles, while lighter ones climb steeper hills. With bumpy tracks, hidden shortcuts, and realistic weight physics, every race feels powerful and unpredictable. Perfect for desktop and mobile browsers. No pit stops — just pure offroad mayhem and monster truck action!
instructions:
Reach the finish line first or complete destruction goals. Your truck handles rough terrain — use momentum to climb hills.

Desktop – Left/right arrows to steer. Up arrow to accelerate. Down arrow to brake/reverse. Spacebar to crush/jump.

Mobile – Left/right tilt or on-screen steer buttons. Tap gas and brake pedals. Tap jump button for ramps.

Both – Drive over cars and objects to crush them for points. Use ramps for big air. Avoid rolling over — balance your landing.

Three race modes: Circuit Race, Destruction Derby, and Time Trial. Unlock 6 monster trucks across 8 muddy tracks. Smash everything and dominate the offroad!

title: Magic Tri Peaks Solitaire
description:
Magic Tri Peaks Solitaire is the classic one lower one higher solitaire you know and love. It sounds easy: just remove cards from the board one higher or lower than the next card in the deck.

But there's a whole other world behind these simple rules! The constantly changing locations and new cards on the board will keep you on your toes using new strategies. Don't expect to be an expert if you don't play for a couple weeks! The game sends you on a journey to a magical world and tells the story of an adventure across an enchanted land. Forests, mountains, seas and snowy peaks: get ready for a wild ride in Magic Tri Peaks Solitaire!

What makes our solitaire special:
Players can use different boosters on levels to give the game a special twist. Put any card from the board on a Joker. The Combo booster helps you get a five-card combo at the very start of a level, and Eye shows you what card is hiding at the top of the deck.
Start a new level and use the Sword to switch out a card from the deck with one you need. The Bow lets you remove any card from the board, the Fan shuffles cards and brings what you need to the top, and the Hammer flips over a portion of the hidden cards!

Features
♣️️ Hundreds of levels with new ones added all the time!
♦️ Different locations with fun original game mechanics!
♠️ Exciting battles against golems of different elements!
♥ Just lay out your cards in ascending or descending order!
♦️ Tons of different rewards and bonuses!
♣️ A fun game to boost your mood!
instructions: Select cards that are one higher or one lower in value than the card you drew to remove it from the board. To complete a level, you need to remove all cards from the playing field without running out of cards from your supply.
tags: puzzle, adventure, cards, solitaire, matching, 2d-games, fantasy-games, relaxing-games, brain-training-games, mind-games, desktop-games, 1-player-games, simple-games, borwser-games, unity-games-online

description: Dive into the exhilarating world of Train Master, an engaging puzzle game where strategy is key. Your goal: gather passengers without accidents. title: NSR Street
description:
NSR is an underground street racing game focused on speed, style, and competition.

Race through street circuits, master drifts to build nitro, and rise through the ranks in both single-player and real-time multiplayer races. Explore the open-world hub, drive around, live events, and join races whenever you want.

Drifting is central to how you play NSR. Link smooth drifts to build boost, use nitro at the right time, and take corners carefully to stay in front. Each race rewards your driving skills, not chance.

Earn coins, upgrade your car’s performance, and customize your ride just the way you like. With over 50 cars at launch and lots of ways to personalize like changing body parts, paint, wheels, decals, neon lights, stance, tuning, and more every car is unique.

Race on over 50 famous street circuits, try daily challenges, and test yourself in real-time online races with up to six players. 

Whether you play solo against AI, explore the open world, or compete with others for the top spot, NSR gives you a true street racing experience with no damage penalties only speed, skill, and style.

Get ready to hit the streets.
instructions:
Take control of the underground streets and show everyone you have what it takes to become the top racer.
Sharpen your high-speed turns and test your drifting skills as you take on every corner in NSR.

Steer: Arrow Keys ← → or A / D
Accelerate: Up Arrow or W
Brake / Reverse: Down Arrow or S
Drift / Drift Brake: Space (hold while turning to initiate and control drifts)
Shift to Nitro

Tips:
- Hold Space while steering to initiate a drift.
- Shift to Nitro
- Control your speed and angle to maintain longer drifts.
- Practice finding the perfect line on each track.

title: Obby Space Challenge: Starships
description:
Obby Space Challenge: Starships is an exciting game where you get to fly starships. Collect energy capsules, earn trophies for your flights, and unlock new starships. Build a collection of the best companions, acquire the ultimate ship, and set out to explore all the locations in this cosmic world!

• Collect energy capsules!
• Earn trophies for your flights!
• Acquire companions!
• Switch starships!
• Unlock new locations!

Core Gameplay & Story

Q: What is the game about? What do you need to do?

A: The game is about collecting capsules and flying a spaceship to earn trophy points.

Q: What is the unique feature of the game? What can hook players?

A: The game offers a variety of pet and spaceship skins, great graphics, an achievement system, and tasks to engage players.

Mechanics & Progression

Q: How does leveling up work exactly? What needs to be done to level up faster?

A: The more energy the character collects, the more trophies they will receive after the flight.

Economy & Customization

Q: What currencies are available and what can they be spent on (regular - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?

A: The game features energy and trophies as currencies. Trophies can be used to purchase pets and spaceships to speed up energy acquisition.

Q: Is there customization in the game? Can you customize the appearance of the hero, location editor, car tuning, etc.?

A: Yes, the game offers many pet and spaceship skins that come with enhancements.

Retention & Engagement

Q: Are there daily rewards or something similar to incentivize players to return?

A: Yes, the game offers rewards that players receive based on their time spent in the game. Rewards are refreshed daily.

Q: Is it advisable to play with sound to better immerse oneself in the atmosphere, or will there be difficulties in playing without sound?

A: Music complements the game, but it is not necessary for gameplay.
instructions:
PC Controls:
WASD - Move your character
Space - Jump
Right Mouse Button - Camera control

Mobile Controls:
Joystick - Move your character
Hold your finger on the screen - Camera control

title: Build a Go-Kart
description:
Build your karting empire from scratch — from simple straights to complex tracks with boosts and risky turns.

Design unique tracks using modular blocks: combine elements, optimize your route, and find the perfect balance between speed and profit. Every ride earns money — and your track design determines how much you make.

🏁 Race & Earn
Drive your own tracks, earn income for every segment, and refine your strategy.

🧱 Flexible Building
Straights, turns, boosters, and dangerous sections — build a track that works for you.

💰 Economy & Progression
Earn currencies, unlock new blocks and skins, and expand your building area.

🔁 Prestige System
Reset your progress to grow faster and unlock new opportunities.

🎁 Daily Rewards
Come back every day and claim bonuses to boost your progress.

Build, test, and optimize your tracks — and turn every race into profit.
Can you create the perfect track?

Core Gameplay & Story

Q: What is the game about? What do players need to do?

A: It's an arcade game where players need to create their own track by placing various blocks.

Q: What is the unique feature of the game? How can it engage players?

A: The game is about Obby. Players can race on their kart on the track, earn money for each segment, and use the earnings to unlock new blocks, expand their territory, and improve the track for even greater profits.

Mechanics & Progression

Q: How does leveling up work exactly? What needs to be done to level up faster?

A: Racing on the track, earning money for each segment, using the money to unlock new blocks for greater profits, expand their territory, and improve the track.

Economy & Customization

Q: What currencies are there and what can they be spent on (regular - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?

A: In the game, there are diamonds and money as currencies. Both currencies can be spent on purchasing new blocks and skins.

Q: Are there in-game purchases? What can be bought and what does it affect? Does making a donation speed up game progress?

A: Yes, there are in-game purchases. Players can buy diamonds, which are then used to purchase blocks. Donations speed up game progress.

Q: Are there engaging content elements (weapons, cars, locations, skills, references to famous franchises, etc.)?

A: In the game, there are Obby and skins for Obby.

Retention & Engagement

Q: Are there daily rewards or something similar that encourages players to return?

A: Yes, the game offers daily rewards and rewards for time spent in the game.

Q: Is it preferable to play with sound to better immerse in the atmosphere, or will there be difficulties in passing without sound?

A: Music complements the game but is not necessary for gameplay.
instructions:
Build your track by placing different blocks. Drive your kart along it, earn money for each segment, and use that income to unlock new blocks, expand your area, and improve your track for even higher profits.

Controls:
PC: WASD — move, Space — jump/exit kart, E — interact, mouse — camera.
Mobile: virtual joystick — move, jump and interact buttons, touch controls — camera.

title: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park
description:
Welcome to Fruitsland – a unique amusement park where fun awaits at every turn! Colorful carousels, exciting rides, and entertainers dressed as fruits – apples, bananas, watermelons, and oranges – fill the park. Children’s laughter fills the air, as school groups with teachers and families with kids flock to enjoy the day. Everything seems perfect, but not all is as it seems... One careless step, and you fall through an old hatch, landing in a spooky, long-abandoned part of the park hidden underground.

Before you lies a chilling, forgotten underground park where strange scientific experiments were once conducted. Only remnants of these experiments remain now, with crumbling rides and deserted game rooms that carry no joy. An eerie silence surrounds you, broken only by the sounds of old machinery and the shuffling of mysterious creatures. The first location is themed around apples – at first, it seems harmless, but soon you realize you’re trapped. As you study the remnants of the scientists’ journals, you uncover their plans to bring fruit to life, fruit that would entertain visitors around the clock. The sinister plan of the park’s owner aimed to turn fruits into real entertainers, capable of anything to amuse guests.

Your mission now is to escape from this underground horror. Every step brings new puzzles, challenging tasks, and deadly monsters that lurk around every corner, the results of failed experiments. Surviving here won’t be easy: these animated fruits have come to life, and now they’re hunting you. Every corner is a new survival test filled with horror, fear, and adrenaline. Choose your path wisely, solve puzzles to find your way out, and avoid deadly traps and monsters that only look like harmless fruits.

The first monster you will encounter is a blind apple, a nightmare resembling a zombie. It aimlessly roams the empty sections of the park, filling everyone who sees it with dread.

The second section is dedicated to the banana. This is the second colorful monster brought to life by horrifying experiments. Seeing it makes you feel as if something is invading your mind.

The third section of the underground park is dedicated to the Pomegranate — a sinister fruit with two large eyes. These roaming eyes not only track unwelcome guests but also attack them. They emerge from their sockets and move independently, chasing their target across the area.

Can you escape from this park and see the sunlight again? Will you find a way to break free from the gloomy underground? This horror game is for those ready for survival, monster hunts, immersion in fear, and adrenaline! Complete quests, solve puzzles, defeat monsters, and find freedom while uncovering the mysteries of Fruitsland.

Download this game to dive into the fruit garden… if you dare!
instructions:
WASD - Move
C - Crouch
Space - Jump

The main goal is to escape the park by solving puzzles. Find useful items and use them to your advantage.

title: Screw Puzzle
description:
Embark on a captivating journey into the world of Wood Screw Puzzle, the ultimate wood nuts and bolts puzzle game that will challenge your mind and delight your senses. This isn't just another screw sort game; it's an immersive experience where you'll unravel intricate arrangements of wood screws, nuts and bolts, and other fascinating fasteners, proving your screw master skills along the way.

Unscrew, Unwind, and Unleash Your Inner Puzzle Master:

Each level of Wood Screw Puzzle presents a unique challenge, a mesmerizing tapestry of wood screws and nuts and bolts intertwined in a complex dance. Your task is to carefully analyze the arrangement, strategize your moves, and skillfully manipulate the screw pins and fasteners to screw out each piece and free them from their wooden embrace. It's a test of your logic, spatial reasoning, and dexterity, all wrapped up in a visually stunning and tactilely satisfying wood nuts and bolts puzzle game.
instructions:

Master the Mechanic Puzzle: Arm yourself with a screwdriver and outsmart wood wasps, overcome the plumer crack obstacles, and avoid the whimsical squirrel nuts.
Explore the Woods: Venture into the heart of the woods game, where each level brings a new conundrum. Are you ready to delve into the mind-blowing world of Screws & Fasteners?

title: Draw To Goal - Soccer Game
description:
Draw to Goal is a fun and creative soccer puzzle game where your drawing skills decide every match! Instead of kicking the ball directly, you draw lines to guide the soccer ball into the goal. Each level challenges your logic, timing, and creativity as you find the perfect path to score.

In this unique draw-to-goal soccer game, every line matters. Use smart angles, avoid obstacles, and create clever paths to help the ball reach the goal. With simple controls and engaging mechanics, Soccer is easy to play but hard to master, making it perfect for both casual players and puzzle lovers.

Enjoy hundreds of handcrafted soccer puzzle levels filled with traps, moving objects, and tricky goal positions. As you progress, the challenges become more complex, pushing you to think outside the box and draw smarter lines. Whether you’re a football fan or a brain-teasing puzzle enthusiast, this game delivers endless fun.
instructions: Use your mouse and hold the left mouse button to draw lines. Guide the ball into the goal to score and complete each level. Use your creativity and timing to overcome obstacles and finish all the levels!

title: 2048 Merge Blocks
description:
Merge Puzzle - 2048 Blocks

Dive into the ultimate number merge puzzle game! Merge Puzzle combines the addictive gameplay of 2048 with innovative tap-to-merge mechanics for a fresh brain-teasing experience.

Connect and merge matching number tiles to create higher values. The more tiles you connect, the bigger your score! Start with simple 2s and 4s, then work your way up to massive numbers like 2048, 8192, and beyond.

KEY FEATURES:

Addictive Merge Gameplay
Tap matching tiles to merge them into higher numbers. Connect tiles horizontally, vertically, and diagonally for maximum combinations. Create chain reactions and watch your score skyrocket!

40+ Challenging Levels
Progress through four unique collections - Beginner, Intermediate, Expert, and Master. Each collection offers 10 handcrafted puzzles with increasing difficulty. Can you complete them all?

Daily Challenges
Test your skills with a new puzzle every day! Compete against players worldwide on the daily leaderboard and prove you're the best puzzle solver.

Endless Mode
Play without limits in endless mode. How high can you score? Challenge yourself to reach new milestones and unlock achievements.

Power-Ups & Boosters
Use strategic power-ups to overcome tough situations:
- Undo: Take back your last move
- Hammer: Remove any tile from the board
- Shuffle: Rearrange all tiles for new opportunities

Global Leaderboards
Compete with players around the world. Climb the rankings and become the ultimate merge puzzle champion!

Quest System
Complete daily and lifetime quests to earn coins and unlock rewards. Track your progress and achievements as you master the game.

WHY PLAYERS LOVE MERGE PUZZLE:

- Easy to learn, challenging to master
- No time pressure - play at your own pace
- Beautiful graphics and smooth animations
- Relaxing yet engaging gameplay
- Works offline - play anywhere, anytime
- Regular updates with new content

Perfect for puzzle lovers, number game enthusiasts, and anyone who enjoys brain training games. Whether you have a few minutes or a few hours, Merge Puzzle delivers satisfying gameplay every session.
instructions:
HOW TO PLAY MERGE PUZZLE - 2048 BLOCKS

BASIC GAMEPLAY:

1. TAP TO SELECT
Tap any numbered tile on the board. All connected tiles with the same number will be highlighted. Tiles connect horizontally, vertically, and diagonally.

2. MERGE TILES
Tap again to merge all highlighted tiles into one. The merged tile appears at your tap location with a higher value. The more tiles you connect, the higher the resulting number!

3. SCORE POINTS
Each merge earns points based on the tiles merged. Create bigger combinations for massive scores. Chain reactions happen automatically when new merge opportunities appear after tiles fall.

4. REACH THE GOAL
In level mode, reach the target tile value (shown at the top) before running out of moves. In endless mode, keep merging and try to achieve the highest score possible.


MERGE FORMULA:

The game uses a special merge formula that rewards connecting more tiles:
- 2 tiles: Value doubles (2+2 = 4)
- 3-4 tiles: Value quadruples (2+2+2 = 8)
- 5-6 tiles: Value multiplies by 8 (2+2+2+2+2 = 16)
- 7+ tiles: Even bigger multipliers!

Tip: Always look for the largest groups of matching tiles for maximum points!


GAME MODES:

Level Mode
- Complete 40 levels across 4 collections
- Each level has a target tile and limited moves
- Progress unlocks new challenges

Endless Mode
- No move limit - play until the board fills up
- Try to reach the highest tile possible
- Compete on global leaderboards

Daily Challenge
- New puzzle every day for all players
- Same puzzle worldwide - compare your skills
- Special daily leaderboard


POWER-UPS:

UNDO (50 coins)
Made a mistake? Undo your last move and try a different strategy.

HAMMER (50 coins)
Remove any single tile from the board. Great for clearing blockers or setting up big merges.

SHUFFLE (50 coins)
Rearrange all tiles randomly. Use when no good moves are available.


TIPS FOR HIGH SCORES:

1. Plan Ahead
Look at the entire board before making a move. Find the largest possible group of matching tiles.

2. Work from the Bottom
Focus on merging tiles at the bottom of the board. This creates space for new tiles to fall and potentially form chains.

3. Create Chain Reactions
Position tiles so that after one merge, falling tiles create new matching groups automatically.

4. Save Power-Ups
Don't use power-ups too early. Save them for difficult situations in later levels.

5. Connect Diagonals
Remember tiles connect diagonally too! Look for diagonal chains that other players might miss.

6. Build Big Numbers
Higher value tiles are harder to match but worth more points. Try to build toward the corners where they won't block other merges.

title: Square Crusher
description:
Get ready for a fun and satisfying cube-crushing puzzle experience in SQUARE CRUSHER!
In this game, you need to tap on unlocked fill cubes or boxes only. When you tap a cube or box, it falls into the crusher. The crusher breaks it and generates colorful balls. These balls fall onto the board and move toward the conveyor belt if there is space. Your main goal is to match the crushed balls with the correct front crates. When the balls pass near the crates, matching balls will automatically go inside the correct crate. Once a crate is full, the next crate in the queue moves forward. But be careful! Do not blindly tap on unlocked cubes or boxes. If you tap without planning, the generated balls may not match with the front crates. This can fill the conveyor belt quickly and create no space for new balls. Fill all crates, clear all boxes, and complete the level before the conveyor belt gets full!
instructions:
-Tap on full cube or box.
-The tapped cube or box will fall down into the crusher.
-The crusher will crush it and generate balls.
-The balls will fall onto the board.
-If there is space, the balls will move onto the conveyor belt.
-When balls pass near the front crates, matching balls will automatically go inside the correct crate.
-If a crate becomes full, the next crate in the queue will move forward.
-Your goal is to fill all crates and finish all boxes to win the level.
-Think before you tap! If you blindly tap cubes or boxes, the crushed balls may not match with the current front crates.
-If the conveyor belt becomes full and no ball can match with the front crates, the game will be over.

title: Laser Survivor
description:
Laser Survivor, a cyberpunk roguelike action-adventure set in a neon-drenched post-apocalypse, the last hope for humanity rests in the hands of five heroes fighting hordes of demons pouring through a dimensional rift. Featuring pixel art visuals, randomized weapons, chiptune soundtracks, and relentless survival gameplay, every run is a test of adaptation and skill.

Story
The world has fallen. A dimensional rift has unleashed an unstoppable flood of demons, tearing through what remains of civilization. But from the chaos, five warriors rise. Each wielding unique powers forged for survival in this cyberpunk hellscape. Dropped at random into corrupted maps, they must adapt with whatever weapons and passive abilities they find, carving their path through waves of enemies, unlocking upgrades, and uncovering the truth behind the rift. The fate of Earth depends on them.

Heroes
Blaze: Fires homing bullets that lock onto the nearest enemy, ensuring no demon can escape.
Neon: Projects a protective energy shield that damages anything foolish enough to get close.
Hunter: Drops explosives that create deadly zones, controlling the battlefield with traps.
Slash: Slices enemies apart with razor-sharp horizontal cuts that pierce entire hordes.
Jaxx: A cyber-brute with massive, scaling area damage, crushing everything in his path.


Features
Cyberpunk Roguelike Gameplay: Every run is unique, with randomized spawn points, weapons, and abilities.
5 Maps to Conquer: Battle through the Lab, Forest, Crypt, Factory, and Dungeon, each swarming with demon hordes.
10 Active Weapons & 10 Passive Abilities: Build your arsenal on the fly as you adapt to randomized loadouts.
8 Missions & 11 Upgrades: Progress through challenging missions, earn permanent upgrades, and unlock new survival tactics.
Collectibles & Lore: Discover secrets that reveal the origins of the rift and the story behind the invasion.
Retro Pixel Art: Neon-infused visuals with hand-crafted pixel art and gameplay by the Felicity team.
80s Chiptune Soundtrack: Pulsating tracker music by Drozerix, driving the action with nostalgic energy.

Why Play Laser Survivor?
Fast-paced roguelike survival set in a sci-fi cyberpunk apocalypse.
Play as five unique heroes, each with distinct base abilities and upgrade paths.
Endless replayability with randomized runs and evolving builds.
Perfect for fans of pixel art shooters, bullet-hell roguelikes, and retro-inspired chiptune soundtracks.

Laser Survivor is more than survival. It’s humanity’s last stand in a cyberpunk post-apocalypse. Will you master the chaos, close the rift, and save the world... or be consumed by the demons?

title: Card Sort: Challenge
description:
Card Sort: Challenge is a colorful logic puzzle with card sorting, tricky obstacles, boosters, daily rewards, achievements, and customization.

Core Gameplay & Story

Q: What is the game about? What needs to be done?

A: The game is a puzzle for sorting cards by colors.

Q: What is the unique feature of the game? What can hook players in?

A: Unique graphics, special cards, and obstacles like fog, bombs, chains, and locks.

Mechanics & Progression

Q: How does leveling up work exactly? What needs to be done to level up faster?

A: To level up faster, players need to complete more levels to earn more coins.

Economy & Customization

Q: What currencies are available and what can they be spent on (regular - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?

A: The game has currencies: gold and diamonds, which can be spent on card colors, themes, and buying boosters.

Q: Are there in-app purchases? What can be bought and what does it affect? Does making a donation speed up game progress?

A: Yes, there are in-app purchases. Players can buy diamonds, but donations do not speed up game progress as actions are limited by levels.

Retention & Engagement

Q: Are there leaderboards? How to access them? What types are there (daily, monthly, all-time, etc.)?

A: The game has daily, monthly, and all-time leaderboards sorted by win rate and number of levels completed.

Q: Is there customization in the game? Can the appearance of the hero be customized, location editor, car tuning, etc.?

A: Yes, in the game, players can change the theme and colors of cards.

Q: Are there daily rewards or something similar that encourages players to return?

A: Yes, the game features a wheel of fortune and daily tasks.

Q: Is it preferable to play with sound to better immerse oneself in the atmosphere, or will there be difficulties in passing without sound?

A: The game has sound, but it is not necessary for progression.
instructions: Your goal is to group matching cards and clear the entire board. Move cards into the right positions, open up new combinations, and always leave yourself enough free space to keep making moves. As levels become more complex, special obstacles such as fog, bombs, chains, and locks change how you approach each puzzle. Think several moves ahead and use your buffer space wisely so you do not trap important cards. If the layout becomes too difficult, use boosters like shuffle or undo to recover and keep progressing through the challenge.

description:

• Relaxing casual gameplay
• Interesting logic challenges

Are you ready to help the sheep escape? Solve farm puzzles and complete all the levels!

[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about and what do you do?

A: It's a casual puzzle game about animals on a farm. Your goal is to help the sheep escape from the farm.

Q: What is the main hook of the game? What makes it stand out to players?

A: It features simple and intuitive sorting mechanics, unique puzzle levels, adorable sheep, and a relaxing farm atmosphere perfect for casual play.

[Mechanics & Progression]

Q: How does the progression system work? What’s the best way to level up faster?

A: Progression is level-based; you can earn extra coins by watching ads after completing a level to speed up your progress.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What types of currency are in the game and what can they be spent on?

A: The game uses coins, which can be spent on boosters to help clear levels as well as various character skins.

Q: Are there in-app purchases? What can you buy and how do they affect the game?

A: Yes, the game features in-app purchases that allow you to buy boosters and coins to assist with your progress.

Q: Does the game offer customization? Can you change the appearance of your character, environments, or vehicles?

A: Yes, you can purchase clothing for the sheep, trail effects for when they run, and different skins for the fields and roads.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Are there leaderboards? How do you climb the ranks and what types are available?

A: Yes, you can climb the leaderboards by completing as many levels as possible.

Q: Is it better to play with sound for immersion, or can the game be played without it?

A: While the music enhances the overall atmosphere and complements the gameplay, it is not required to complete the levels.
instructions:
In front of you is a field full of cute sheep, but there’s a problem — they’re all tangled up! Help the sheep escape the pen and reach the barn. Tap the sheep that have a clear path in a straight line, remove the ones blocking the way, and clear the pen until the field is completely free!

Good luck and have fun!

title: Connect Line
description:
Connect Lines is a puzzle game in which the goal is to rotate line-segments so that together they form a continuous connected path or network i.e. all the lines must join up into one single connected structure.
It is simple in appearance but grows challenging, because you must figure out the correct orientation of each piece so that the network is complete without any breaks.
As the puzzle advances, the arrangement / layout becomes more complex. The number of line-pieces increases, the shapes become more varied, and finding the correct connection scheme becomes harder. You may need to think ahead about how rotating one piece will affect connections with several adjacent pieces. (This is standard for these kinds of puzzles.)
instructions:
Connect all lines into one unified path (or network). Every piece must be connected properly so there are no loose ends.
The board has many small line segments. These might be straight lines, curves, etc. Each segment is oriented in some way.
You can click on a line piece to rotate it. Each click usually rotates the piece by 90° (or possibly another fixed amount) to change its orientation.

title: Durak
description:
Durak is essentially a shedding card game where each player will try to get rid of the cards in their hand first. Durak is quite an enjoyable game that has over the years made a general impact on millions. It is a game that requires critical thinking, which is why it is more popular among people who consider themselves tech-savvy.

The objective of Durak is to play all your cards. The loser in Durak will be the last player with cards in their hand. So, to ensure you do not lose, try to act fast and get rid of your cards as soon as you can.

Durak is the most popular Russian card game. Durak means fool and it refers to the person who loses the game.

A Durak card game is one of the easiest and most fun card games. Players do not need much to get started. You will only need: a poker deck reduced to 36 cards from Ace to 6.

However, this game is quite interesting because there will usually be multiple winners. To ensure you do not lose, try to act fast and get rid of your cards as soon as you can.


Durak might not be a game you are overly familiar with. But in Russia, Durak is by far the most popular card game! It has got a fascinating history and will be sure to make a unique choice if you are looking for something a little different.

Another interesting thing about this game is that it is played with a smaller deck.

Durak is fun and, rather, a unique card game. If you enjoy more strategic card games and are looking for something a little different, why not give Durak a try?
instructions:
Durak is played by 2 to 4 players. Total cards used are 36 cards - Only 6 7 8 9 10 J Q K A of all suits are used.

The deck is shuffled, and each player is dealt with 6 cards. The bottom card of the stock is turned and placed face up on the table. The rest of the pack is then placed on half over the turn-up and at right angles to it, so that it remains visible. The trump suit is drawn as the last card.

The first person to play is the one who holds the lowest trump suit in his hand. The game proceeds in a clockwise direction. The player who started to play acts as an attacker and the player sitting next to him in a clockwise direction acts as a defender.

The player who has the lowest trump card will be the first attacker. If the attack succeeds, the defender loses their turn, and the attack passes to the player on the defender's left. If the attack fails, the defender becomes the next attacker. The attacker opens their turn by playing a card face up on the table as an attacking card. Defender responds to the attack with a defending card. A trump card of any rank beats all cards in the other three suits

To win Durak, you need to play all your cards quickly. Once you have played your cards, you are out of the game and will need to wait for the rest of the players. The last player with cards in their hand loses.

title: ParkOut: Traffic Escape
description:
Ready to solve the ultimate traffic puzzle?

ParkOut: Traffic Escape is a fun, addictive, and colorful 3D puzzle game. The parking lot is completely gridlocked, and it’s up to you to clear the mess! Use your logic and strategy to slide the cars, unblock the path, and guide everyone safely to the exit.

It looks simple, but the puzzles get trickier as you go. Can you untangle the chaos and become the ultimate parking master?

🌟 Key Features:

- Addictive Gameplay: Easy to learn, incredibly hard to put down.

- Vibrant 3D Graphics: Bright, smooth, and deeply satisfying visuals.

- Endless Levels: Hundreds of brain-teasing parking lots to clear.

- Stress-Free: No timers or penalties. Just relax and solve at your own pace!
instructions:
- Swipe to Drive: Tap and swipe a car to move it forward or backward.

- Find the Order: Cars can only move in a straight line. Figure out which car needs to move first to unblock the others.

- Don't Crash: Be careful! Avoid hitting other vehicles, walls, or obstacles.

- Clear the Lot: Guide every single car out of the parking lot to win the level!

title: Pics 2 Word
description: Can you guess the word? Four pictures, one answer! Test your brain with this addictive puzzle game where every image is a clue. From easy words to mind-bending challenges, each level will have you saying "Aha!" Connect the dots between seemingly random images and discover the hidden word that ties them all together. Perfect for quick brain training or hours of puzzling fun!
instructions:
How to Play:

Study the 4 Images - Look at all four pictures carefully. What do they have in common?
Tap Letters - Select letters from the bottom to spell your answer. Letters appear in the answer boxes at the top.
Use Hints - Stuck? Tap the Hint button (costs 40 coins) to reveal a letter. Watch ads to earn more coins!
Remove Mistakes - Use the Back button to remove your last letter, or Clear to start over.
Win Coins - Solve the puzzle correctly to earn 25 coins and advance to the next level. Watch an ad on the win screen to double your reward!

Tips:

Think outside the box - the connection might be surprising
Use hints wisely - you start with 50 coins
Watch ads for bonus coins when you're stuck

Ready to play? Let's see how many you can solve! 🧠✨

title: Escape Tsunami and save Brainrots
description:
Escape Tsunami and save Brainrots! Escape the tsunami, upgrade your base, rescue, and steal Brainrots. Can you catch all the legendary Brainrots?

Are you ready for the wildest race of your life? This exciting game offers an incredible mix of action and collecting! Your main goal is to escape the giant tsunami that's relentlessly pursuing you.

How to play? 🎮
Control your character, accelerate, and collect funny creatures along the way—Brainrots. The more you catch, the more you earn! But be careful: hesitate, and the wave will completely overwhelm you.

Development and leveling up 💪
Earn coins and invest them in upgrades! Level up your Brainrots to make them more profitable. Expand your base by unlocking new slots.

Legendary Goal ✨
Rumors of legendary creatures circulate among the many Brainrots... Will you be the lucky one to solve this mystery? Only the fastest and luckiest will reach the final!

Join the chase, dodge the waves, complete your collection, and become the world champion of "Escape Tsunami and save Brainrots"! 🏆

[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about and what do you do?

A: You must survive a tsunami, rescue brainrots, and upgrade your base.

Q: Is there a storyline?

A: There isn't a formal story, but the objective is clear: escape the tsunami, save brainrots, and improve your base.

Q: What is the game's hook or unique feature?

A: The game features obbies and rare brainrots.

Q: Are there any particularly engaging elements?

A: The game includes rare and funny brainrots.

[Mechanics & Progression]

Q: How does the progression system work?

A: You earn coins from brainrots and invest them to increase your running speed. You can also level up your brainrots to make them more profitable and expand your base by unlocking new slots.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What currencies are available and how are they spent?

A: There are two currencies: money and diamonds. They can be spent on speed boosts, packs, and the battle pass.

Q: Are there in-game purchases?

A: Yes, you can purchase diamonds and a battle pass.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Are there daily rewards to keep players coming back?

A: Yes, logging in every day grants you diamonds, money, or a brainrot.

Q: Is it better to play with sound?

A: The music complements the experience well, but it isn't required to progress through the game.
instructions:
🖥 PC:
• W A S D — forward, backward, and sideways movement
• Mouse — camera rotation and view

📱 Android:
• Touchpad (virtual joystick on the left) — movement
• Right side of the screen — camera control

Catch Brainrots, earn coins, and increase your speed!

title: Tank Craft 2
description: Tank Craft 2 (also known as TankCraft 2: Hell Bosses War) is an exciting 2D action tank battle game with a unique crafting twist. Players build and customize their own tanks by assembling thousands of parts combinations, then engage in fast-paced side-scrolling combat to repel an infernal invasion from hellish bosses emerging from a raging volcano. The core idea revolves around experimentation: craft powerful, personalized war machines through upgrades and part tweaks, then battle waves of corrupted enemy tanks and towering demonic bosses in dynamic arenas filled with lava, rocks, and explosive action. Its standout features include endless build creativity, satisfying progression through levels, cartoonish yet intense visuals with cute tank characters, and the thrill of engineering your way to victory against apocalyptic threats.
instructions:
Build Your Tank and Defeat Hell's Invasion! Step into the role of a master tank engineer in Tank Craft 2 (also known as TankCraft 2: Hell Bosses War), an exciting 2D action tank battle game with a unique crafting twist. Design and customize your ultimate war machine by combining thousands of parts—from hulls and turrets to cannons and tracks—to create a personalized tank balanced for firepower, armor, and speed. Then charge into fast-paced side-scrolling combat to repel waves of corrupted enemy tanks and colossal demonic bosses erupting from a raging volcano. Loot parts from defeated foes, upgrade your build, and evolve your tank to survive increasingly intense battles in explosive, lava-filled arenas.
The main goal is to progress through levels by defeating all enemies and bosses in each stage, gathering resources to craft stronger tanks, and ultimately stopping the hellish invasion to save the tank world. Win by destroying every threat on the battlefield without your tank being destroyed, then advance to tougher challenges and epic boss confrontations.
Desktop Controls (for web/browser versions or similar playstyles):

A / ← (Left Arrow): Move left.
D / → (Right Arrow): Move right.
Spacebar: Shoot / Fire cannon.
Z, X, C (or 1, 2, 3): Activate boosters / special abilities.

Mobile Controls:

Left On-Screen Joystick: Move your tank left/right (and aim adjustments in some setups).
Right On-Screen Fire Button: Tap to shoot your cannon.
Boost / Ability Buttons: Tap icons for special powers, upgrades, or temporary boosts.
Additional taps: Interact with menus for crafting, upgrading, and selecting parts.

title: Bouncy Arrow
description:
Bouncy Arrow is a colorful and satisfying puzzle game where every arrow shot creates a fun bouncing action. Aim carefully, choose the right direction, and pop the colorful orbs with smart timing.

title: TENKYU BALL
description: TENKYU BALL is a 3D casual ball-rolling puzzle game where you must guide a ball through tilting stages to reach the goal. You swipe (or drag) on your screen to tilt the surface on which the ball rests.
The tilt direction determines where the ball rolls.
Control carefully:

Tilt only as much as needed to navigate turns, avoid gaps, and make tricky maneuvers.
Reach the goal:
Each stage has a goal point or exit you must reach. Successfully get the ball there without falling off.
Failure and retry:
If the ball falls, the level ends (you lose) and you’ll need to restart that stage.

title: Sorcerers Refuge
description:
You wake up in a strange living room. There are no doors. Only whispers behind the wall and darkness in the eyes. Welcome to the Sorcerer’s Hideout, a dark adventure with elements of magic, riddles, and quests.
In this confusing and dangerous place, you will find:
What Awaits You
Mysterious corridors, hidden rooms, and sudden traps

Intense dialogues, unexpected outcomes, and choices that affect the story
Battles, puzzles, and ancient Contracts made with powerful forces
You are trapped by a Sorcerer who has subjugated four demons. Will you be able to escape, or will you become another soul in his collection?

Core Gameplay & Story

Q: What is the game about? What do you need to do?
A: It's a horror game where you need to solve a mystery and fight for your life.

Q: Is there a storyline in the game?
A: Yes, it's very intricate, interesting, and complex.

Q: What is the unique feature of the game? What can hook players?
A: The storyline, atmosphere, spells, and interesting mechanics.

Q: Are there bosses in the game and how are they different?
A: There are bosses with increased difficulty and behavior that depends on the player's actions.

Q: Are there any mini-games within the main storyline? For example, match-three puzzles within a strategy game.
A: Yes, there are. Collecting special seals.

Mechanics & Progression

Q: How does leveling up work exactly? What needs to be done to level up faster?
A: Collecting spells related to the storyline.

Economy & Customization

Q: What engaging content elements are there (weapons, vehicles, locations, skills, references to famous franchises, etc.)?
A: Complex mechanics and traps, a well-developed storyline.

Retention & Engagement

Q: Is it preferable to play with sound to better immerse yourself in the atmosphere, or will there be difficulties in passing without sound?
A: It is necessary to play with sound.

Q: Is there a system of achievements (achievements)? What are they and what can you get them for?
A: Yes, they are obtained as quests and tasks are completed.

Desktop
WASD = move

1/2/3/4 = skills

title: Emoji Solitaire
description:
Welcome to Emoji Solitaire, a fresh, captivating puzzle game that beautifully marries the timeless rules of classic solitaire with clever word-association mechanics.
Instead of traditional suits like Hearts and Spades, you deal cards featuring vibrant words and stunning emojis representing categories like Animals, Food, Music, Space, Weather, Sports, and Nature. Your objective is to declutter the playing field by matching and stacking related words onto their dedicated category foundation piles.
Starting with simple piles, the puzzle complexity expands as you unlock new levels, bringing blocker cards, locked cards, and intricate category boards. Perfect for casual gaming sessions, language learners, and puzzle enthusiasts alike, Emoji Solitaire offers a tranquil, deeply satisfying spatial sorting experience.
instructions:
Identify the Categories: Look at the active category foundations sitting at the top of the screen.
Match & Stack: Drag word cards onto foundations matching their theme, or stack matching cards together on the tableau to reveal face-down cards underneath.
Cycle the Deck: When stuck, tap the deck to draw fresh cards into your waste pile. Use open tableau spaces strategically to park cards temporarily.
Clear the Board: Group all keywords into their respective category piles using your limited pool of moves to win the level!

Balls: Spawn manually or let the auto spawner (auto clicker style) do the work.

Spawn new balls.

Increase virtual cash earned per bounce.

Speed up the auto spawner.

title: Sorting Ball Puzzle
description:
As the most relaxing and addictive color sorting game, this ball puzzle is designed to entertain and sharpen your mind at the same time. While sorting the colored balls to fill each bottle with the same color, the relaxation it brings will relieve stress and distract you from your daily worries.

This classic color sorting game is pretty simple to play, but hard to master. Just tap to take a colored ball from one bottle and stack it into another bottle, until all balls of the same color are in the same bottle. However, there are thousands of puzzles of varying difficulty. The more challenging the puzzles you play, the more careful you need to be with each move. Each move cannot be taken lightly, or you may get stuck! This Ball Sort game is definitely the best puzzle game for you to exercise your brain and train your logical thinking.
instructions:
Tap any bottle to pick up the top ball, then tap another bottle to move the ball into it.
You can only stack the ball into a bottle with the same color ball on top and enough space.
When balls of the same color are sorted into a single bottle, you win!
Each bottle can only be placed with 4 balls.
Use "Undo" to go back to previous steps.
Add an extra bottle if you get stuck.
You can restart the current level at any time.

Main Objective and Winning Method:
The primary goal is to defeat your opponent by colliding your vehicle into theirs to dislodge the driver's helmet. Each successful knockout scores you a point (winning the round). The first player to score 5 points wins the match. Use arena physics, loops, and daring maneuvers to line up devastating hits while avoiding getting smashed yourself!
Desktop Controls (via emulator):
Spacebar: Hold to accelerate/gas forward (release to slow down; physics handle direction and flips).
Mobile Controls:
On-Screen Gas Pedal (bottom right): Hold to accelerate forward and power your vehicle (the car drives based on its orientation and physics—master timing to flip, bounce, and attack!).

title: Card Quest: 10 Minute Adventure
description: Dudes, this is a very short strategic card battle game that blends tactical gameplay with quirky humor and vibrant creativity. Build powerful armies, summon creatures, cast spells, and construct buildings across unique terrains in epic turn-based battles. What sets this game apart is its dynamic terrain system—each battlefield zone corresponds to specific card types, favoring attackers, healers, defenders, or versatile "special units" that can be placed anywhere! With customizable decks and deep strategic options, players must outwit their opponents to claim victory. Unlock new cards, upgrade your favorites heroes, and dominate the battlefield in this thrilling clash of wits and strategy. Let's go. In and out. After all, this is Card Quest: 10 Minute Adventure!
instructions:
• Deck Building: Before starting a match, create your deck using cards you’ve collected. Customize your deck based on strategy—focus on attack-heavy units, healing abilities, or powerful spells. 
• Terrain Zones: At the start of the game, choose which terrains to place on your side of the board. Each terrain type allows only certain creatures to be summoned there, except Rainbow Creatures, which are flexible. Terrain types:
- Cornfields: Strong attackers.
- Sandlands: Defensive powerhouses.
- Blue Plains: Balanced but unpredictable.
- Candy Kingdom: Weak but great at healing allies.
- Useless Swamp: Special ability users or direct-damage dealers.
• Turn-Based Mechanics: On your turn, draw cards, spend resources (Magic Points), and deploy creatures, buildings, or spells onto the field. Attack enemy creatures or target their towers directly when possible. 
• Winning Conditions: Outlast your opponent by maintaining stronger forces, controlling key areas, and dealing consistent damage.

Perfect For:

✅ Quick gaming sessions (flip during coffee breaks!)
✅ Long gaming sessions (you won't be able to stop!)
✅ Casual players who love merge games
✅ Strategy fans who enjoy optimizing
✅ Anyone who's ever flipped a coin and felt that RUSH

The Ultimate Question:
Can you unlock all 20+ tiers? Can you become the ultimate Flippin' Coins champion? There's only one way to find out...
instructions:
TAP/CLICK = FLIP 🪙

Tap any coin on the board to flip it
75% chance to WIN and earn money! 💰
25% chance to MISS (but don't worry - try again!)
Higher tier coins = MORE money per successful flip

Example:

Tier 1 coin wins = +$1
Tier 5 coin wins = +$5
Tier 10 coin wins = +$10

DRAG = MERGE 🔄

Drag one coin onto another of the SAME tier
They combine into the next tier!
Creates a more valuable coin

Example:

Tier 1 + Tier 1 = Tier 2 ✨
Tier 2 + Tier 2 = Tier 4 ✨

A parkour and survival game where you, as a sausage, must compete for survival.

Core Gameplay & Story
