title: Makeover Mayhem
description: A head-to-head ASMR cleaning duel. You and a rival race to scrub five grimy items back to a sparkling shine — scrape, spray, scrub, and squeegee your way through each one and finish all five before they do (or before the 4-minute timer runs out).
instructions:
How to play
Scrub the grime — Drag across the dirty item to wipe away grime and reveal the cleaner layer underneath.

Use the right tool — Each stage gives you a new tool in order: scraper → foam spray → scrub brush → squeegee.

Complete each stage — Clear enough grime (about 90% of the dirty area) and the stage finishes on its own; the next tool unlocks.

Clean all five items — Work through every stage on all five items in a match: rug, sneaker, trophy, teapot, and watch.

Beat your rival — Clean all five items before your rival does to win. If time runs out, whoever finished more items (or made more overall progress) wins.

title: Drift Idle Drift Earn Upgrade
description: Drift Idle is a chill arcade drift game where your car drives itself — you just lean into the corners. Slide sideways to rack up combos up to 10× and turn drift into a money printer, then sink the cash into three upgrade lanes: Income, Speed, and Drift. Earn enough and you'll trade your starter for sleeker rides — Boss, Blacklist, Fallout, Cairo, and the elusive Midnight — each one drifting harder and paying out fatter than the last. instructions: Drag the steering wheel at the bottom of the screen left or right to drift the car — the harder the angle, the bigger the payout. Tap the upgrade cards on the left to level up your Income, Speed, and Drift stats, and open the garage button to swap cars or change your look. Watch a quick ad whenever you see the gold "+500 COINS" or blue "2× COINS · 3 MIN" button for a free boost, or grab the cooler colours and skip an upgrade cost the same way.

title: Zombie Merge
description:
A top-down survival duel. You’re pinned at the center of the arena while a horde of zombies pours in from the edges. Your rival survivor is doing the same on their side of the match — you’re racing to outscore them before the 90-second clock runs out.

The twist is the merge mechanic: killing a zombie doesn’t always remove it from the field. Below max tier, it fuses into another zombie of the same type, upgrading it into something bigger, slower, tankier, and worth more points. Only the top-tier Colossus (Lv 5) dies for good. The better you play, the more dangerous the horde becomes — but also the more points you can farm.
instructions:
How to Play
Goal
Score more points than your rival before time runs out. If your health hits zero, you’re eaten — the rival keeps scoring until the clock ends, and ties go to them.

Controls
You stay fixed in the center — you don’t move around the map.
Your gun auto-fires at zombies inside its forward fire cone (~94° arc).
Click/touch and drag anywhere on screen to swing the gun and aim manually.
Release to return to auto-aim.
Zombies behind you are outside your gun’s cone — they won’t get shot unless you turn toward them, but they can still bite you.

instructions:

title: Color Roll 3D
description:
Experience one of the most addictive, color-filled puzzle game — Color Roll 3D! Think you've got a keen eye for details? Ready to challenge your brain? Then this color game is just for you! It's all about color, creativity, and some serious agility!

In Color Roll 3D, you'll need to copy the exact image you're shown, down to the last detail! How? Just by unrolling and arranging the vibrantly colored rolls the puzzle game give you for each level. Sounds easy, right? But wait, there's a catch! You've got to ensure the colors overlap in just the right way to perfectly match the image.

Got the image in your head? Great! Now get to work and let those colorful rolls fly! Just tap each roll and watch as it smoothly moves across your screen, bringing the image to life. But remember, it's all about getting those colors to line up just right!
instructions:
You are given several colored rolls. Each roll is like a ribbon or band that you can tap to start unrolling.
When you tap, the roll moves/unrolls and overlays onto the puzzle area. The goal is that the overlapping colours and their positions match the sample image you’re trying to replicate.
The challenge comes from getting the direction and position of each roll correct. If you unroll a roll the wrong way, or overlay in the wrong spot, the final image will look different from the target.

title: Dead Lands Driver Open World
description:
The world has fallen. Civilization has collapsed. Only empty roads, abandoned military bases, and endless hordes of zombies remain.

Now you are one of the survivors. It no longer matters who you were or where you came from — you must survive in a brutal post-apocalyptic world.

Explore a vast open world filled with deserted cities, military facilities, dark forests, and dangerous places better left unexplored. Choose your vehicle, find weapons, gather resources, and fight to stay alive.

The world will never be the same again.
Now you are part of the zombie apocalypse.

You'll see further instructions in-game.

title: Monsters' Wheels Special
description:
Monsters' Wheels Special is a 2D race game created by Smokoko. In this online game you race with your own monster truck in different stages like the Industrial, Forest, Arctic, Desert and City stage. Ugrade your monster truck so you can stay ahead of the competition and equip it with rockets and other weapons to really crush it.
[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about and what are the objectives?
A: It is a racing platformer where you must navigate obstacles and cross the finish line first, mastering the vehicle's physics to succeed.

Q: What is the game's unique hook and what makes it engaging?
A: The game features an upgrade system, a cool soundtrack, monster trucks, and diverse environments like forests, cities, winter landscapes, industrial zones, and deserts. It also offers multiple modes, including traditional races and time trials.

Q: What are the most engaging content elements?
A: The highlight of the game is the collection of awesome monster trucks and several beautifully designed locations.

[Mechanics & Progression]

Q: How does the progression system work? What is the fastest way to level up?
A: Players need to win levels to accumulate gold, which is spent on vehicle upgrades. You can improve your car's durability, nitro capacity, tires, and engine performance.

Q: Is the total number of levels known?
A: There are 45 levels in the game.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What currencies are available and what can they be spent on?
A: There is gold, which can be used to buy new cars or upgrade existing ones.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Are there daily rewards or similar retention mechanics?
A: Yes, the game features daily rewards to encourage regular play.

Q: Is it better to play with sound on, or are there difficulties playing without it?
A: While not strictly necessary for gameplay, the music and sound effects greatly enhance the overall atmosphere.
instructions:
Desktop: Throttle - up arrow; Brake - down arrow; Lean backwards/forward - left/right arrow
Mobile: Automatic acceleration; Tilt buttons to turn left/right; Nitro button - Nitro

title: 2048 3D: Merge Cubes
description:
Merge the Blocks, Reach 2048, and Conquer the Levels!**

Blocks with numbers from 2 to 2048 drop onto the field. Combine matching blocks to create higher-value ones and score points. But watch out — some blocks are stones, which can’t be merged. Use powerful boosters like bombs and lightning to clear them out.
1. Make the most of your boosters:
2. X2 — doubles the value of any number block
3. Bomb — destroys surrounding blocks

Flash — removes all stones from the field

Don’t let the blocks stack above the top boundary for more than three seconds — or it’s game over!

Complete challenging levels, set high scores in endless mode, and become the ultimate merge master!
instructions: Swipe left or right on an empty area of the screen (or drag with the left mouse button held down) to move the block into position. Release your finger (or let go of the mouse button) to drop the block.

Whether you're playing with friends, family, or challenging opponents online, 4 Color Card Game delivers quick, exciting matches that keep you coming back for more.
instructions: To play 4 color card game on a desktop, use your mouse to interact with the cards. Your hand appears at the bottom of the screen. To play a card, move your cursor over a matching card and left-click it to place it on the discard pile. If no cards match, click the draw pile to get a new card. For Wild cards, click to play, then select a color by clicking the desired color option. When you have one card left, click the “TAP” button to avoid penalties. The game automatically ends your turn after each action.

title: BitBanda
description:
BitBanda is your music studio in your pocket! No instrument skills needed: just tap the sound cards, and cheerful musicians take the stage and start playing together. All the sounds are pre-matched in rhythm and key, so playing badly is impossible. From the very first tap, you create a real track!

Feel like a true DJ: control the volume of each musician, trigger solos, tweak effects (filter, echo, reverb), build your track from scenes, and arrange your mix. Hunt for secret sound combinations — they unlock bonuses and turn the stage into a real party!
instructions:
1. Tap the sound cards at the bottom — musicians will take the stage and play together. Any combination sounds great!
2. Control each musician: adjust the volume with the slider, trigger solo (🎧) or mute (🔉), and remove what you don't need.
3. Tweak the effects — filter, echo, and reverb — to give your track its own sound.
4. Fill the scenes with different sounds, arrange them into a mix, and tap "Track" to hear the whole composition from start to finish.
5. Hunt for 🔮 secret sound combos — they give bonus Notes and launch party mode.
6. Save your track or publish it to the Catalog. Listen to others' work, give likes ❤, and make remixes 🎭.
7. Earn Notes, unlock new musical worlds and accessories, complete the daily challenge, and compete for the title of Champion of the Week!

title: Fix Pizza: Food Sorting
description:
Enjoy a colorful sorting puzzle packed with pizza ingredients. Each pizza is covered with different food items: find the extra ingredients, collect them on matching plates, and restore the correct recipe. Look carefully, because the number of mistakes is limited.

Complete increasingly busy levels, discover new recipes, and sort pizzas filled with unusual ingredient combinations. As you progress, more items appear and the object search becomes more challenging. Use Highlight, clear mistakes, or Shuffle whenever you need help.

This is a relaxing game about sorting, observation, and finding objects, featuring juicy cartoon graphics, short levels, and simple controls. It works equally well for a quick break or a longer puzzle session at your own pace.
instructions:
Study the recipe sheet and inspect all ingredients on the pizza. The recipe shows the food items that must remain. Every other ingredient needs to be removed.

Tap extra ingredients and collect them on the matching plates. Each plate shows which item you need and how many pieces are required. After filling a plate, the next sorting task will appear.

Do not tap ingredients included in the recipe. A wrong choice fills one mistake marker. If all available markers are used, you will need to restart the level.

Helpful abilities:
• Highlight reveals suitable ingredients.
• Mistakes clears filled mistake markers.
• Shuffle rearranges the items on the pizza.

Fill every plate and leave only the recipe ingredients on the pizza to complete the level.

After slapping, you need to escape  avoid obstacles or enemies, and don’t get caught.

instructions:
Playing this block puzzle game is simple yet strategic:

Drag and place the given shapes onto empty cells on the grid.
Complete a full row or column to clear it and earn points.
Place all shapes in the current set to unlock a new set.

Rotate pieces by placing them into the “pocket” to change their orientation.
This format makes the game more flexible than traditional falling block games, rewarding smart placement and long-term planning.

title: CubeGate
description:
Puzzle-platformer inspired by portal-style test chambers. Move through clean sci-fi rooms, pick up glowing cubes and place them on pressure plates to power doors, bridges, and elevators. Every room is a mini-logic task: sometimes one cube isn’t enough, sometimes the order matters, and sometimes you’ll have to jump first, then power the gate.

Use your movement and your head: combine precise jumps with smart cube placement, watch where the cables go, and follow the energy lines to the exit. Short levels, clear goals, instant restarts — perfect for quick sessions.
Can you activate every gate and escape the chamber?
instructions:
Goal: place cubes on the marked plates, power the logic gates, and open the doors to the next area. Action order, power distance, and precise jumping matter.

W, A, S, D, Q, Z Arrow Keys — move

E, Left Mouse Button — pick up / put down cube

Space, Right Mouse Button — jump

Shift — sprint

Escape — menu (restart level, sound on/off)

Tips:
Floor markings and highlights will show where to place the cubes.
If you get stuck, open the menu and choose restart, then try a different sequence.
When carrying a cube, plan your route in advance.
For distant platforms, sprint first and jump from the edge.

🥇 BEGINNER'S GUIDE
1️⃣ Click the cookie button!
2️⃣ Upgrade your click earnings!

💎 Open and upgrade all 4 shops!
💎 Make accurate predictions in the Investment system!

🔥 WHY COOKIE TYCOON?
✨ Simple Yet Addictive - Easy to learn!
✨ Constant Progress - Feel the growth!
✨ Strategy + Action - Clicking + investing!
✨ Offline Earnings - True idle experience!

🏅 WHO IS IT FOR?
✅ Idle game lovers

✅ Casual players
✅ Simulation fans
✅ Risk takers
✅ Passive income mechanics seekers

🚀 START NOW!
From a small cookie producer to a giant dessert empire! Every click moves you forward!
💰 Completely Free
📴 Play Offline
🎮 Unlimited Fun

🍪 Build Your Sweet Empire! 🏪💰
instructions:
🍪 COOKIE TYCOON - HOW TO PLAY 🎮
📖 COMPLETE GAMEPLAY GUIDE

🎯 GETTING STARTED
Your First Steps
Welcome to Cookie Tycoon! You start with nothing but a dream and a giant cookie button. Your goal? Build a cookie empire from scratch and become a millionaire!
Step 1: Click the Cookie! 🍪
Tap the giant cookie button in the center of your screen. Each click produces fresh cookies. This is your primary way to earn in the early game!
Step 2: Understand the Currency System 💰

Cookies = Your raw production resource
Money = Your purchasing power (10 Cookies = 1 Dollar)
Convert cookies to money strategically to buy upgrades and automation!


⚙️ CORE GAME MECHANICS
🖱️ CLICKING & UPGRADES
Manual Production:

Click the cookie button repeatedly to earn cookies
Each click gives you a base amount of cookies
Your click power increases as you upgrade!

Upgrade Your Clicking:
Navigate to the Upgrades Menu to:

Increase cookies per click
Unlock multipliers
Boost overall production efficiency

💡 Pro Tip: Invest heavily in click upgrades early - they compound over time!

🤖 AUTOMATION SYSTEM
Stop clicking manually! Purchase auto ovens that produce cookies automatically:
1. Simple Auto Oven (First Purchase)

Your entry-level automation
Produces cookies passively every second
Can be upgraded to increase production speed
Strategy: Buy this as soon as possible!

2. Auto Oven Program (Mid-Game)

Regional production system
Significantly faster than Simple Auto Oven
Multiple upgrade levels available
Strategy: Stack multiple units for exponential growth!

3. Advanced Auto Oven Program (End-Game)

Top-tier automation fleet
Massive passive income generation
Each level dramatically increases output
Strategy: This is your path to becoming a millionaire!

Upgrading Auto Ovens:

Each oven has multiple levels (Level 1, 2, 3, etc.)
Higher levels = more cookies per second
Costs increase with each level
Balance purchases between new ovens and upgrading existing ones


🏪 SHOP SYSTEM
Build your cookie empire with 4 different shops!
How Shops Work:

Each shop has a rotating progress bar on top
The bar fills up over time (duration varies by shop level)
When the bar completes, money is added to your account
The bar immediately resets and starts filling again
Shops earn money even when the game is closed! 📴

The 4 Shops:
🏪 Shop 1 - Starter Bakery

Your first shop
Moderate earning rate
Low cost to unlock and upgrade
Best for: Early game foundation

🏪 Shop 2 - Cookie House

Mid-level establishment
Better earnings than Shop 1
Requires significant investment
Best for: Accelerating mid-game progress

🏪 Shop 3 - Advanced Dessert Shop

High-tier production facility
Excellent passive income
Expensive but worth it
Best for: Late-game scaling

🏪 Shop 4 - Ultra-Modern Cookie Complex

Ultimate money-making machine
Massive passive earnings
Very expensive to unlock and upgrade
Best for: Becoming a true tycoon!

Shop Upgrade Strategy:

Each shop can be upgraded multiple times
Higher levels = faster bar filling = more money
Balance unlocking new shops vs. upgrading existing ones
Tip: Sometimes upgrading Shop 1 three times is better than unlocking Shop 2 once!


📈 INVESTMENT SYSTEM - HIGH RISK, HIGH REWARD! 🔥
Ready to gamble? The investment system lets you multiply your money... or lose it!
How It Works:
1. Real Candlestick Charts

You'll see a live chart with green and red candles
Green candles = price going UP 📈
Red candles = price going DOWN 📉
Each investment round lasts 15 seconds

2. Place Your Bet

Decide how much money to invest
Choose BUY (if you think price will rise) or SELL (if you think price will fall)
Wait 15 seconds for the result

3. Win or Lose

✅ Correct prediction: Your investment DOUBLES! 💰💰
❌ Wrong prediction: You LOSE your investment! 💸

Investment Strategies:
Conservative Approach:

Only invest 10-20% of your total money
Study the chart patterns before betting
Wait for clear trends (3+ green or red candles)

Aggressive Approach:

Invest large amounts for massive gains
Higher risk = higher reward
Best when you have substantial backup funds

Pattern Recognition:

Look for consecutive green/red candles
Consider recent trends
Remember: markets can reverse suddenly!

💡 Warning: Never invest money you need for essential upgrades! Only gamble with surplus funds.

📊 PROGRESSION SYSTEM
Early Game (0-1,000 Cookies)
Focus: Manual clicking + first upgrades

Click the cookie button constantly
Buy your first click upgrades
Purchase Simple Auto Oven as soon as possible
Convert cookies to money strategically
Goal: Unlock Shop 1

Mid Game (1,000-100,000 Cookies)
Focus: Automation + multiple shops

Upgrade your auto ovens
Purchase Auto Oven Program
Unlock and upgrade Shop 2
Start experimenting with small investments
Goal: Build passive income foundation

Late Game (100,000+ Cookies)
Focus: Empire expansion + investments

Max out Advanced Auto Oven Program
Unlock Shop 3 and Shop 4
Make strategic investments
Optimize shop upgrades
Goal: Achieve millionaire status!

End Game (Millionaire!)
Focus: Maximization

Max level all shops
Max level all auto ovens
Master the investment system
Watch your cityline expand across the screen!
Goal: True cookie tycoon!


🏆 ACHIEVEMENTS SYSTEM
Track your progress through various milestones:

Total cookies produced
Total money earned
Shops unlocked
Maximum investment win
Days played
And many more!

Check your stats in the Achievements panel to see how far you've come!

💡 ADVANCED STRATEGIES
The Balanced Approach

50% investment in automation (auto ovens)
30% investment in shops
20% investment in click upgrades
Result: Steady, reliable growth

The Clicker Strategy

Heavy investment in click upgrades early
Manual clicking focus
Slower automation adoption
Result: Active gameplay, faster early growth

The Passive Strategy

Rush automation purchases
Minimal clicking after early game
Heavy shop investment
Result: Offline earnings, slower start but powerful late game

The Gambler Strategy

Minimum viable automation
Maximum investment system usage
High risk, high reward
Result: Either rapid wealth or bankruptcy!


🎓 TUTORIAL SYSTEM
Interactive Learning:

Built-in tutorial explains each system
Can be opened/closed anytime
Each feature explained separately
No forced tutorials - learn at your own pace!

Tutorial Sections:

Cookie Clicking Basics
Upgrade System
Auto Oven Automation
Shop Management
Investment System
Achievement Tracking


📴 OFFLINE EARNINGS
Keep earning while away!

Auto ovens continue producing
Shops keep filling their bars
When you return, collect all offline earnings
Maximum offline time: unlimited!

Offline Optimization:

Prioritize auto ovens before long breaks
Upgrade shops for maximum offline money
Don't rely on clicking (you won't be there!)


🌍 LANGUAGE & ACCESSIBILITY
Play in your native language! Choose from:
🇬🇧 English | 🇷🇺 Russian | 🇫🇷 French | 🇹🇷 Turkish | 🇪🇸 Spanish | 🇩🇪 German | 🇮🇹 Italian | 🇵🇹 Portuguese | 🇦🇿 Azerbaijani | 🇳🇱 Dutch | 🇵🇱 Polish | 🇺🇦 Ukrainian | 🇻🇳 Vietnamese | 🇺🇿 Uzbek | 🇮🇩 Indonesian | 🇰🇿 Kazakh

🎮 FINAL TIPS FOR SUCCESS
✅ Never stop upgrading - There's always something to improve
✅ Balance is key - Don't neglect any system
✅ Patience pays off - Idle games reward consistent play

title: SnakeWar.io
description:
Enter the battlefield in SnakeWarz.IO, a fast-paced multiplayer snake game where survival belongs to the smartest and fastest players. Your mission is simple: grow the longest snake in the arena by eating fruits, defeating rivals, and dominating the leaderboard.

Collect delicious fruits scattered across the map to increase your size and score. The bigger you become, the more dangerous you are. Outsmart enemy snakes, trap them into crashing into your body, and consume the massive fruit drops they leave behind after elimination
instructions:
Grow the longest snake in the arena by eating fruits scattered across the map. Defeat other players by forcing them to crash into your body. When enemies die, they drop huge amounts of fruits. Collect them quickly and keep growing.

Movement & Boost

PC: Move your mouse to control the snake.

Need speed?
PC: Hold Left Click

Boosting makes you faster but reduces your snake’s length. Use it carefully to escape danger or trap enemies.

Growth & Kills

Eat fruits for steady growth.
Eliminate rival snakes for massive rewards.

If another snake’s head touches your body, they are eliminated instantly and explode into fruits. Collect the dropped fruits before other players steal them.

Arena Strategy

Stay near the center for more fruits.
Trap smaller snakes by circling them.
Avoid giant snakes until you grow bigger.
Use boost wisely — too much boosting makes you smaller and vulnerable.
Watch the leaderboard and target distracted players.

Key Features

Multiplayer Arena Combat: Real-time battles. Compete against global players in nonstop sessions.
Customizable Skins: Pumpkin heads. Pirate themes. Pig designs. Tailor your snake's appearance before each match.
Speed Boost Mechanic: Burn length for temporary acceleration. High-risk, high-reward positioning tool.
Nostalgic Snake Gameplay: Classic snake logic meets modern IO-style competition. Top-down 2D perspective. Flat vector graphics. Runs lag-free on any device.
Leaderboard Progression: Infinite climb. Every kill and orb pushes you higher. No download required.

Controls

PC

* Mouse Movement: Move snake
* Left Click: Boost speed

 FAQ

How do I grow in SnakeWarz.IO?

Eat fruits around the arena and collect fruits dropped by defeated snakes.

How do I eliminate other players?

Force enemy snakes to crash into your body.

Does boosting reduce size?

Yes. Boosting consumes part of your snake’s length.

Can I customize my snake?

Yes. Different skins are available before matches.

Is SnakeWarz.IO multiplayer?

Yes. All matches are real-time online multiplayer battles.

title: Sky Golf
description: Sky Golf is a physics-based puzzle game where your objective is to guide a golf ball from a starting point to the hole. The golf ball rests on a complex structure made entirely of flat, interconnected platforms. Your primary mechanism for moving the ball is to rotate the entire platform structure either clockwise or anti-clockwise by set increments. When you rotate the platforms, gravity acts on the ball, causing it to roll across the flat surfaces. You must strategically time and execute these rotations to change the angle of the platforms, build momentum, and perfectly direct the ball across gaps and around obstacles until it safely drops into the goal. Each level challenges your spatial reasoning to find the precise sequence of rotations required for success.

title: Stack Master
description:
Stack master is a minimalistic, endless stacking game where your goal is to build the tower as high as possible by perfectly aligning moving blocks.
The graphics are simple and clean, focusing on smooth gameplay without distractions.
You compete globally for the highest score (tower height) on leaderboards.
instructions:
When you start, a block (or “slice”) begins sliding horizontally across the screen at some height.
You tap the screen (or tap a control) to drop the moving block onto the block beneath it.
The better the alignment with the block below, the more of the block remains. If part of the block overhangs, the overhanging part is cut off.
If you drop with a slight misalignment, the excess portion is cut away and removed, making your next block smaller.
If your misalignment is very poor (i.e. almost no overlap), you might lose the block entirely, ending the game.
Each successful drop continues the tower upward. The goal is to stack as many as possible, reaching the highest possible height (score).
As the tower gets higher, it becomes more challenging. The blocks may move faster or require more precision. (This is common in stacking games of this type.)

title: Spaceball Jump
description:
Spaceball Jump is a thrilling, physics-based arcade game where you must navigate a glowing astronaut ball through a treacherous and beautiful galaxy. Your goal is simple: hop from planet to planet, collect all the golden stars, and unlock the portal to warp to the next sector!

But space is full of dangers. You'll need to time your leaps perfectly to utilize the rotational momentum of the planets while avoiding deadly orbital spikes, giant death stars, and the endless void of space. With 25 levels of increasing difficulty—featuring moving platforms, chaotic planetary clusters, and tight precision jumps—do you have what it takes to conquer the galaxy?


Features

Orbital Physics: Use the spin of the planets to slingshot yourself across space.

Hazards & Collectibles: Dodge spinning spike walls and collect 3 stars in every level to open the escape portal!
instructions:
Features

Orbital Physics: Use the spin of the planets to slingshot yourself across space.

Hazards & Collectibles: Dodge spinning spike walls and collect 3 stars in every level to open the escape portal!

Controls 

Spaceball Jump is designed to be played with a simple, responsive one-button control scheme:

Desktop / PC: * Press the Spacebar or Up Arrow key to jump.

Alternatively, Left-Click anywhere on the game screen.

Mobile / Tablet: * Tap anywhere on your screen to jump.

Pro Tip: Pay close attention to the rotation speed and direction of your current planet—your jump trajectory will be heavily affected by it!

title: Number Sums
description:
Number Sums is a challenging number puzzle to train your mental math. The goal is to make the sum of numbers in each row, column, and colored region be equal to the clues on the side of the board and inside the colored regions. Practice your math skills and logic with Number Sums!

Each row, column, and region has its own solution, but the goal of this math game with numbers is to make them all work at the same time. You have to circle the correct numbers and erase the numbers you don't need. Remember, the sums of the numbers in rows, columns and colored regions should be equal to the numbers on the sides of the board and inside each region. Each level of this numbers game has only one solution, try to find it to solve educational math puzzles!

Mental arithmetic is an invaluable math skill for your everyday life. Inside Number Sums you'll find math puzzles of various difficulty. The mechanics of these math riddles sounds simple but requires a lot of thinking. Playing sum number games and solving math problems can improve your arithmetic skills. If you are interested in number puzzles or math games for adults, and in training your addition skills, play this engaging number game for hours of fun!
instructions:
- Circle the correct numbers that add up to the values on the sides of the rows, columns and regions.
- Use the toggle to switch between circling and erasing modes. It will help you to mark the correct numbers and the extra numbers that you don't need.
- Each level of these math puzzles has only one possible solution, so make sure that the rows, columns and colored regions work together at the same time.
- Train your math skills with this free number puzzle with various levels of difficulty. Open different types of board from 3x3 to 10x10.
tags: puzzle, strategy, number, math, educational, brain, logic, brain-training-games, challenge-games

title: Bubble Shooter Island Quest
description: Bubble Shooter Island Quest is an enchanting bubble shooter puzzle game set in a lush jungle island paradise. Its core concept involves launching colorful bubbles from a pirate bird's cannon to match 3+ of the same color—reds, blues, yellows, and specials like eggs and coins—causing chain reactions to pop clusters and clear encroaching bubble walls before they reach the bottom. Unique elements include a charming red parrot pirate shooter, power-up barrels (rainbow, lightning, ice), gem/coin collection for upgrades, star/trophy goals per level, and tropical vibes with vines and barrels for immersive, relaxing yet addictive play.
instructions:
**Blast the Bubbles Away!**  
**Embark on a tropical adventure in Bubble Shooter Island Quest and clear every bubble cluster from the jungle canopy before they reach the bottom!**  
**In this enchanting bubble shooter puzzle, aim and launch colorful bubbles—reds, blues, yellows, plus specials like eggs and coins—from your pirate parrot's cannon to match 3+ of the same color, triggering chain reactions to pop massive groups. Collect gems/coins for upgrades, hit star/trophy goals (e.g., 0/5 eggs), and conquer levels amid vines and barrels!**

**Desktop Controls:**  
**Mouse Drag/Aim:** Drag to aim the bubble from the cannon.  
**Mouse Click/Release:** Fire the bubble to match and pop.  
**Barrel Buttons:** Click power-ups (🌈 Rainbow, ⚡ Lightning, ❄️ Ice) when available.  
**|| Button:** Pause/Resume.  
**35 Shots:** Manage your limited ammo wisely.

**Mobile Controls:**

title: Doodle Halloween Momo Cat : Sea Magic
description:
I, English:
**🎃 Magic Cat Academy 2 – Underwater Halloween Adventure**

In this fun and spooky *Halloween Doodle* game, you get to play as **Momo**, a brave magical cat who dives deep **under the sea** to protect ocean creatures and stop ghostly trouble! 🌊🐱👻 

After her school adventure in the first game, Momo returns to face a **new challenge** — this time in the ocean! Ghosts have followed her underwater and are hiding in all kinds of sea creatures. Your mission? **Draw magical shapes** to cast spells and send the ghosts away so everything can be peaceful again. 

**✨ What Makes It Exciting**

* You explore **deep sea zones** filled with spooky ghost-infested sea creatures like jellyfish and anglerfish.
* Each ghost shows a **shape above its head** — your job is to draw that shape quickly to cast a spell and defeat it.
* As you go deeper, the challenges get harder but more fun!

**🐾 Why Kids Love It**

* Bright, colorful underwater world 🌈
* Cool characters and cute ghosts 👻
* Easy swipe or mouse drawing to cast magic ✨
* Great for players who like something spellbinding and fun!

II, Russian:
🎃 Magic Cat Academy 2 – Подводное Хэллоуин-приключение

В этой весёлой и немного таинственной игре от Google на Хэллоуин вы играете за Момо — храброго волшебного котёнка, который отправляется в подводный мир, чтобы защитить морских жителей и остановить непослушных призраков! 🌊🐱👻

После событий первой игры Момо снова вступает в бой — только теперь под водой! Призраки спрятались в разных морских существах, и вам нужно помочь Момо прогнать их. Чтобы победить призраков, рисуйте простые фигурки на экране, и котёнок наложит заклинание, чтобы очистить море. ✨

✨ Что делает игру интересной

Вы исследуете глубины океана, где в морских обитателях прячутся призраки — медузы, рыбы-удильщики и другие.

Над каждым призраком появляется символ, и вам нужно быстро нарисовать его, чтобы победить врага.

Чем дальше вы играете, тем веселее и сложнее становится приключение!

🐾 Почему детям нравится эта игра

Красочный подводный мир 🌈

Забавные персонажи и милые призраки 👻

Простое управление — рисуй и побеждай ✨

Отлично подходит для тех, кто любит магию и приключения!
instructions:
I. English:
1, Basic controls & gameplay
To play, you use either your mouse (on desktop) or finger/touch input (on touchscreen) to draw symbols on the screen. 
Each ghost shows one or more symbols above its head; you must draw that symbol (or sequence of symbols) correctly to cast a spell and defeat that ghost. 
Symbols vary — simple lines, shapes like “V” or “ʌ,” maybe a lightning bolt, etc
2. What you need to do & how it plays out.
Ghosts approach; as soon as you see a symbol above them, draw the shape quickly to “zap” them with a spell before they hit Momo. 
As levels progress, ghosts come faster and in greater numbers — the challenge is both speed and accuracy. 
At the end of each stage (or at least the final one), there’s a boss ghost — often requiring drawing a long chain or repeated spells to beat it. 
3. Goal & Scoring
Your goal: survive through all five levels, defeat all ghosts (and bosses), and save the ocean.

II. Russian:
1. Основные элементы управления и игровой процесс
В игре вы рисуете символы на экране мышью (на компьютере) или пальцем/сенсорным вводом (на сенсорном экране).

Над головой каждого призрака отображается один или несколько символов; вам необходимо правильно нарисовать этот символ (или последовательность символов), чтобы наложить заклинание и победить призрака.

Символы могут быть разными — простые линии, фигуры, например, «V» или «ʌ», возможно, молния и т. д.
2. Что нужно делать и как это происходит.
Призраки приближаются; как только вы увидите над ними символ, быстро нарисуйте его, чтобы «убить» их заклинанием, прежде чем они поразят Момо.

По мере прохождения уровней призраки появляются всё быстрее и их становится всё больше — сложность заключается как в скорости, так и в точности.

В конце каждого уровня (или, по крайней мере, последнего) вас ждёт призрак-босс, для победы над которым часто требуется нарисовать длинную цепочку или использовать несколько заклинаний. 
3. Цель и подсчёт очков
Ваша цель: выжить на всех пяти уровнях, победить всех призраков (и боссов) и спасти океан.

title: Logic Storm: Animals Puzzle
description:
Logic Farm: Animal Grid Puzzle is a relaxing yet challenging logic puzzle game where your goal is to place cute animals on a grid following specific rules. With its soft pastel aesthetics and brain-teasing levels, it’s the perfect blend of cozy gaming and mental exercise. Can you find the perfect spot for every animal? Start sorting your farm today!
Key Features
•	Choose Your Pace with Two Modes:
o	Relax Mode: Enjoy a stress-free experience with no lives limit and no time pressure. Simply relax and solve puzzles at your own speed.
o	Challenge Mode: Put your logic to the test! This mode features limited lives (represented by the heart icon) and a time limit, challenging you to solve the farm layout before time runs out.
•	Interactive Tutorial: Easy-to-follow instructions guide you through your first placements, helping you learn to "cross out" cells where animals cannot be placed.
•	Helpful Tools: Use the "Find" or "Hint" features if you get stuck on a tricky arrangement.
•	Challenging Levels: Progress through increasingly difficult grids as you move from Level 1 onwards.
•	Cozy Visuals: Enjoy a clean UI and charming animal icons designed for a pleasant gaming experience.
instructions:
In each level, you are tasked with placing a specific number of animals (such as pigs) onto a color-coded grid. To solve the puzzle, you must satisfy the following logic rules:
•	One Per Row / Column: Each row and column can only contain exactly one animal.
•	Color Regions: Every distinct colored area on the grid must contain exactly one animal.
•	No Neighbors: Animals cannot be placed in adjacent cells (no touching allowed).

title: GeoVex - Daily Geography Challenge
description:
The daily map challenge for flag and geography nerds.

GeoVex is an engaging daily educational puzzle game that puts your world geography knowledge to the test.
In this map-based trivia challenge, you are presented with a series of national flags and must pinpoint their exact location on the globe. 

Play on Easy mode to see country names and map borders, or test your true expertise on Hard mode, with a completely borderless map!
Compete in the 10-round Daily Challenge to build your daily streak and share your score with friends!
instructions:
Your goal is to identify the flag, find the country on the map, place your pin, and rack up the highest score possible!

Controls:
• PC: Click and drag to pan the map, use the mouse wheel to zoom, and left-click to drop your flag pin.
• Mobile: Swipe to pan the map, pinch to zoom, and tap to drop your flag pin.

Once you place your pin, click the "Submit" button to confirm your guess. If your pin lands perfectly inside the correct country, you earn a maximum of 10 points. If you miss, you are awarded partial points based on your distance from the target (5 points within 500km, 3 points within 1000km, and 1 point within 2000km). Complete all rounds to get your final score and share your results with your friends!

title: Towers 505
description:
Demonstrate your strategy of indestructible defense by erecting towers to stop the hordes of monsters trying to break through your line; not only strength is important here, but also intelligence, because each wave of monsters requires new tactics, improvements and the perfect location of towers.
This browser-based tower defense game features a classic 2D top-down perspective with stylized cartoon art. Players defend a winding orange path by strategically placing various defense turrets, such as wooden crossbow towers and stone fortifications, to stop waves of approaching monsters emerging from a dark purple abyss. The core gameplay loop involves spending earned gold coins to build and upgrade structures, periodically clicking to activate magical spells like fireballs and frost blasts to slow down or destroy enemies. Progression is level-based, with ten locked stages visible on the level selection screen. The visual style is bright and vibrant, dominated by a green grassy field, stone walls, and brown autumnal trees, all rendered with thick outlines and flat colors. The UI is comprehensive, displaying a gold coin counter, a kill tally with a skull icon, a health heart indicating ten lives, and an bottom bar with available building or spell buttons. Defensive gameplay is punctuated by varied enemy types including ground-based green slugs and fast-moving white flying monsters. The tone is casual and accessible for all ages, though strategic depth increases with environmental challenges like rain that buffs enemy strength. Losing all ten lives results in a failure screen, prompting the player to retry the stage or return to the main menu.
instructions: Use the buttons on the screen to control, build and upgrade towers, cast spells, and most importantly, don't let the monsters get to the main tower!

title: Rotate Cups
description:
This is a rotation physics puzzle game where you control the angle of cups to try to get the balls to roll into specific cups.
Rotate cups clockwise or counterclockwise as needed to turn the clear cups into ramps guiding the ball down the level.
Place at least one ball in each of the blue cups.
In this game you have to get all the balls into the blue cups lower down the screen.
Larger blue cups can hold more than one ball in them.
If there are multiple smaller blue cups you must get a ball into each of them.
Levels are not timed & you can both rotate as many times as you like & pause as many times as you like.

You can skip intermediary cups. On most levels you typically want to use all the cups on the way down, but if you are struggling to do so you can bump a ball off the outside of a cup or skip a cup entirely & it won’t harm you in the least provided your balls eventually get into the blue cups.
Some levels have a long reach you have to make the ball roll. On those levels sometimes a somewhat rapid cup spin toward the destination is enough, but in some cases you have to do that rapid spin as the starting point & then slightly spin back quickly right as the ball is leaving to give the ball a bit more lift.
instructions:
Desktop:
Use your mouse left click button to select on the screen & drag your mouse to rotate the cups.
Drag left or down to spin clockwise.
Drag right or up to spin counterclockwise.

Touchscreen devices:
Tap the screen with a finger & drag your finger across the screen to rotate cups clockwise or counterclockwise.

title: Cyberpunk Block Puzzle
description:
Cyberpunk Block Puzzle is a stylish logic game set on a neon circuit board. Slide glowing blocks across the grid to
  deliver them to matching colored connectors. Each block moves only along its axis — you'll need to think several moves
   ahead.

  70+ levels with increasing difficulty: walls, ice blocks, and locks on grids from 5×5 to 8×9. Earn chips, climb the
  hacker ranks from Noob to Hack Guru, and take on a fresh daily challenge every day.

  A smart hint system keeps you moving, while neon glow effects and juicy animations reward every move. Easy to start —
  hard to put down.
instructions:
Slide your way through the neon grid! Your goal is to move all glowing blocks into their matching colored connectors on the edges of the board. Plan each move carefully — blocks only slide along one axis and can block each other's path. Clear the entire board to complete the level.

  Desktop Controls:
  - Mouse Click & Drag: Grab a block and slide it along its axis.
  - Release: Drop the block into position.

  Mobile Controls:
  - Touch & Drag: Tap a block and swipe to slide it horizontally or vertically.
  - Release: Lift your finger to drop the block into place.

  Tips:
  - Think ahead — moving one block may open or block the path for another.
  - Stuck? Wait a few seconds and the built-in hint system will highlight your next move.
  - Earn chips by completing levels and climb the hacker ranks from Noob to Hack Guru.
  - Come back daily for a unique new puzzle challenge.

title: Doodle Halloween Momo Cat : Academy
description:
I, English:

Magic Cat Academy is a fun and adorable adventure game where you play as Momo the magic cat, a brave little student with big powers! One spooky night, silly ghosts sneak into her school and steal the magic book. Now it’s up to Momo to save the day!

To help Momo, players draw simple shapes on the screen to cast magic spells and pop the ghosts away. Each level takes you to a new part of the school, like the classroom, cafeteria, and even the rooftop. The ghosts get quicker and trickier, but with fast hands and sharp eyes, you can beat them all!

With cute characters, colorful animations, and easy touch controls, Magic Cat Academy is a safe, exciting, and kid-friendly game that’s perfect for players of all ages.

Help the lovely Momo Magic Cat cast out mischievous spirits by swiping in the shape of the symbols above the ghosts’ heads. And you’d better pounce fast—the ghost that stole the Arcane Magic spellbook is getting away! The school and all arcane magic are depended on your actions.

PURR-ify Ghost and Ghouls with your Arcane Magic. Swipe your magic wand to cast magic and save the Halloween.

II, Russian:

Magic Cat Academy — это весёлая и очаровательная приключенческая игра, в которой вы играете за Момо, волшебную кошечку, отважную маленькую ученицу с огромными способностями! Однажды жуткой ночью глупые призраки пробираются в её школу и крадут волшебную книгу. Теперь Момо предстоит спасти положение!

Чтобы помочь Момо, игроки рисуют на экране простые фигуры, чтобы колдовать и прогонять призраков. Каждый уровень переносит вас в новую часть школы, например, в класс, столовую и даже на крышу. Призраки становятся всё быстрее и хитрее, но с быстрыми руками и острым зрением вы сможете победить их всех!

С милыми персонажами, красочной анимацией и простым сенсорным управлением Magic Cat Academy — безопасная, увлекательная и дружелюбная для детей игра, идеально подходящая для игроков всех возрастов.

Помогите очаровательной волшебной кошечке Момо изгнать злых духов, проводя по символам над головами призраков. И поторопитесь — призрак, укравший книгу заклинаний «Тайная магия», убегает! Школа и вся тайная магия зависят от ваших действий.

Замурлыкайте призраков и упырей своей тайной магией. Взмахните волшебной палочкой, чтобы наложить магию и спасти Хэллоуин.
instructions:
I. English:
1, Basic controls & gameplay
To play, you use either your mouse (on desktop) or finger/touch input (on touchscreen) to draw symbols on the screen. 
Each ghost shows one or more symbols above its head; you must draw that symbol (or sequence of symbols) correctly to cast a spell and defeat that ghost. 
Symbols vary — simple lines, shapes like “V” or “ʌ,” maybe a lightning bolt, etc
2. What you need to do & how it plays out.
Ghosts approach; as soon as you see a symbol above them, draw the shape quickly to “zap” them with a spell before they hit Momo. 
As levels progress, ghosts come faster and in greater numbers — the challenge is both speed and accuracy. 
At the end of each stage (or at least the final one), there’s a boss ghost — often requiring drawing a long chain or repeated spells to beat it. 
3. Goal & Scoring
Your goal: survive through all five levels, defeat all ghosts (and bosses), and reclaim the spellbook.

II. Russian:
1. Основные элементы управления и игровой процесс
В игре вы рисуете символы на экране мышью (на компьютере) или пальцем/сенсорным вводом (на сенсорном экране).

Над головой каждого призрака отображается один или несколько символов; вам необходимо правильно нарисовать этот символ (или последовательность символов), чтобы наложить заклинание и победить призрака.

Символы могут быть разными — простые линии, фигуры, например, «V» или «ʌ», возможно, молния и т. д.
2. Что нужно делать и как это происходит.
Призраки приближаются; как только вы увидите над ними символ, быстро нарисуйте его, чтобы «убить» их заклинанием, прежде чем они поразят Момо.

По мере прохождения уровней призраки появляются всё быстрее и их становится всё больше — сложность заключается как в скорости, так и в точности.

В конце каждого уровня (или, по крайней мере, последнего) вас ждёт призрак-босс, для победы над которым часто требуется нарисовать длинную цепочку или использовать несколько заклинаний. 3. Цель и подсчёт очков
Ваша цель: выжить на всех пяти уровнях, победить всех призраков (и боссов) и вернуть книгу заклинаний.

title: Mega Sweet Fruits - Popper

Welcome to Mega Sweet Fruits - Popper! 🍉💥
Take on 125 exciting levels filled with colorful fruits, plan your moves, and test your skills. 🎯🧩
But be careful! ⚠️🍒 Some fruits hide bombs that can cost you a life. Every move matters! ⏳❤️

When used, a pomegranate clears all fruits on screen, gives you their points, and reduces the required fruit count to win the level! 🍊🔥

title: Animal Merge
description:
Objective: Merge animal bubbles to create upgraded animals and ultimately achieve the final objective by collecting fully developed animals.
Gameplay Instructions:
Launching the Animal Bubbles:
Tap on an animal bubble to select it.
Drag the bubble backward to aim.
Release to launch the bubble in the opposite direction.
Merging Animal Bubbles:
When two identical animal bubbles collide, they merge to create an upgraded version.
Continue merging bubbles of the same type to progress.
Achieving the Objective:
Merge two basic-level animal bubbles to form an intermediate-level animal.
Merge intermediate-level animal bubbles to create the final full-fledged animal.
Once the final animal is created, it is automatically collected as part of the level objective.
Winning the Level:
The level is completed when you have successfully created and collected the required number of final animals.

title: RECOIL
description:
🔫 Recoil

A point-and-shoot platformer where every shot pushes you closer to victory… or straight into death.

Recoil is a point-and-shoot game built around a simple idea: your weapon is also your movement. Each shot launches you through dangerous, handcrafted levels filled with traps, precision jumps, and brutal timing challenges.

Expect unique, fun level designs, instant restarts, and endless deaths as you fight against momentum, physics, and your own reflexes. Frustrating? Absolutely. Satisfying? Even more.

Master recoil, embrace failure, and try again.
instructions:
🎮 How to Play

Move your mouse to rotate the player and aim the gun.
Left Mouse Button to shoot.
Every shot creates a powerful recoil force.
When you shoot, the player is launched in the opposite direction of the bullet.
Use recoil momentum to navigate the level, avoid hazards, and reach the goal.
Master your aim, control your momentum, and use recoil wisely — one bad shot can send you straight to your death.

Join an exhilarating adventure in this creative reinterpretation of the classic game of Mahjong. Discover the world of JuicyJong, where each move demands cleverness and focus!

Swipe a tile to move it in any direction.

- Move tiles around the board, collecting three or more identical symbols in a row. Use special bonuses to help yourself through particularly tough levels.

title: Go Up
description:
Welcome to Go Up, the exciting free mobile game that challenges you to protect the balloon as it rises higher and higher into the sky. Get ready to put your skills to the ultimate test with this amazing balloon game that'll keep you on your toes and your eyes glued to the screen.

Picture this. You have a tiny balloon you need to protect. You need to push away all the pointy and heavy things that get in the way of your balloon going up. But it's not that easy. The sky is full of all kinds of strange things like blocks, beams, and triangles. If your balloon even touches one of these, it's all over. Exciting, right?

But it gets even better! The higher your balloon goes, the harder the game gets. The obstacles become trickier and more difficult to avoid. You can push everything out of the way, but watch out! If you send blocks flying everywhere, you will find it difficult to protect the balloon.
instructions:
You have a “shield” or barrier (often a circular protective plane) that you can move around the balloon to push objects aside.
You swipe or drag on the screen to reposition your shield around the balloon. (While the store page doesn’t explicitly describe the swipe controls, that’s the common mechanic for this kind of game.)
You must time your moves carefully pushing obstacles too late or too aggressively can send them flying in directions that block the balloon again.
The higher you get (the further in the level), the more frequent and more complex obstacles appear.

title: Stonks!
description:
An arcade game about an amoeba with huge evolutionary ambitions and a very questionable plan: keep jumping higher until nature admits it has a point. The goal is simple: cling to platforms, gain height, and avoid finding out exactly how deep the abyss goes. The higher the run, the trickier the stages become: platforms change shape, routes get tighter, and every sloppy jump turns into a scientific experiment with a sad ending.

Collect biomass to boost your jump, unlock new stages of evolution, and use a mid-air jump when ordinary amoeba determination is no longer enough. Every run is a chance to beat your personal record for height, time, and collected biomass.

Stonks! starts fast, pulls you in easily, and keeps reminding you: evolution loves persistence, but gravity is still stronger.
instructions:
Press and hold with your finger or the left mouse button on the game field, pull in a direction, and release to jump. Jump direction and power depend on the length and angle of the movement.

Try to land on platforms and keep moving upward. Collect biomass: it strengthens your jump and helps you reach tougher sections. After unlocking the mid-air jump, you can push the amoeba one extra time while airborne: use it to adjust your trajectory or reach a platform.

title: STAIR BALL
description:
Climb an endless staircase full of danger in Stairs Ball, a fast and minimal arcade game.
You control a small ball running up colorful steps. The path looks simple, but each stair is covered with deadly spikes and tricky gaps. One wrong move and your run is over.

Collect shiny rubies on your way to unlock new balls and styles. Chain “perfect” moves to build huge combos and smash your high score. The higher you climb, the faster and harder it gets it’s all about timing, reflexes, and focus.
instructions:
Touch and hold the screen to move the ball left or right across the stairs.
Release and press again to quickly switch direction.
Your goal is to keep climbing without hitting any spikes.
Each stair can have black cone spikes.
If the ball touches a spike, the run ends instantly.
Read the pattern of spikes and move early, not at the last second.

Ready to save the planet? Then go ahead - Foxy and the raccoon are already waiting for you! ♻️🦝🦊

Combine three identical elements to clear the field.

description: Broomcraft Mystic Evasion is an action game where you take to the skies on a broom, engaging in battles against hordes of enemies! Collect experience points from defeated foes – experience that will help you level up and grow stronger. Explore new spells and evolve the ones you've unlocked to defeat enemies even faster. Face a variety of different enemy types and challenging bosses attempting to halt your progress. Accumulate coins to unlock new, faster, and more agile brooms. Don't forget to upgrade your brooms to achieve maximum power. Combine different magical spells, each associated with its own element, and find your winning strategy! Two distinct game modes are at your disposal: a leveled game mode where you can train, explore new enemies, and, most importantly, conquer bosses; and an endless mode for those seeking to challenge themselves against wave after wave of monsters. Either way, good luck in battle – you'll need it!

To start, go to the miner purchase zone and buy a few miners. They will begin mining gold for you, and you can mine gold alongside them. Once you have accumulated enough gold, go to the warrior purchase zone to build your army.

Left-click = interact with the in-game buttons

title: Jigmerge Puzzles
description:
Rearrange picture fragments, connect matching pieces and restore beautiful images. Relaxing and satisfying puzzles for all ages with endless level variety.

Jigmerge Puzzles is a calm and satisfying puzzle game where you restore images that have been split into shuffled picture tiles. Each level gives you a new photo broken into fragments that you can freely move, swap and connect. Analyze details, match shapes and watch the picture gradually come to life.

The game includes many themes: animals, nature, food, winter, cars, landscapes and more. Every level features a unique image, and the library of pictures grows over time. Tiles automatically “merge” when placed correctly, creating smooth and intuitive gameplay.

Jigmerge Puzzles is perfect for players who enjoy relaxing experiences, visual challenges and the satisfying moment when everything falls into place. You can play endlessly — levels cycle through the theme, and new images are added regularly. A great way to unwind, improve focus and enjoy beautiful visuals.
instructions: Drag tiles to restore the picture. When two matching fragments touch, they automatically merge. Merged groups can be moved as one. Complete the full image to finish the level and unlock the next puzzle.
tags: puzzle, mouse, matching, brain, classic, mobile, iphone-games, casual-games, jigsaw-games, holiday-games, relaxing-games, hyper-casual-games, desktop-games, 1-player-games, high-quality-games, android-games

title: Build My Brainrot
description: Build My Brainrot is a casual puzzle–simulation game where players collect and place colored blocks on a grid to complete quirky “brainrot” characters. Blending light resource management with creative pattern-building, the game’s core idea revolves around filling shapes efficiently while upgrading abilities like speed and inventory. Its charm comes from its simple controls, humorous character designs, and the satisfying progression of turning scattered resources into complete, animated figures.
instructions:
**Complete the Brainrot!** Step into a quirky creative world where your goal is to build hilarious “brainrot” characters by collecting and placing colored blocks onto a grid. In this casual puzzle–simulation game inspired by *Build My Brainrot*, you gather resources scattered around the map and carefully fill the correct tiles to match the character’s shape. Complete the pattern before running out of space, unlock upgrades, and bring each strange creation to life!

**Objective & Win Condition:**
Collect enough colored pieces and correctly place them on the grid to fully complete the character. You win by filling all required tiles accurately before your capacity or available pieces runs out.

**Desktop Controls:**
W / ↑ (Up Arrow): Move upward.
S / ↓ (Down Arrow): Move downward.
A / ← (Left Arrow): Move left.
D / → (Right Arrow): Move right.
E / Left Click: Collect or place blocks.
Shift: Increase movement speed (if unlocked).

**Mobile Controls:**
On-Screen Joystick: Move in all directions.
Tap on Blocks: Collect resources.
Tap on Grid: Place blocks in the correct position.
Upgrade Buttons: Tap to improve speed or inventory size.
tags: puzzle, blocks, casual-games, meme-games, building-games, italian-brainrot

title: Castle Claw
description: Castle Claw is a fast arcade strategy game where every capsule pull changes the battle. title: Dice Merge
description: Roll, merge, and race against time in this fast-paced dice puzzle game. Each roll resets a 10-second timer, and your score is multiplied by the time you have left. Drag and merge matching dice to build higher numbers, use special X dice to destroy others for extra points, and strategize before the clock runs out. Reach higher combos, manage your limited dice count, and aim for the best score before time hits zero.
instructions:
Press Space or click the Roll button to create 2 dice and reset the timer. Merge dice numbers (like 1+5, 3+3, or 2+2+2) to create a 6. When you merge two sixes, you get the X dice, which can destroy any other dice. The higher the dice value destroyed and the more time left on the timer,  the higher your score! You can click the "?" button to check every merge combination.

The timer starts with 10 seconds, and then gets reduced to 5 seconds after 2 minutes.

title: Shadow Stick Ninja
description:
Shadowstick Ninja is a physics puzzle game with a dark, minimalist style. In this game, precision is more important than speed.

You play as a silent shadow ninja with only a few arrows. In each level, enemy ninjas hide behind obstacles and structures, waiting for you to take them out. Your goal is to eliminate every enemy. 

The way you do it is up to you!

Pull back, aim, and release to shoot arrows with the right trajectory. Pick from different arrow types and solve each level your own way:

- Regular arrows for clean, direct hits
- Bomb arrows to cause explosive area damage and break through obstacles
- Balloon arrows that attach to enemies and lift them into the air, exposing them for easier shots

There isn’t just one right answer. You can play smart and efficient, or try out new ideas and experiment as much as you want.

Lift an enemy into the air with balloons. Use lots of bombs just to see what happens. Try odd angles, mix up different moves, or come up with wild solutions.

Every arrow counts. If you run out of ammo, you’ll need to rethink your strategy and give it another shot.

Plan your moves, try bold ideas, and enjoy every physics-based takedown.
instructions:
Desktop Controls:

- Click and drag with your mouse to aim your shot.
- Release the mouse button to fire the arrow.
- Change how far and at what angle you drag to control the power and direction, similar to using a slingshot.

Mobile Controls:

- Tap and drag with your finger to aim your shot.
- Release your finger to fire the arrow.

Arrow Selection:

- Choose your arrow type from the icons at the top left of the screen before you shoot.
- Each arrow type has limited ammo, so pick carefully.
- You can finish levels with any mix of arrows, depending on your strategy.


Objective:

- Take out all enemy ninjas with the arrows you have.

If you run out of arrows before beating the level, try again with a different approach.
tags: strategy, skill, shooting, ragdoll, ninja, physics, brain, archery, destroy-games, arrows-games, timing-games, stickman-shooter, stealth-action

title: Block Puzzle Magic
description: Block Puzzle Magic is a simple yet addictive puzzle game that challenges players to arrange blocks on a grid to clear full rows and columns. It blends relaxing gameplay with a bit of strategy: you can play in a few seconds to refresh your mind, but thinking ahead helps you last longer.
instructions:
You’re given a fixed grid (often 10×10) into which you must place (drag) blocks of various shapes.
You drag block pieces from a preview area and drop them onto the grid. You have to find space where the block fits.
When you completely fill an entire horizontal row or vertical column with blocks, that entire row/column clears out (is removed), and you score points.
You cannot rotate the block pieces — they must be used in the shape presented.
Because the blocks come in various shapes, you need to plan placements intelligently so you don’t block yourself from placing future pieces. The game ends when there is no more space to place any of the current block pieces.
When none of the available block pieces can fit anywhere on the grid, the game ends. Your final score depends on how many rows/columns (and combos) you cleared

title: Zombie Terminator
description: Zombie Terminator is an intense zombie shooting survival game set in a post-apocalyptic city overrun by the undead. You play as one of the last survivors, armed with powerful weapons to fight endless waves of zombies. Combining action shooting, survival gameplay, and strategic movement, the game delivers thrilling combat and nonstop excitement. ↓ (Down Arrow): Move down
← (Left Arrow): Move left
→ (Right Arrow): Move right

title: Fantasy Fish World Mahjong
description: Fantasy Fish World Mahjong is a delightful Mahjong Solitaire puzzle game immersed in a vibrant underwater fantasy realm. Its core concept revolves around matching and removing identical fish-themed tiles—featuring colorful clownfish, angelfish, and other sea creatures—to clear intricate layouts against a pirate shipwreck backdrop with corals and seaweed. Unique elements include adorable aquatic tile designs, intuitive UI with hints, shuffles, and color swaps, plus timed levels for relaxed yet engaging play.
instructions:
**Dive into the Depths!**  
**Plunge into the magical underwater world of Fantasy Fish World Mahjong and become the ultimate tile-matching master by clearing every last fish from the board!**  
**In this captivating Mahjong Solitaire puzzle game, you’ll match pairs of identical colorful sea creatures—like clownfish, angelfish, and more—to dismantle intricate layouts amid pirate shipwrecks, corals, and seaweed. Conquer over 4,000 levels, earn up to 3 stars per level (1 for completing, +1 for no hints, +1 for finishing in time), and unlock endless adventures!**

**Desktop Controls:**  
**Mouse Left Click:** Select a free tile (unblocked on at least one side), then click its identical match to remove the pair.  
**? Button:** Get a hint for available matches.  
**💡 Button:** Shuffle tiles to rearrange the board.  
**🎨 Button:** Activate magic color swap for new tile visuals.  
**↺ Button:** Restart the level.  
**|| Button:** Pause/Resume gameplay.

**Mobile Controls:**  
**Tap Tiles:** Tap a free tile, then tap its identical match to remove them.  
**On-Screen Buttons:** Tap for hint (?), shuffle (💡), magic (🎨), restart (↺), or pause (||).
tags: puzzle, mouse, matching, mahjong, brain, easy, brain-training-games, 1-player-games, tiles-games, mahjong-solitaire-online

"Water Flow: Happy Glass" is a captivating puzzle game based on the laws of physics. Each level is a new riddle where you need to show wit and imagination.

 Draw to Win: Your main power is the pencil. Draw any shapes to direct the water.
 5 Unique Worlds: Complete levels in various themes — from a classic lab to fiery lava and magical realms.

instructions:
1. Draw: Click and drag on the screen to draw a line or shape.
2. Guide: Make sure the water from the faucet reaches the glass unobstructed.

4. Save Ink: The fewer lines you draw, the more stars you'll earn!

title: Numbers Match 2448
description: Numbers Match 2448 is a relaxing and addictive number puzzle game where you match, merge, and build bigger numbers with every move. Place number blocks carefully, create smart combinations, and complete each level’s goal before the board fills up. Easy to start and satisfying to master, it is a great brain teaser for players who enjoy number games, merge puzzles, and 2048-style challenges.
instructions:
Controls

Desktop: Use the mouse to select, drag, and drop number blocks.

Mobile: Tap and drag with your finger to move and place blocks.

Boosters: Tap a booster icon to use it when available.

How to Play

Match number blocks with the same value to merge them into a higher number. Plan your moves carefully to create longer chains, keep free space on the board, and reach the level objective. Use boosters such as swap, shuffle, or bomb when you get stuck. Complete the task to move on to the next level and keep building bigger numbers.

An adaptive difficulty system adjusts to your pace — if you're blazing through levels too quickly, the game will throw a tougher challenge your way. Stuck? Use a hint to automatically place one piece in the right spot.
instructions:
Drag a shape from the panel on the right onto the playing field.

Position it so that it covers empty cells.

Fill every cell on the board to complete the level.

Shapes cannot be rotated or flipped — find the correct spot for each one.

title: Copy the Drawing
description:
An exciting drawing game with hundreds of levels! Look at the example and recreate the drawing on the canvas — the more accurate, the higher your score.

The game features 300 levels across 18 categories: from simple shapes to animals, transport, space, fantasy, and Japanese culture. Every day brings a new drawing of the day — build your streak and compete with yourself!

Three brush sizes, undo last stroke, hints, and a medal system — all designed to make drawing fun and enjoyable. Gold, silver, or bronze — which medal will your drawing earn?
instructions:
1. Choose a category and level
2. Look at the example at the top of the screen
3. Draw the same picture on the canvas below
4. Use three brush sizes for precise lines
5. Tap "Undo" to remove the last stroke, or "Clear" to start over
6. When you're happy with the result, tap "Check"
7. Get a match score and earn a medal: bronze (50%+), silver (70%+), or gold (90%+)
8. Unlock new levels and categories!

title: Elements Craft Ultimate
description: Combine the four basic elements—Fire, Water, Earth, and Wind—to create the universe! Drag and drop items to discover hundreds of unique recipes in this addictive alchemy puzzle game.
instructions:
Main Objective & How to Win
Welcome to the ultimate alchemy experience! Your main objective is to combine basic elements to discover hundreds of unique creations, ranging from simple nature and weather to advanced technology, civilizations, and magic.
You start with just four basic elements: Water, Fire, Earth, and Wind. By experimenting and merging them together (for example, Water + Fire = Steam), you will expand your library of items.
While the main game is an endless journey of discovery, you can "win" and prove your mastery by:
Discovering every element: Unlock the entire catalog of elements.
Completing Quests: Finish daily tasks, standard quests, and global achievements to earn Coins (💸).
Beating Time Mode: Race against the clock to craft a specific target element as fast as possible.
Conquering Quiz Mode: Test your knowledge by correctly guessing which two elements create a specific target.
Tip: Stuck on what to make next? Use your hard-earned Coins to buy a Smart Hint (💡) that will tell you exactly which two items to combine!

Primary Controls
The game is fully optimized for both PC and mobile devices.
Left Click & Hold / Touch & Drag: Drag elements from your inventory onto the board, or drag two elements together on the board to attempt a fusion.
Left Click / Tap (on inventory item): Instantly spawn that element onto the center of the board.
Left Click / Tap: Interact with UI buttons to clear the board, open the inventory, sort items, buy hints, or claim daily rewards.
Escape (Esc) Key: Quickly close any open menus, pop-ups, or the inventory sidebar.
tags: puzzle, brain, crafting, logic, addictive-games, 1-player-games

title: Pixel Conquest
description:
Pixel Conquest is a fast-paced, addictive strategy game where you compete against AI opponents to conquer the most territory. Draw trails to enclose land and claim it as your own, all while your city automatically grows within your borders.

Use clever tactics to cut off and eliminate your rivals. Grab powerful-ups like Speed, Shields, and Bombs to gain an edge and become the last tracer standing!
instructions:
Goal: The goal is to conquer the most territory and be the last player remaining on the grid.

Controls:

Desktop: Use the Arrow Keys to direct your character.


How to conquering Territory:

Move out from your colored territory to draw a trail.
Return to any part of your own territory to complete a loop. The area you've enclosed will be claimed and converted to your color.

Elimination:

You are eliminated if you run into the outer walls or an opponent's established territory.

City Building & Scoring:

As your territory grows, buildings like houses and skyscrapers will automatically be built, generating points for you over time.
Conquering enemy territory, destroying their buildings, and eliminating opponents will also boost your score.

Power-ups:

Occasionally, power-ups will appear on the map. Move over them to collect special abilities for a limited time.
Speed: Move twice as fast.
Shield: Survive one fatal collision.
Ghost: Pass through enemy trails without being eliminated.
Bomb: Instantly claim a large circular area around you.

title: On Fire Basketball Shots
description:
The gym is packed, and the crowd is roaring! The scoreboard's ticking down, and your team is trailing. The only way to win is to sink blazing basketball shots from the court. You're the star player, but the pressure's on—every shot counts, and the hoop's rim is red-hot, making each attempt trickier!
"Core: A highly engaging, physics-based arcade sports simulator centered on precision shooting and high-score chasing.
Loop: Players engage in skill-based shooting mechanics to accumulate points, which convert into hard currency (coins) used for continuous progression and reward loops.
Start: Features instant, intuitive accessibility, ensuring immediate player engagement and a strong hook from the first session.
Playgama Fact: The game is fully integrated with Playgama SDK: instant login and cross-device saves between PC and mobile. HTML5. Stable performance regardless of internet quality.
Visual: Utilizes a clean, contemporary Flat Design aesthetic that ensures visual clarity and broad appeal.
Key Feature: Offers deep player customization through various unlockable ball and environment skins, underpinned by robust, authentic shot physics."
instructions:
Ignite the Hoops and Go On Fire! The crowd is roaring as you chain blazing basketball shots from hoop to sizzling hoop in this addictive arcade thriller. Pull back to launch perfect dunks, build unstoppable streaks, set the ball ablaze for massive multipliers, collect coins and stars, and climb the leaderboards with sky-high scores—every swish counts in this red-hot test of precision and timing!
Main Objective and Winning Method:
The primary goal is to score as many points as possible by chaining consecutive successful basketball shots into moving hoops without missing. Each dunk adds to your score (with perfect swishes earning bonuses), builds your streak, and unlocks 'On Fire' mode for double points and fiery visual effects. The game ends when you miss a shot—survive longer, chain more dunks, and rack up the highest score to top the global leaderboards and earn coins for upgrades!
Desktop Controls (via emulator or browser):
Mouse: Click and hold on the basketball, drag downward to aim and set power (watch the trajectory guide), release to shoot.
Mobile Controls:
Touch Screen: Tap and hold on the basketball hanging in the net, drag your finger downward to adjust aim and strength, then release to launch the shot toward the next hoop.
tags: arcade, sports, skill, basketball, physics, iphone-games, endless-games, touchscreen-games, gravity-games, desktop-games, 1-player-games, timing-games, android-games

title: Farm Business Saga
description:
Farm Business Saga is a captivating farming simulation game where players build and manage their dream farm. Perfect for nature lovers and strategy enthusiasts, this game lets you cultivate crops, raise livestock, produce goods, and expand your agricultural empire.
What makes Farm Business Saga unique?
✅ Addictive gameplay – Manage resources, trade, and grow into a farming tycoon.
✅ Stunning graphics & intuitive controls – A visually pleasing experience for all ages.
✅ Endless customization – Design your farm, village, and factory your way!
Whether you're a casual player or a strategic mastermind, Farm Business Saga offers a relaxing yet challenging farming adventure!
instructions:

title: Idle Crafting Empire Tycoon
description: Embark on a journey to build your own empire in Idle Crafting Empire Tycoon, an engaging online economic simulator that combines elements of resource crafting, empire development, and clicker gameplay. As the ruler of a thriving island, your mission is to explore every corner, uncover precious resources, and craft them into valuable goods. By hiring managers and traders, you can automate tasks and maximize profits, ensuring your empire's success both on the phone and on the computer. instructions:
Idle Crafting Empire Tycoon is an economic simulator, time-killer, combining elements of empire development, resource crafting, and clicker gameplay. Hire managers and traders to handle the daily tasks and bring additional profits to your empire. Upgrade factories with resources and maintain a balance of production for finished goods. Explore the island and uncover all the resources needed to make your empire so great that everyone in this fantastic world will know about it!



• Go through the introductory training, which will explain how the production of goods works, how new regions of the island are opened, and how the process of exploring and discovering new resources works.
• To earn money, produce resources at factories. After production is completed, the finished product can be sold. Improve factories, produce more goods, and earn more profit.
• You need to equip and send expeditions (invest the necessary resources and goods) to open up new regions of the island.
• To discover new resources, go to the research center and purchase the explored resources.
• To obtain additional profit or automate some actions (such as selling finished products), hire managers and traders

title: Zombie Raid
description:
Zombie Raid is a fast-paced survival action game where you must fight off hordes of zombies, complete dangerous missions, and upgrade your gear. The city has been overrun by monsters, and only you can clear the streets and stop the growing threat.

Unlock new characters, buy and upgrade weapons, earn resources, and find the best playstyle for each challenge. You will have access to a wide range of equipment, from bats and crossbows to lightsabers and blasters.

Each new mission becomes harder, and the enemies become more dangerous. Survive, upgrade your loadout, and prove that you can stop the zombie onslaught.

Core Gameplay & Story

Q: What is the game about? What do you need to do?

A: The game is about survival, where you need to fend off waves of zombies.

Q: Is there a storyline in the game?

A: There is no specific storyline, but the goal is clear - fend off zombies, complete dangerous missions, and upgrade your gear.

Q: What is the unique feature of the game? What can hook players in?

A: Good graphics, various missions, and a wide range of melee and ranged weapons.

Q: Are there any currencies in the game and what can they be spent on (regular - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?

A: The game has two currencies: gold and crystals.

Q: How does leveling up work exactly? What needs to be done to level up faster?

A: To level up faster, players need to complete missions, upgrade weapons, enhance their character, increase their level, and watch ads to earn more gold.

Q: What are some engaging content elements (weapons, vehicles, locations, skills, references to famous franchises, etc.)?

A: The game offers a wide selection of weapons and various types of zombies with different characteristics.

Q: Is it preferable to play with sound to immerse oneself better in the atmosphere, or will there be difficulties in gameplay without sound?

A: While the music complements the game well, it is not necessary for gameplay.
instructions:
Complete different types of missions: survival, cleanup, running, clown hunting, and other challenges.
Destroy zombies, unlock and upgrade weapons, and earn gold and crystals.
Buy new equipment, unlock characters, and improve your chances of survival.
Choose the right weapon for each mission and do not let the enemies surround you.

PC controls:
Move left and right using the A and D keys respectively.
