title: Alchemy Elixir of Life
description:
Alchemy: Elixir of Life is an exciting puzzle game in which you can feel like a real creator. Create and find all the elements to save your beloved! Find the elixir of life right now!
Start with four simple elements — fire, water, earth and air — and create everything that exists in the world. Connect the elements, discover new combinations and watch as order is born out of chaos.

Each discovery brings joy, and each new combination brings you closer to solving all the mysteries of the universe.
Use logic, imagination and intuition, because there is no single path in alchemy, only your own.
instructions:
At the beginning, several basic elements are available to you: Water, Land and Air.

Choose the first element (for example, Water).

Select the second element that you want to add to it (for example, Earth). If there is a combination in the game, then a new element will appear (for example, Water + Earth = Mud). A new item is added to the list, and you can combine it further.

Some combinations are obvious (Fire + Water = Steam), while others will require experimentation and logic.

Each open element counts, and you gain a certain level in alchemy, as well as getting closer to victory!

Sometimes the same result can be obtained in different ways — it all depends on your thinking.

Gradually, you will create entire worlds: plants, animals, technology, and even life.

The goal of the game is to discover all the combinations, save your beloved and create the elixir of life!

title: Candy Mahjong 3D
description:
Candy Mahjong 3D is a colorful 3D puzzle experience where you match two identical candy tiles to clear them from the board. Rotate the full scene in 360° to explore every angle and reveal hidden pieces stacked behind others. You can also zoom in and out to control your view, making it easier to spot matches and plan your moves. The goal is simple: clear all tiles by matching pairs, but as levels progress, layouts become more complex and require sharper focus and better positioning.

The core mechanic is straightforward—tap one candy tile, then find and select its identical pair to remove both. Timing and awareness matter, especially when tiles are layered or partially hidden. Smooth controls and a clean 3D design make the experience relaxing yet engaging, whether you're playing for a quick break or a longer session.
instructions:
Mobile: tap to select tiles, swipe to rotate the board freely, and pinch to zoom in or out for better visibility. 
PC: click to select tiles, drag with the mouse to rotate the board in any direction, and use the scroll wheel to zoom in and out.

title: Crazy Bar Brawl
description: Crazy Bar Brawl 🍻🥊 throws you straight into the most chaotic, hilarious, and action-packed bar battles ever! If you’ve ever wondered what would happen if you walked into a bar full of drunk troublemakers 🤪, flying bottles 🍾, wobbling chairs 🪑, and wild characters who can barely stand… well, now you can experience it ALL—safely, virtually, and with maximum comedy! 😂 This is the ultimate game where everything becomes a weapon, every fight becomes a story, and every throw becomes a moment of pure madness 💥. Forget real-life fights—keep things safe and enjoy all the ridiculous action right here in-game! 🎯 Easy to Play, Impossible to Put Down Aim ➡️ Throw ➡️ Smash ➡️ Laugh. That’s it! The controls are super simple, making the game perfect for casual fun, quick sessions, AND long chaotic brawling sprees. title: Battle of Banners
description:
A war of banners on a hexagonal battlefield! In this turn-based medieval strategy you command a squad of knights, claim land, build camps, and shape the front line turn by turn. Every move matters: where to advance, which tile to block, whom to push back, and where to set an ambush by the forest or at a crossing. The winner is the one who expands faster than rivals and destroys their forces.

Play your way: locally on one device with friends, against bots for practice, or online — in duels and multiplayer matches. Maps with varied terrain change the tactics, and every match stays dynamic and fair: only you, your opponent, and your decisions.
instructions:
Full rules — in the <Rules> section.

Quick rules:

Goal — destroy all enemy soldiers and houses.

Turn — each soldier performs one action per turn: move or attack. You can spend gold as much as you want as long as you have enough.

Combat & capture — a soldier acts only on a neighboring tile. An attack = moving onto an enemy tile. If successful, the tile becomes yours. A soldier defeats another soldier if its level is higher; a level 4 soldier can attack any soldier. A house is destroyed immediately by any soldier.

Economy — income: +1 per income tile (in a chain connected to a house) and +2 per house. If you lack gold for upkeep, soldiers die starting with the most expensive.

Как играть
Control on the PC: by arrow buttons, on the smartphone - by swipes and taps on the screen.

Swipe: left/right arrow, tap on the screen to the left/right of the player.
Combo: repeatedly pressing the button in the direction where you want to apply a combo / multiple tap to the left or right of the player.
Sit down: down arrow / swipe down.
Jump: arrow up / swipe up.
Double jump (if available for a specific skin): double arrow up / two swipe up

Uppercut - squat and jump, arrow down and up / swipe down and up;
Attack from above - press the down arrow / swipe down while jumping.

The enemies drop weapons and lives. You can pick them up by tapping/tapping in their direction.

The enemy on the ball and comet can be shot down. The rat in the window can be turned off briefly by throwing a weapon at it.
Levels in the Survival game mode are unlocked as you progress through the main Campaign.

title: Knight Crown Idle
description:
Game Details

What is Knight Crown Idle about?
Knight Crown Idle is a pixel-style idle RPG where you battle monsters, earn gold and experience, and grow stronger with every fight. Upgrade your hero’s abilities and explore new areas filled with challenges.

What’s the main goal in Knight Crown Idle?

title: Orbit Shift
description:
You're locked in orbit around a dying star: two rings, two lanes, one chance. Tap to switch. Don't get hit. How long can you last?

Orbit Shift is a one-tap lane-switching endless space arcade game where reflexes are everything. Comets, shooting stars, and meteors spawn at the top of two concentric rings and spiral clockwise toward your ship. Your only move is shifting between the inner and outer ring — but timing that one move perfectly, over and over, faster and faster, is everything.

Each stage runs exactly one minute and escalates in speed and obstacle density, climaxing in a surge — a short, intense burst of rapid-fire obstacles that acts as a skill gate before the next stage unlocks. Difficulty pulses in waves: pressure builds to each surge, then briefly eases, before the next stage raises the floor. By Stage 5, gaps between hazards shrink to fractions of a second.

Survival time is your score, tracked against your personal best. No checkpoints. Every run starts from zero. You'll have to earn every second.

Cosmetics — trails, ships, and color schemes — unlock through achievements tied to real gameplay stats. All purely visual. No pay-to-win, no randomness. Play anywhere — no download required, instant play on desktop and mobile.

Orbit Shift is an original game handcrafted by cfc, a human game developer.
instructions:
Dodge obstacles. Collect shield crystals. Survive as long as you can.

Tap, click, or press Space to instantly switch your ship between the inner and outer orbital rings. There is no cooldown or animation delay — the switch is immediate. Obstacles spawn at 12 o'clock and rotate clockwise toward your ship at 6 o'clock on both rings. Your job is to read the pattern and keep switching to whichever ring is clear, timing each move to slip through the gaps as they come.

When a hazard is about to hit your ring, the ring itself flares red — a last-second visual danger warning. The best players are already on the safe ring before it lights up, but the flare is there to back you up when you lose track.

**Shield crystals** appear between the two rings. To collect one, you need to time a switch so your ship passes through it. Collect three crystals and your shield activates and lasts until you get hit, protecting you from the next hit before it shatters. A shield can save a great run, so collect crystals whenever it's safe to do so. However, crystals sometimes appear in tight spots between obstacles — if you're still learning the rhythm, it's better to skip a risky crystal than to mistiming the switch and die. Once your timing is sharp, those tight grabs become some of the most rewarding moments in the game.

**Strategy:** Don't react to the obstacle directly in front of you — read two or three ahead and queue your switches as a sequence. Frantic tapping kills runs; clean, deliberate timing carries you deep. Avoid panic-switching; commit to each move and trust the pattern.

**Stages and surges:** Each stage runs exactly 60 seconds and ends in a surge — a dense, fast onslaught where both rings glow red. Survive the surge and the next stage begins, faster than the last, with new obstacle patterns and a new color theme. The difficulty pulses in crescendos rather than climbing in a straight line, giving you a brief recovery window between surges before the pressure builds again.

**Controls:**
- Space bar / Tap / Click: Switch between inner and outer rings
- P: Pause (timer resumes on unpause)
- Tab / First letter: Navigate menus

title: Far Orion: New worlds
description:
The year is 2121. Technology has advanced far beyond the bounds of our wildest fantasies, but great progress demands great sacrifice... 
Explore other worlds in the search for treasure and limitless power! 
Command a team of brave heroes and lead your world to victory!  
Game features: 
- several dozen unique heroes and battle cards 
- dozens of missions on every world 
- no irritating ads 
- PvP arena 
- tower mode 
- clans and clan wars
[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about? What do you need to do?
A: It's an action strategy game where you complete levels (missions) and fight enemies.

Q: Does the game have a storyline?
A: Yes, there is a story. It's a sci-fi setting in the year 2121 with advanced technology, but something went wrong, and the heroes want to save the world.

Q: What is the game's unique selling point? What can hook players?
A: There are many different heroes with an upgrade system, a large number of missions, a PvP arena, a leaderboard, and clan wars. You can also upgrade attack cards.

Q: What are the engaging content elements (weapons, vehicles, locations, skills, references to famous franchises, etc.)?
A: A huge variety of heroes, many different and interesting abilities for these heroes, an engaging story, clear objectives, and simple in-game mechanics.

[Mechanics & Progression]

Q: Are there bosses and how do they differ?
A: There are bosses throughout the storyline, and they differ in design, attack types, and HP amount.

Q: How exactly does progression work? What should you do to level up faster?
A: To level up faster, you need to play well to earn enough in-game currency. The game is easy to play.

Q: Are there mini-games within the main story? For example, 'match-three' puzzles within the strategy game.
A: No.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What are the currencies and what are they spent on (standard - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?
A: Money is spent on upgrading heroes, upgrading cards, and buying hero cards to unlock them.

Q: Are there in-game purchases? What can you buy and what does it affect? Does spending money speed up game progress?
A: Yes, microtransactions will speed up game progress, as you can buy in-game currency with real money and spend that currency on upgrades and cards.

Q: Is there customization in the game? Can you customize a hero's appearance, location editor, vehicle tuning, etc.?
A: You can only upgrade the heroes' levels and abilities, which also changes their appearance.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Are there leaderboards? How do you get on them? What types are there (weekly, monthly, all-time, etc.)?
A: There are various leaderboards depending on the different game modes, as well as a clan leaderboard. You need to play and gain levels.

Q: Are there daily rewards or something similar that encourages the player to return?
A: Yes, logging into the game every day provides various bonuses: cards, chests, and in-game currency.

Q: Is it advisable to play with sound to better immerse yourself in the atmosphere, or will playing without sound cause difficulties?
A: The music is good and complements the game, but it is not essential for completing the game.

Q: Is there an achievement system? What are they and what can you get them for?
A: Achievements are awarded for daily logins, reaching a certain level in a specific mode, and completing certain objectives, such as collecting 6 heroes in total. Rewards include chests, in-game currency, and cards.
instructions:
Gather a squad of heroes and a deck of cards and complete missions. 
Use the money you receive to unlock new heroes and upgrade your cards.  

Which heroes should I take into battle? 
- those that complement each other and are stronger together, like a healer and a tank.  
What cards should I fight with?
- those that can strengthen your squad of heroes, or basic cards for healing and damage to enemies
 How do I earn gold?
- by completing missions and daily quests, and fighting in the tower and the aren

title: Bow Brawls
description:
Bow Brawls – Top-Down Archery Battles!

Enter Bow Brawls, a thrilling archery survival game where you aim with drag controls that feel like a real bow. Pull, release, and strike down endless waves of enemies! Each wave ends with a powerful boss fight, forcing you to master skill and strategy.

Unlock 5 unique bows, 5 armors, and 5 arenas as you progress. Every weapon and battleground adds a new style of play. Face bosses with special abilities and prove your reflexes in intense battles.

Compete with players worldwide through global leaderboards. Show off your best scores and climb to the top to become the ultimate archer.

Perfect for casual players, kids, and competitive gamers, Bow Brawls is easy to pick up yet challenging to master. Endless action, exciting unlocks, and competitive spirit await you.

🎯 Aim true. ⚔ Defeat bosses. 👑 Rule the leaderboard.
Play Bow Brawls now and test your archery skills!
instructions:
How to Play

In Bow Brawls, survive endless waves of enemies using skill and precision. Use the joystick (mobile) or WASD (PC) to move. Aim by pulling the on-screen joystick in the opposite direction of your target—release to shoot arrows like a real bow.

Enemies attack from all directions, including melee fighters and ranged shooters. Every few waves, a boss appears with unique skills like dashing, jumping over you, or launching projectiles—stay alert and adapt!

Defeat bosses to earn gems, which unlock new bows and armors with different abilities. Reach higher scores to unlock new arenas and face tougher challenges.

Your score is based on enemy kills, with each type rewarding different points. Climb the leaderboards by defeating as many enemies as possible. Manage your health bar carefully—you only get one life per run.

Master your aim, survive waves, defeat bosses, and rise as the ultimate archer!

title: Electron dash
description:
Attract. Repel. Survive.

Master the invisible forces of physics in this high speed magnetic arcade game. You do not just run, you glide, slam, and swing using the power of magnetism.

Use the polarity slider to instantly switch your charge between Red and Blue. Repel off walls to launch yourself across the map, or attract toward magnetic pillars to drift around tight corners.

Key Features:
Unique Control System: Master the polarity slider to push and pull your way to victory.

Physics Based Movement: Feel the momentum as you squish into walls and rocket through open spaces.
instructions:
Feel the Pull!
Navigate complex mazes using nothing but the power of attraction and repulsion. Adjust your magnetic charge to fly through the air, dodge traps, and collect coins.

How to Control:
The Slider: This is your steering wheel found at the bottom of the screen.
Slide Left: Activates Negative Charge (Blue).
Slide Right: Activates Positive Charge (Red).
Let Go: Returns to Neutral (Momentum only).

Rules of Physics:
Opposites Attract: Positive pulls you toward Negative.
Likes Repel: Positive pushes you away from Positive. Use this to launch yourself!

Your Mission:

1. Collect all Coins.
2. Reach the Finish Zone safely.
3. Do it before the Timer runs out!

Welcome to your cozy amigurumi workshop! Craft adorable knitted friends with your own hands — from sweet bears and bunnies to fantastical dragons and dinosaurs.

5. Decorating: place the eyes, nose, and mouth on the face, then add blush or a bow

title: Block Puzzle: Prize Mania
description:
A classic block-drop puzzle that transforms into a true collector’s experience!

Drag pieces onto the grid, clear lines, and enjoy satisfying combos. But the real hook? 32 unique collectible items with awesome abilities.
Before each match, you build your loadout: pick up to three items that work together.

One boosts your score, another lets you blast blocks, and a third changes the board rules. Every combination delivers a fresh, highly engaging playstyle.

All items are pulled from the gacha machine. Use a ticket, pull the lever, and feel the thrill as a capsule rolls out and pops open to reveal your newest gear.
instructions:
Build Your Loadout!
Before each match, choose items from your collection. They’re what make every run uniquely powerful and engaging.

Play the Puzzle!
Three shapes appear at the bottom. Drag them onto the board to fill complete rows or columns. Clear more lines in a single move for bigger combos and better rewards. The match ends when no remaining piece can fit.

Activate Item Powers!
Items trigger automatically or can be activated manually. Enjoy everything from simple score boosts to powerful active abilities like bombs, lightning strikes, or even an undo move.

Earn Rewards!
Collect coins after every match (with a daily cap). After a game ends, watch a short ad to double your coins or continue your run.

Spin the Gacha!
Spend tickets in the gacha machine to pull new gear. The more you spin, the closer you get to rare and legendary trophies.

title: Hex Mine 3D
description:
Hex Mine 3D is a relaxing yet strategic puzzle game where every move matters. Explore beautiful spherical hex worlds, clear the correct tiles, and solve carefully designed levels with logic, focus, and precision.
Each level presents a unique hex-tile pattern wrapped around a 3D globe. Your goal is simple: analyze the board, make smart choices, and complete the puzzle without mistakes. As levels progress, the layouts become more challenging with larger patterns, trickier tile placement, and deeper strategy.
Rotate, inspect, and solve each hex puzzle at your own pace. Easy to understand, satisfying to play, and challenging to master.

Features
Unique 3D hex puzzle gameplay
Beautiful globe-style puzzle boards
Carefully designed level-based progression
Simple controls and clean visual style
Increasing difficulty across many handcrafted levels
Relaxing but brain-teasing puzzle experience
Perfect for short play sessions or focused puzzle solving
instructions:
How to Play
Rotate the hex globe, study the tile layout, and choose your moves carefully. Clear the correct hex tiles to complete each level. Think ahead, avoid mistakes, and master every pattern.

title: StickerBall
description:
Stickerball is a fast-paced game where you collect stickers using a ball with unique abilities! Your goal is to collect 180 colorful stickers across 9 levels by completing challenges and activating triggers that change the game’s rules. Each turn, 10 stickers fly onto the field from a purchased pack, but any uncollected ones disappear—act quickly and precisely!

The game shines with 14 dynamic triggers: freeze stickers, double rewards with "x2," turn the ball into a magnet or ghost, activate "disco" mode, or control a dual ball! The more stickers you collect in one turn, the higher your combo and the more coins you earn. Holo-stickers, with their unique designs, grant double the currency!

Play across 12 vibrant, randomly changing fields. Buy sticker packs, upgrade your collection, and strategize by activating triggers at the perfect moment to maximize rewards.
instructions:
How to play:
1. Aiming:
Move your cursor to aim-the arrow on the ball shows the strike direction.

2. Power Charging:
Hold LMB to fill the arrow’s power gauge. Release to launch the ball! Striking too early cancels the shot.

3. Collecting Stickers:
After striking, the ball bounces off walls, collecting stickers, coins, and crystals. The more you gather in one turn, the higher your combo and bonuses!

4. Triggers:
Collect special icons (magnet, x2, freeze, etc.) to power up the ball or alter sticker behavior. For example, "Ghost" lets the ball pass through triggers, while "Double Move" grants a second strike without new stickers appearing.

5. Buying Packs:
Before your first turn, choose a free Level 1 pack. Each pack contains 100 stickers, with 10 appearing per turn.

6. Strategy Tips:
Use "Freeze" or "Bonus" to increase the number of stickers on the field.
Combine triggers like "Magnet" + "x2" for double rewards.
Prioritize Holo-stickers - they grant x2 coins!
tags: arcade, mouse, ball, mobile, collecting-games, timing-games, defold-games-online

title: Loopvival
description:
Loopvival is an atmospheric survival game with elements of roguelite, built around the mechanics of cycles.
You find yourself in a world consumed by Darkness, where the only source of light is a bonfire in the center of the map. Collect resources, boost your fire, unlock new territories, and rebuild ruined ruins to learn the story of a lost world.
Each cycle brings the world back to the beginning, but the campfire's progress and key improvements persist, gradually allowing you to move further into the Darkness. The simple action game, meditative gameplay, and gradual opening of the lore make Loopvival a short but seamless gaming experience.
instructions:
Darkness covered the world. You are his last hope. But for some unknown reason, the loop resets every time. And only one permanent thing in this world is a bonfire.

Your task is to break the cycle and overcome the Darkness.
- Explore the world
- Extract resources
- Rebuild the ruins - the only reminder of the past world
- Fight against the minions of Darkness.

Desctop Controls:
W,A,S,D - Movement
LMB, Space - Attack
E - Interaction
Q - Switch the resource that you add to the ruins.

Mobile Controls:
Left On-Screen Joystick - Movement
A-button - Attack
E-button - Interaction
Q-button - Switch the resource that you add to the ruins.

title: Red-Blue Forge
description:
Red-Blue Forge is a fast reaction arcade game where you rotate core orbs to match incoming embers and survive as long as possible. Start in classic 2-core mode (Red/Blue), then unlock 4-core mode (Red/Blue/Green/Yellow) for higher intensity and a x3 score multiplier. The game features smooth touch/mouse controls, quick sessions, and a “Ready” start gate so each run begins on your command.

Between runs, collected materials feed a persistent Forge Tree progression system. Temper upgrades to improve control, stability, scoring bonuses, and long-run mastery. Every match rewards precision and timing, while long-term progression gives players clear goals and replay value. Ideal for mobile and desktop, Red-Blue Forge combines skill-based gameplay, readable visuals, and satisfying build progression in short, addictive runs.
instructions: Tap/click left or right to rotate your core and match the color of incoming embers before they hit the center. Press Ready to start each run, build score by chaining correct matches, and avoid mismatches that end the session. Earn materials from runs, then spend them in the Forge Tree to unlock upgrades and, later, 4-core mode for all four colors and x3 score.

title: Kinetic Puzzle
description:
Kinetic Puzzle is a block and grid puzzle brain teaser. Blocks slide with momentum until they hit a wall, an obstacle, or another block. Drag them out through edge portals — but only if the order, direction, and dependencies line up.

Master four block types:
- Red simple — slides any direction, exits any portal.
- Yellow constrained — only moves and exits in its arrow direction.
- Blue dependent — locked until its prerequisite block leaves the board.
- Gray obstacle — fixed walls that block momentum.

Features:
- 50++ hand-crafted levels, ramping from gentle slides to multi-step dependency chains
- Slide momentum mechanics — every push counts
- Neo-brutalism art style with chunky tiles and tactile feedback
- No timers, no ads mid-puzzle
- Auto-save progress, undo, and hint support
- Plays great on mobile, tablet, and desktop
- Perfect for puzzle fans who like to think before they move.
instructions:
Goal
Remove every red, yellow, and blue block from the board through the orange edge portals. Gray obstacle blocks stay where they are.
Movement rule
Blocks slide with momentum: they keep going in the swiped direction until they hit a wall, an obstacle, or another block. To exit, line a block up with a portal and slide toward it.

Desktop controls
- Mouse swipe: click and drag a block in a cardinal direction (up / down / left / right), then release. The block slides until it hits something.
- Drag-to-exit: drag a block past the board edge through an aligned portal to remove it.
- Undo / Hint / Restart / Pause: bottom and top HUD buttons.

Mobile / touch controls
- Swipe: touch a block, swipe in a cardinal direction, release. Same momentum rule applies.
- Drag-to-exit: hold a block and drag it past the edge through a portal to remove.
- Tap: HUD buttons (undo, hint, restart, pause) all tap-friendly.
tags: puzzle, arcade, brain, logic, blocks, casual-games, brain-training-games, addictive-games, agility-games, 1-player-games

title: Snake Rush
description:
Get ready to dive into the adrenaline-pumping world of Snake Rush! 🐍 Embark on an electrifying journey through this competitive twist on the classic Snake game. Challenge your survival instincts and strive to outmaneuver your opponents in the ultimate Snake Rush showdown!

With Snake Rush, you'll experience the timeless arcade fun with a fresh, modern flair. Engage in thrilling live events online, where the competition never sleeps! Can you climb to the top of the leaderboard and claim victory in this dynamic mobile adaptation of the arcade sensation?

Snake Rush merges cutting-edge visuals with the iconic gameplay mechanics of the original snake game, delivering an unmatched gaming experience that will keep you hooked for hours on end. Get ready to slither, dodge, and dominate your way to glory in Snake Rush! 🎮

[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about? What do players need to do?
A: Snake Rush is a game where you play as a slithering snake, surviving as long as possible by running into and defeating opponents.

Q: What is the game's unique feature? What will hook players?
A: Great graphics and unique, Indian-themed skins.

Q: What are the engaging content elements (weapons, cars, locations, skills, references to famous franchises, etc.)?
A: The game features unique Indian-style skins and offers a revive option for watching an ad, which gives the player a chance to recover their progress after a mistake.

[Mechanics & Progression]

Q: How exactly does leveling up work? What should players do to level up faster?
A: Cut off as many enemies as possible and complete tasks from the menu.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What currencies are available, and what are they spent on (standard - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?
A: The game has one currency, gold, which can be spent on skins for your snake.

Q: Is there character customization? Can the hero's appearance, location editor, vehicle tuning, etc., be configured?
A: Yes, you can purchase skins.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Is it advisable to play with sound to better immerse oneself in the atmosphere, or will playing without sound make it difficult to progress?
A: The music complements the game and makes it more dynamic, but it is not necessary for completing the game.

title: Lost Adventure
description:
"Survivors of a mid-air crash find themselves in a mysterious land. The pilot, amidst crafting, mining, and solving puzzles, works tirelessly to save passengers stranded on separate islands in the wild grass. Can they conquer the challenges, reunite, and escape the enigmatic realm before the unknown dangers lurking in the wilderness engulf them all?"

Embark on a thrilling adventure after a plane crash strands you in a mysterious, wild land. As the pilot, you must gather resources from wreckage, craft tools, and navigate through the wild grass to rescue scattered passengers on small islands.

Explore ancient ruins, solve puzzles, and mine resources to unlock the secrets of this enigmatic realm. Encounter friendly and hostile creatures, and use your crafted weapons to survive. Communicate with other survivors, separated by streams and dense vegetation, through makeshift signals.

Your journey is a test of resilience and camaraderie. Each crafted item brings you closer to reuniting with your fellow survivors and discovering the way back home. Will you conquer the challenges of the wild grass and unveil the mysteries hidden within, or succumb to the unknown dangers that lurk in the shadows? The choice is yours in this gripping and immersive adventure!

Step into the role of a skilled pilot whose plane has crash-landed on an uncharted island—one that doesn’t exist on any Earth map. In this gripping RPG survival adventure, your mission is clear: find and rescue every passenger, brave the unknown, and uncover the island’s secrets.

Scavenge for resources, battle mysterious threats, and lead your group to safety. Rebuild what’s broken, forge alliances, and piece together a way off the island. Every choice matters, and survival depends on your courage, cunning, and determination.

The key to winning the level is to think about the order of each move to ensure you can line up all the shots successfully.

title: Emoji Memory: Find a Pair
description:

The level will be completed when the player opens all pairs of cards in the playing field.

instructions:

When a player has unfolded two cards, the player is credited with opening one pair of cards if they turn out to be the same. And if the cards turn out to be different, then they will turn back over.

After that, you can open the following cards.

title: Nut Sort: Build the City
description:
Dive into the captivating world of «Nut Sort: Build the City» — a thrilling puzzle game where your task is to bring order to the chaos of nuts and bolts! This isn’t just your classic color-sorting game. Every completed level brings you closer to building the city of your dreams. Solve puzzles, earn nuts, and watch houses and parks rise before your eyes.  

🏙️ **BUILD CITIES**: Complete levels, earn resources, and construct 14 unique cities.  

🧩 **ENGAGING LEVELS**: Thousands of puzzles with varying difficulty will keep you entertained.

💡 **HINTS**: View a level solution or get an extra bolt if you're stuck.

instructions:
🎯 Your goal is to organize all the nuts by color. A level is considered complete when each bolt holds nuts of only one color. 

📜 Simple rules:  To move a nut, first tap the bolt you want to take it from, then tap the bolt you want to place it on.  You can only move the topmost nut from a bolt.  A nut can be placed only on top of another nut of the same color or on any empty bolt. 

🏗️ Victory and building:  For each successfully completed level, you earn valuable nuts as a reward. Use them to construct buildings and develop your city!

💡 In-game help:  If you’re stuck, use a hint or add an extra bolt to the field to make things easier. Good luck!

title: Object 73: Survival Clicker

A post-apocalyptic survival clicker with idle and RPG elements. You awaken inside the underground Jericho Complex as Object 73 — a clone who keeps returning to life after every death. Each new cycle is a chance to uncover the truth behind the Jericho Project.

Explore ruined laboratories, collect resources and fight dangerous enemies including mutants, rogue synthetics and combat drones. Defeated enemies drop materials that can be used to craft weapons, upgrade equipment and survive longer.

Discover multiple locations across the complex such as laboratories, armories, archives and contaminated sectors. Find memory fragments, hidden logs and secret files that slowly reveal the story of Colonel Dmitry Yankovsky.

Craft powerful weapons, upgrade armor and improve your character to defeat elite enemies and story bosses. Your decisions influence the humanity level of the protagonist and change how the story unfolds.

You control Object 73, a clone exploring the underground Jericho Complex. Your goal is to survive, gather resources, upgrade equipment and uncover the truth behind the experiment.

*Combat
Click on enemies to attack them and deal damage. Defeated enemies drop resources, ammo and crafting materials.

*Resources
Collect food, water, materials, caps and ammunition. These resources are used for survival, crafting and buying items in the shop.

*Crafting and Shop
Use collected materials to craft new weapons and armor or buy equipment in the shop. Stronger gear allows you to defeat tougher enemies.


*Story and Choices
Throughout the game you will discover memory fragments and meet different characters. Your choices influence the humanity level of the hero and affect how the story develops.

Upgrade your gear, defeat powerful enemies and uncover the dark secret of Project Jericho.

title: Stellar Shot-Gravity Puzzle
description: Stellar Shot is a physics-based space puzzle where every shot bends to gravity. instructions:

Drag to aim (direction and power), release to shoot, and plan your trajectory around orbiting planets, heavy masses with stronger pull, repulsion fields that push you away, and wormholes that teleport you across the level. Clear each level in as few shots as possible to earn more stars and unlock further missions.

On-screen buttons: Menu, Mute, Retry, Hint.
Mobile Controls:

title: Funny Cubes 2048
description: Discover Funny Cubes 2048, an entertaining twist on the original 2048 game featuring playful physics. Strategically combine cubes to maximize their value, use boosters, and rack up achievements while competing globally. Enjoy free online play across devices and immerse yourself in the fun of merging cubes.
instructions:
The goal of the game is to collect as large a cube as possible.
Throw a cube on the rest to collect the big ones in the genre of 2048.
I.e. if you throw a cube with a face value of 2 on a cube with a face value of 2, then 2 of them will get a cube of 4. I.e. the face value doubles. Nothing happens with cubes with different denominations, so they begin to accumulate and overflow the container, which complicates the game and can lead to a loss. There are also boosters that allow you to sort out a bunch of unassembled cubes, but you need to earn them by trying to collect several cubes at a time.

title: Toxic Arena: Biological Threat
description:
Toxic Arena: Biological Threat is a thrilling action-roguelike "survivors" game where your only goal is to survive in the heart of a global biological catastrophe. You are a fighter trapped on an arena with endless hordes of mutants. Test your nerves and your reaction time!

What awaits you:

Insane Drive: Fight against ever-growing waves of enemies. Every minute on the arena is a new challenge and a test of your tactics.
Deep Mutation System: Choose unique upgrades with each level! Increase damage, fire rate, or unlock abilities like ricochet and armor penetration.
Survivor's Arsenal: Collect weapons of various rarities — from 'Common' to 'Legendary'. The cooler your gun, the less chance the monsters have.
Diverse Locations: Fight your way through gloomy forests, abandoned military bases, and secret laboratories.
Become a legend of the "Toxic Arena: Biological Threat" and top the global leaderboards. Are you ready for the challenge?
instructions:
Survive the harsh conditions of "Toxic Arena: Biological Threat," repelling endless mutant attacks. Collect biological experience, unlock unique mutations, and upgrade your arsenal to last as long as possible and set a new record!

PC Controls:

WASD or Arrow Keys — Move character.
Mouse movement — Aim and look around.
Left Click (LMB) — Fire at enemies.
R Key — Reload (don't forget to watch your magazine!).
Space — Dash for a quick evade or to escape surrounded areas.
Mobile Controls:

Left Joystick — Character movement.
Right Joystick — Aiming and auto-fire.
Reload Button icon — Manual reload.
Tips:

Use Dash to dash through groups of enemies if you get cornered.
Study mutation descriptions: the right combination of skills (synergy) will make you practically invulnerable!
Always stay on the move — a standing target is an easy meal for mutants.

title: Flows
description:
Flows is a cozy logic puzzle about sorting colored liquids between flasks. Tap one flask, then another, to pour the top color — your goal is to leave every flask filled with a single color (or empty).

✨ Features:
• 40 hand-tuned levels with a smooth difficulty curve
• Per-level time leaderboards — race the world for the fastest solve
• Optional hint system (rewarded ad)
• Clean minimalist visuals, calming palette
• Plays in 4 languages: English, Русский, Español, Português
• No accounts, no timers, no pressure — pick up and play

Perfect for short coffee breaks or long focused sessions.
instructions:
Tap a flask, then tap another flask to pour the top-most color into it. You can pour only when the destination flask is empty or its top color matches.

The level is solved when every flask contains a single color or is empty.

🎯 Tips:
• Plan ahead — once a color is buried under another, you must move the top one first
• Use the Hint button (rewarded ad) if you get stuck
• Each level has its own time leaderboard — finish fast to climb the ranks

Controls: Mouse click on desktop, tap on mobile.

title: Mahjong Pirate Plunder Quest
description: Mahjong Pirate Plunder Quest is a tile-matching puzzle game based on classic Mahjong solitaire. Players remove pairs of identical free tiles featuring pirate-themed icons—such as treasure chests, gold coins, parrots, cannons, ships, anchors, and skulls—to clear the board. The core concept revolves around a pirate treasure hunt, where progressing through levels represents a "plunder quest." Its distinctive feature is the immersive pirate theme that replaces traditional Mahjong symbols with vibrant, adventure-inspired graphics, creating a fun and thematic twist on the familiar matching gameplay.
instructions:
Embark on a Pirate Treasure Quest! Set sail as a fearless pirate captain and plunder hidden riches across the Caribbean seas in this addictive Mahjong solitaire adventure. Match pairs of identical free tiles featuring vibrant pirate icons—like treasure chests, gold coins, parrots, cannons, ships, anchors, and skulls—to clear the board and claim your bounty!

Your main goal is to remove all tiles from the board by finding and matching open pairs, earning up to 3 stars per level: 1 for completion, a second for finishing without hints, and a third for beating the time limit. Progress through over 4,000 levels, unlock new backgrounds, and tackle daily challenges to become the ultimate mahjong pirate!

Desktop Controls:  
Left Mouse Click: Select a free tile to match with an identical one.

Mobile Controls:  
Tap on Screen: Touch a free tile to select and match it with an identical one.  
On-Screen Buttons: Tap hint (if needed) or other tools for assistance.

title: Art'N Ball
description:
Art'N Ball is a mix between classic tennis and 3D platform game. The player will travel different locations within the Art’N Ball rolling-out world, skillfully returning his Earth-ball to have it pass walls, art exhibits, photo and puzzle challenges to finally set it free from its enclosed gallery pathway into infinite Space. 

He will experience different levels of complexity as the Earth-ball takes him from countryside or mountainous territories to the inner bowels of the underground, the depths of the seas, past frantic cityscapes towards arty lush landscapes and onto a surprise finish journey in orbit…
instructions:
Play Ball With Art!

The player has to ceaselessly return the ball with his racket in a gallery hallway, which takes twists and turns and narrows or widens as the player changes ambiance, until he meets a Level boss at the end of 3 Acts in order to exit the gallery. He constantly needs to keep an eye on the Earth-ball trajectory to anticipate its return and take it with the most appropriate angle to overcome obstacles and artfully squeeze his way out.
He can maximize his gameplay by catching bonuses, completing image puzzles, taking in-game world screenshots, or lighting exhibits to uncover their art contents, while getting a comfortable view of the outside scenery through large bay windows and enjoying a cosy or rhythmic music atmosphere.
He may also refine his strategy by prioritizing moving the ball forward to finish a level versus finishing puzzles or taking screenshots to earn extra lives and better score and level ranking.
He has to beware of maluses which will slow down his progression, but the good news is that these can actually turn to his advantage, e.g getting a chance to retrieve an extra life (in completing the missing blocks of a puzzle or hitting a final screenshot) or simply getting an easy way out with a downsized racket.

Desktop controls:

Menus:
mouse + click left to access menus/icons

In game:
mouse move: racket control up-down-left-right
click left: launch ball & move forward
P: pause/unpause game

Mobile controls:

Menus:
tap to access menus/icons

In game:
touch & move racket: racket control up-down-left-right
touch move icon: launch ball & move forward


Average time to complete a level using the "Save game" option is about 20 to 30min for beginners. 
"Save game" option allows the user to save the game at every Act end (3 Acts per level, 8 levels) and at every beginning of level ("Load game" to continue to play).
The player will be able to replay all levels which were previously completed (and saved) thanks to the 'Choose game level" menu.

A Training Room is accessible from the main menu. It explains the game principles/mechanics (but only partly to let the player discover by himself), shows an automatic demo and allows the player to test the game before entering Level 1.

title: Jigsolitaire Puzzle
description:
Jigsoltaire - Free Online Jigsaw Puzzle Game

Play Jigsoltaire free online! Solve beautiful jigsaw puzzles, complete daily challenges, unlock collections, and compete on leaderboards. No download required.


Jigsoltaire is a relaxing free-to-play jigsaw puzzle game that brings the classic puzzle experience to your browser. Drag and swap tiles to rebuild beautiful images across multiple themed collections including Classic, Travel, Animals, and Fun categories.

Key Features:
- Daily Puzzles: New puzzle every day with bonus coin rewards
- Multiple Collections: Unlock Classic, Travel, Animals, and Fun puzzle packs
- 7 Difficulty Levels: From Easy (3x3) to Legendary (9x9) - perfect for beginners and experts
- Quest System: Complete challenges to earn coins and track your progress
- Leaderboards: Compete with players worldwide for the highest scores
- Custom Puzzles: Upload your own photos to create personalized puzzles
- Gallery: Save and view all your completed masterpieces
- VIP Mode: Ad-free experience for uninterrupted puzzle enjoyment
- Hint System: Get help when you're stuck
- Multi-language Support: Available in English, Russian, and Turkish

Why Play Jigsoltaire?
- No download or installation required
- Works on desktop and mobile devices
- Relaxing background music and sound effects
- Progress saves automatically
- Free to play with optional purchases

Perfect for puzzle lovers, casual gamers, and anyone looking for a relaxing way to unwind. Challenge your mind, improve your focus, and enjoy hours of puzzle-solving fun!
instructions:
HOW TO PLAY JIGSOLTAIRE

OBJECTIVE:
Rebuild the scrambled image by swapping tiles until all pieces are in their correct positions.

BASIC CONTROLS:
- Drag a tile and drop it onto another tile to swap their positions
- Continue swapping until the complete image is revealed
- The puzzle is solved when all tiles are in the correct order

GAME MODES:

1. Play Level
   - Progress through levels in your current collection
   - Each level increases in difficulty
   - Earn coins and points for completion

2. Daily Puzzle
   - New puzzle available every day
   - Complete for bonus coins (+50)
   - Track your daily streak


DIFFICULTY LEVELS:
- Easy: 3x3 grid (9 pieces)
- Medium: 4x4 grid (16 pieces)
- Hard: 5x5 grid (25 pieces)
- Expert: 6x6 grid (36 pieces)
- Master: 7x7 grid (49 pieces)
- Insane: 8x8 grid (64 pieces)
- Legendary: 9x9 grid (81 pieces)

TIPS FOR SUCCESS:
1. Start with corner and edge pieces
2. Look for distinctive colors or patterns
3. Use the Hint button if you get stuck
4. Take your time - there's no time pressure
5. Complete easier puzzles first to earn hints

FEATURES:
- Hints: Tap the hint button to highlight a correct swap
- Gallery: View all your completed puzzles
- Quests: Complete challenges for bonus rewards
- Collections: Unlock new puzzle packs
- Leaderboard: Compare scores with other players

Enjoy the game!

title: Code Breaker Deluxe
description: Code Breaker Deluxe, developed by PLAYTOUCH, is a digital adaptation of the classic Mastermind code-breaking logic puzzle game, featuring a luxurious wooden aesthetic and intuitive mobile interface. Players must deduce a hidden sequence of 4 colored pegs (from 6 colors: yellow, green, red, white, blue, pink) through iterative guesses, receiving feedback via key pegs—black/white indicators for correct position/color but wrong position (as shown in the screenshot: first guess with one white peg confirmed by green checkmark)—under timed pressure with limited attempts, blending nostalgic deduction with modern single-player challenges, hints (lightbulb), shop, restart, and leaderboards for endless replayability.
instructions:
Crack the Code! Step into the role of a master codebreaker in Code Breaker Deluxe, the digital adaptation of the classic Mastermind puzzle developed by PLAYTOUCH. Your goal is to deduce the hidden sequence of 4 colored pegs (from 6 colors: yellow, green, red, white, blue, pink) using logic and iterative guesses under timed pressure with limited attempts (3 diamonds remaining)—win by cracking the code in as few guesses as possible to earn high scores on leaderboards!

**Desktop Controls:**  
Mouse: Click and drag colored pegs from the bottom row into the guess slots (row 1 shown in screenshot).  
Green Check Button: Click to submit guess and receive black/white key peg feedback.

**Mobile Controls:**  
Tap: Select and place colored pegs from the bottom row into the 4 guess slots.  
Green Check Button: Tap to confirm and submit your guess for feedback (as shown with first guess and one white peg).  
Lightbulb: Tap for hints.  
Restart (Loop Icon): Tap to reset the puzzle.

"[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about? What do you need to do?
A: In the game, you need to sort wooden hexes into trays at a factory.

Q: Is there a storyline in the game?
A: There is no strict storyline, but the goal is clear: you must sort the hexes into trays while managing your workspace.

Q: What is the unique selling point of the game? How can it appeal to players?
A: Appealing graphics, good sound design, and the satisfying feeling of completing a task.

Q: What are the engaging content elements (weapons, vehicles, locations, skills, references to popular franchises, etc.)?
A: Appealing graphics and increasingly complex mechanics.

[Mechanics & Progression]

Q: How exactly does progression work? What should players do to level up faster?
A: Complete levels and expand your arsenal of upgrades.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What are the currencies in the game and what can they be spent on (e.g., standard - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?
A: Money is spent on unlocking new slots and upgrades.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Is it recommended to play with sound for better immersion, or will playing without sound make the game difficult?
A: The music complements the game well, but it is not essential for completing the levels."
instructions:
- Tap the colors to send the hexa pieces onto the line.
- Fill all the boxes to progress through the levels.

title: Drone Dash - Time Challenges!
description:
**How to Play**

Welcome to **Drone Dash - Time Challenges** – a fast-paced arcade puzzler where quick thinking and precision bouncing are the keys to victory! You’ll control a zippy little drone that *dashes* between walls and platforms like a high-tech pinball. But this isn’t your typical platformer – no jumping, no gravity drops. Your drone glides and ricochets from surface to surface, smoothly darting through tight spaces full of traps and twists.

Your mission? **Collect as many bullets as you can before time runs out!** The more you grab, the more stars you’ll earn (up to 3 per level). Once you collect the minimum required, a glowing crystal spawns back at your starting point – reach it to complete the level. But watch out! Hit a trap or run out of time, and it's back to the start.

Levels are short, intense, and packed with surprises. New traps and tricky tiles will keep you on your toes as you dash your way to perfection. Fast reflexes and smart movement make all the difference!

**Controls:**
🖱️ On PC: Just click to bounce your drone in the direction of your choice!
📱 On Mobile: Just tap to bounce your drone in the direction of your choice!

Ready to test your reflexes and grab those stars? Dive into the dash and beat the clock!

title: Beach Defense: Merge Tower
description:
A Tiny Merge is a beach-themed tower defense game where every run is about building smarter, merging faster, and
surviving longer. Place towers on the board, combine matching towers to create stronger defenses, and discover new
tower types as you progress through the waves.

Enemies keep getting tougher, so you will need to upgrade your strategy, unlock active powers, spend your coins wisely,
and keep improving your setup between waves. Use quick-buy tools, open upgrades, choose powerful bonuses, and react to
the changing pressure on the battlefield.

Push through as many waves as possible, experiment with different tower combinations, and turn a simple beach defense
into a powerful wall of water, splash, and chaos.
instructions:
Place towers on empty tiles and merge two matching towers to create a stronger one. Defeat enemies to earn coins, then
use them to buy more towers, unlock upgrades, and improve your defense.

Survive each wave, choose active powers when they unlock, and use them from the bottom bar when enemies get too close.
Keep merging and upgrading to handle stronger waves and push as far as you can.

title: Millionaire Factory
description:
Millionaire Factory 🔩🏭 is a fun and addictive 🎉 clicker game where players collect Metal to grow their fortune. By tapping the giant Metal button 👆, players gather Metals, convert them into Money 💰, and invest in upgrades to build their own factory empire.

The game offers a growth journey that starts with a small piece of Metal 🔩 and expands into a massive factory and investment fortune 📈📉.
instructions:
Metal Production 🔩:
At the heart of the game lies a massive Metal (Gear) button. Each tap 👆 earns you Metal, which serves as your primary source of income.

Metals → Money 💵:
You can convert collected Metals into Money 💸 to keep your economy running. For example:
➡️ 1 Metal = 0.1 Money
➡️ 10 Metals = 1 Money

Income and Robot Program Upgrades 🤖🏭:
With the money you earn 💵, you can:

Purchase upgrades that increase the amount of Metal gained per tap 💪.

Invest in automation systems such as the Basic Auto Robot 3️🔨, Regional Robot Program ⚒️, and National Automatic Robot Fleet.
These systems generate passive income every 5 seconds.

Factories 🏭:
At the start of the game, you begin with a single factory, which you can upgrade 🔧. You can also purchase up to three additional factories 🏭, each of which can be further developed.
Every factory has a progress bar 📊 representing its Metal production. Once the bar fills, the factory automatically sells the produced Metal, adds the profit 💵 to your balance, and the cycle restarts.

Fast Investments⚡:
📊 In the investment section, carefully observe the **candlestick movements** left by the dynamic system.
⏱️ Within about **15 seconds**, predict whether the price will go **up or down.**
💰 Then, open a **trade** in the direction you believe it will move, using your chosen amount.
🎯 If your prediction is correct, you’ll earn **double** the amount you invested! 💎🚀


Achievements 🏅:
There are 6 unique achievements 🌟 to unlock throughout the game, based on the total Metals collected 🔩, upgrades purchased 🔝, and wealth accumulated 💰.
tags: strategy, simulation, tycoon, mouse, clicker, management, idle, resource-management-games

Each level has only one correct solution, so plan your moves carefully. One wrong step can trap you or block your progress.
If you enjoy clever puzzles, single-solution challenges, and smart platforming, Cargo Path Puzzle is made for you.
instructions:
Move: Use the arrow keys or WASD to move up, down, left, and right.
Jump: Press Spacebar to jump in the last direction moved, skipping over one tile.
Goal: Collect all keys to unlock the portal and step on it to finish the level.

title: Hard Puzzle: Color Lines
description: Hard Puzzle: Color Lines is a logic game where you connect matching colored elements and draw paths across the board, planning every move. The levels gradually become harder: more colors appear, there’s less free space, and more situations where it’s easy to make a mistake. The game is great for relaxing while still giving your brain a workout — short levels, clear rules, and a real challenge closer to the final stages.
instructions:
On each level, connect pairs of the same color with lines and fill the board neatly without blocking other colors.
• Tap a colored element and draw a line to its matching pair.
• Lines must not cross, and you usually can’t leave extra gaps.
• If a move doesn’t work out, use undo/redo or restart the level.
• Your goal is to connect all color pairs and complete the level.

title: Raised Knight
description:
Get ready for the adventure in "Raised Knight," the endless runner where your skills will be put to the test!
Run through a world full of obstacles while trying to cover as much distance as possible. Every move counts, so make sure you master the controls!
instructions:
Get ready for the adventure in "Raised Knight," the endless runner where your skills will be put to the test!
Run through a world full of obstacles while trying to cover as much distance as possible. Every move counts, so make sure you master the controls!

[A] / [D] → Move:
Use [A] and [D] to move left or right. Dodge obstacles, take advantage of openings, and be prepared for any challenge that comes your way. Your agility is key!

[Space] → Jump / Float:
Hold down the [Space] key to jump or float. Jump over obstacles or float in the air to avoid dangers that cross your path. Air control can be the difference between success and failure!

[Ctrl] → Slide:
Use [Ctrl] to slide under obstacles and save yourself from critical situations. Slide quickly to pass under low obstacles and keep advancing without missing a beat.

title: Cat Block Puzzle
description:
Cat Block Puzzle is a fun and relaxing block slide puzzle game with a cute cat theme. 
In this game, you slide blocks across the board and arrange them to match the target picture. 
Every level gives you a new puzzle to solve, and each move matters. 
It is simple to start, but it becomes more challenging as the puzzles get harder.
instructions:
Slide the blocks on the board to build the target cat picture.
Each level gives you a grid filled with blocks of different shapes and sizes. 
Move the blocks in straight lines whenever there is empty space. 
Your goal is to place every block in the correct position so the final layout matches the preview picture or silhouette.
Think carefully before every move.
Because space on the board is limited, one wrong slide can block another piece. 
You need to open paths, create space, and move the blocks in the right order to finish the puzzle. 
Some levels are easy to understand, while later stages need more planning and smart logic.

title: Cow Cow Run
description:
A cow was having a nice life, but all changed when the UFO nation came and wants to kidnap the cow. Help the cow avoid the UFOs while collecting coins to buy it’s freedom!

Core Gameplay & Story

Q: What is the game about? What needs to be done?
A: The game is similar to 3D Pacman where you need to escape from aliens while being a cow, to complete a level you need to collect all the coins on the level.

Q: What is the unique feature of the game? What can hook players?
A: There are few similar games, pleasant cozy voxel graphics.

Mechanics & Progression

Q: What currencies are there and what can they be spent on (regular - gold, premium - crystals, etc.)?
A: Coins are spent on upgrades and bonuses.

Q: How does leveling up work exactly? What needs to be done to level up faster?
A: You can increase the chances of bonuses appearing.

Economy & Customization

Q: Are there daily rewards or something similar that encourages players to come back?
A: Yes, there are achievements that players want to complete as they are related to mechanics.

Retention & Engagement

Q: Is it preferable to play with sound to better immerse yourself in the atmosphere, or will there be difficulties without sound?
A: You can play without sound, but the music and SFX are very pleasant.

Q: Is the number of levels clear? How many are there? (dash if unclear)
A: 10 levels.

Q: Is there an achievement system? What are they and what can you get them for?
A: Yes, they are obtained as you progress and apply game mechanics.
instructions:
Use ASWD or ARROW buttons or CONTROL buttons to move the cow.
Upgrades buffs so when you get them ingame, you can use the best buffs!

instructions:

title: Twisty Planet
description: Twisty Planet is a minimalist arcade-style game in which your goal is to survive as long as possible on a rotating planet, dodging obstacles while collecting items to boost your score.
instructions:
You tap the screen (or press) to cause the planet (or the surface) to twist or rotate. This changes where obstacles appear relative to your hero.
As the planet twists, obstacles rotate into your path. You must time your taps so that you don’t collide with these obstacles. If you hit one, the game likely ends (you lose).
Alongside avoiding dangers, you can collect “foods” (or collectible items) as you go. These add to your score.
The main objective is to survive as long as possible while collecting items to increase your score. The longer you live and the more items you gather, the higher your score.
While not explicitly detailed in the App Store text, most games of this style gradually increase the speed, frequency, or complexity of obstacle placement as you play longer, making it harder to avoid collisions.

title: Revoxel 3D - Voxel RPG Shooter
description:
Immerse yourself in a dynamic voxel-style RPG shooter with a cyberpunk atmosphere. A dark futuristic city overrun by a tech corporation awaits you, along with endless battles with robots and monsters, character development, and constant action in the spirit of a shooter RPG.

Run through the streets of the metropolis, uncover a conspiracy, upgrade your weapons and equipment, mine resources, and defeat bosses. The game combines action-packed shooting, survival elements, character development, and a rich storyline about the struggle for human freedom.

Key Features:
🔫 RPG shooter with dynamic action gameplay
🧱 Unique voxel style and cuberpunk atmosphere
⚙️ Deep weapon and equipment customization
🤖 Battles with robots, monsters, and bosses
🧭 Exploration of the city, dungeons, and locations
💰 Resource collection, crafting, and base development

"[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about and what do you do?
A: It is an RPG where you fight through hordes of enemies to complete levels, unlock new skills, areas, and weapons.

Q: Is there a storyline?
A: There isn't a traditional narrative, but the objective is clear: unlock new territories and defeat bosses.

Q: What makes this game unique? Why would players be interested?
A: There are very few games like this, especially with a stylish cyberpunk archer theme. It features built-in mini-games, great graphics, varied missions, and deep character customization and progression.

Q: What are the most engaging elements of the game?
A: The internal mini-games, a wide variety of weapons, clear objectives, and simple, intuitive gameplay mechanics.

[Mechanics & Progression]

Q: Are there bosses and how do they differ?
A: Yes, but the bosses are relatively easy. They act as guardians stationed at the entrances to new cities.

Q: How does the progression system work? How can you level up faster?
A: You level up by defeating enemies. You can also choose bonuses and find upgrades in crates.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What currencies are available and what can they be spent on?
A: Money is used to unlock new territories, upgrade your character, and purchase new clothing.

Q: Are there in-app purchases? What can you buy and how do they affect the game?
A: You can spend money on clothing and unlocking new firearms.

Q: Is there customization? Can you change your hero's appearance, use a map editor, or tune vehicles?
A: Yes, you can purchase various outfits and weapons for your character.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Are there daily rewards or similar mechanics to keep players coming back?
A: Yes, logging in every day provides bonuses such as gear or currency.

Q: Is it recommended to play with sound for immersion, or is it possible to play without it?
A: The music is a great addition to the atmosphere, but it is not required to progress through the game.

Q: Is there an achievement system? What kind of achievements are there and how are they earned?
A: You can earn achievements for daily logins."
instructions:
Stop a murderous tech corporation by eliminating enemies and bosses, uncovering a conspiracy, and developing your character. Upgrade your weapons, equipment, and skills to save the world of the future and become a resistance legend.
Controls
Mobile devices: Touchpad for movement and on-screen buttons for actions and shooting.
PC: Use WASD keys to move, and standard game keys for other actions.

title: Solitaire Picture Puzzles
description:
Solitaire Picture Puzzles is a game where you match cards with pictures instead of pieces. Understand the game in seconds and play for hours.  Start with simple 3x3 puzzles and play harder levels as your skills improve. If the game seems too easy, you can unlock extra difficult challenges after completing level 9. 

Match pieces to reveal beautiful image. Each image used in this game is from a professional photographer. There are no AI generated images in this game. From nature to food to architecture, looking at each image is like exploring the world from the comfort of your device.
instructions: Use your cursor or finger to press on a card and drag it to another card on the board. This will swap the cards and possibly match if adjacent cards are valid. Once you match cards pay attention because they will stay grouped when you drag. The more moves you make the better your chances are at creating correct matches. You will also start to see the picture as your matching skills improve.

title: The Upside Down
description:
A tactical RPG where strategy meets the 80s: Outsmart the Gloom-Walkers and bring your dog home.

📹 Background

December 1984: As the winter solstice nears, the veil over Black Hollow tears open, allowing shadow entities known as Gloom-Walkers to prey upon the unwary. While the town evacuates to escape the encroaching dark, young Eddie Sinclair stays behind, venturing alone into the snowy ghost town to rescue his best friend, Buddy.
instructions:
🕹️ How to play

Explore the streets for upgrades and face the darkness, but return home to save and level up. Danger grows with every step away from safety—plan carefully and watch your Gloometer! Master four unique ways to fight: deploy your boombox to distract the shadows, leaving them rooted in place while you make your escape, blind them with your camera’s high-intensity flash, or launch powerful fireworks to blast the Gloom-Walkers into oblivion. How far will you go to save Buddy?

   - Objective: Reach the bottom-right corner of the map for the final showdown and rescue your dog.
   - Your Home: Located in the top-left corner. Return here to upgrade your stats and heal yourself by drinking found potions.
   - Survival Tip: Don't venture too far from home until you've grown powerful enough; the outskirts are unforgiving.
   - Scavenge: Explore city buildings to find superior slingshots and powerful "spells" (items).
   - Tactical Combat: Every action on the battlefield takes time. Once an action starts, it cannot be canceled until it’s finished—plan your moves wisely!
tags: action, adventure, survival, monster, retro, rpg, combat-games, desktop-games, 1-player-games, tactical-games, horde-survival-games

description:
Catch the Bear: A Cozy Puzzle Adventure 🐻🧩

A bright, feel-good puzzle game that mixes colorful bears, smart block-sliding mechanics, and satisfying logic challenges. Designed to be both relaxing and mentally engaging.

Gameplay
Slide blocks and catch bears into matching colors. Simple at first, but increasingly tricky as new obstacles, routes, and surprises appear. Each level tests your logic, planning, and strategy.

Easy to learn, challenging to master
Adorable bear characters and cozy visuals
Time limits for extra challenge
Gradually increasing difficulty
Ideal for fans of match, logic, and block puzzles

Slide blocks freely

Solve each level at your own pace

Why You’ll Love It

title: Tile Match Explorer
description: Tile Match Explorer is a blend of traditional tile match games and innovative puzzle mechanics, offering a fresh twist on the beloved match puzzle genre. Here, matching tiles becomes more than a game it's a journey. instructions:
Tap any open tile on the board.
The selected tile will move to the tile bar at the bottom.
Match three same tiles to remove them from the bar.
Keep matching tiles until the full board is cleared.
Plan your moves carefully because the bottom bar has limited space.
Do not fill the tile bar completely, or the level may fail.
Use boosters or shuffle options when you are stuck.
Complete each level to unlock new puzzles and continue your tile matching journey.

description:
Space Break is a casual pixel space shooter with great graphics and lots of locations!
Get into the fight against aliens in this pixel-art shooter game!

title: Flow Blast Shooter
description:
Flow Blast Shooter is a fast-paced puzzle shooter where timing and color control are the key to victory. Blocks flow continuously along a conveyor system, and it’s your job to place shooters, aim carefully, and fire at the perfect moment to keep the flow moving.

"[Core Gameplay & Story]

Q: What is the game about and what is the objective?
A: The player controls ""units"" (colored characters marked with a number) to fill or clear colored segments on a closed track.

Q: Is there a storyline?
A: This is a typical hyper/hybrid casual game, where the narrative is secondary to the constant flow of levels.

Q: What is the unique selling point (USP)? What will hook players?
A: Number-based logic combined with color; the satisfying sensation of ""clearing"" or ""filling"" a space.

[Mechanics & Progression]

Q: Are there bosses, and how do they differ from one another?
A: No.

[Economy & Customization]

Q: What in-game currencies exist, and what can they be used for (e.g., standard: gold, premium: crystals)?
A: Currency is spent on boosters.

[Retention & Engagement]

Q: Are there leaderboards? How do you qualify, and what types are available (e.g., weekly, monthly, all-time)?
A: No.

Q: Is it advisable to play with the sound on for better immersion, or will playing without sound make the game more difficult?
A: The music is good and complements the gameplay, but it is not essential for completing the game."
instructions: Designed for quick sessions but challenging to master, Flow Blast Shooter blends satisfying shooter mechanics with smart flow-control puzzles. The gameplay is simple to learn, yet increasingly intense as new block patterns, faster flows, and tricky color combinations appear.

title: Brain Line Connect
description:
Brain Line Connect is a simple-but-challenging brain puzzle where you draw one continuous line to connect all dots on the screen. 
It looks easy at first, but each level is designed to make you think ahead especially when obstacle lines block your path. 
Play anytime with no time pressure, enjoy clean visuals, and solve your way through a huge collection of levels made to train focus and logic.
instructions:
Start a level and look at all the dots you must connect.
Place your finger on a dot to begin drawing.
Drag your finger to draw one continuous line that connects every dot.
Do not lift your finger (keep it as “one touch / one stroke”).
Avoid obstacle lines if your drawn line touches a blocked/obstacle line, the try is considered wrong.
When all dots are connected correctly, the level completes and you move to the next puzzle.

✔ Complete Daily Challenges to get unique trophies while playing block puzzles.

instructions:

title: The Goopies: Slime Puzzle
description: Casual 2D puzzle game where you guide slimes safely to the exit. Instead of controlling them directly, you place simple instructions on a grid to change how they move.
instructions:
The Goopies: Slime Puzzle
Puzzle game? Check. Slime physics? Check. The Goopies: Slime Puzzle is all about the path. Guide slimes to the exit using grid-based instructions. No direct control. Just smart placement and timing.

How to Play The Goopies: Slime Puzzle
Use four simple instructions:
- Air – lifts slimes upward 
- Glide – moves them sideways in the air 
- Freefall – slows falling slimes for safe landings 
- Block – turns a slime into a wall to redirect others 
Avoid deadly traps like fire, water, and electricity, and remember: falls of 3 blocks or more are fatal. Collect keys, guide at least 3 slimes to the exit, and complete increasingly challenging levels.

Who is The Goopies: Slime Puzzle for?
Perfect for puzzle fans. Great for quick brain breaks. Ideal for players who want satisfying progression without chaos. Casual gameplay. Strategic depth. Fun for all ages.
Developed by Exient and released in April 2026.

FAQ
Where can I play The Goopies: Slime Puzzle online?
Play The Goopies: Slime Puzzle for free on Playgama. Desktop. Mobile. Any device.
How many slimes need to survive to pass a level?
At least 3 slimes must reach the exit. Lose more than that and you restart.
What happens if a slime falls too far?
Falls of 3 blocks or more are fatal. Use Freefall instruction to slow descent. Keep them safe.
How do instructions work in The Goopies: Slime Puzzle?
Click to place an instruction on any grid tile. When a slime walks over it, the instruction activates immediately. Affects movement instantly.

title: Hook Arena 3D
description:
Hook Arena is an action-packed game where you battle the opponents on opposite sides of a river using unique hook weapons. Your objective is to hook enemies to eliminate them one by one, pull in beneficial rune bottles, or escape by hooking yourself to a physical support like a pole.

Before the match, you can choose your team's color, upgrade your character, and change their skin and weapon. In the treasure menu, you can hack and open chests with both a chest and a key. Who knows what secrets they hold, but all items will be placed in your inventory. Fight in matches, earn trophies, and climb the leaderboard rankings. Good luck in the battle!
instructions:
PC Controls
WASD / arrow keys = move
Space / Left-click = throw hook
Right-click = shift (escape skill)
Move mouse = aim
Mobile Controls
Left half-screen joystick = move
Right half-screen joystick = aim
Hook button = throw hook
Shift button = shift (escape skill)

title: Shape Ascent - Roguelite
description: Shape Ascent is a strategic puzzle game inspired by 2048, where you merge geometric shapes on a 5×5 grid to reach the legendary Ascent Crown. Starting with simple Triangles and Squares, you'll combine matching shapes by swiping in four directions — merging them into Pentagons, Hexagons, Stars, Crystals, Essences, and ultimately the Ascent Crown (8128). What makes Shape Ascent unique is its roguelike card system: every few moves, you're offered a choice of Power Cards with Common, Rare, and Epic abilities — from Score Boosts and Merge Bonuses to Emergency Saves and Auto-Cleanse effects that permanently alter your run. Manage your Undo charges, use the Remove Tile tool wisely, and plan every swipe to avoid filling the board. With 13 shape tiers, stackable card effects, milestone celebrations, and a save system that lets you continue where you left off, Shape Ascent blends classic merge puzzle satisfaction with strategic depth and replayability. Available in 6 languages.
instructions:
Merge Shapes to Reach the Crown!
In Shape Ascent, your goal is to merge identical shapes on a 5×5 grid to create higher-tier shapes and chase the ultimate prize — the Ascent Crown (8128). Two matching shapes combine into the next tier when they collide. Plan your moves carefully: when the board fills up with no possible merges, it's game over!

Every few moves, you'll be offered a choice of Power Cards with unique abilities. Choose wisely — cards like Score Boost, Star Boost, Spawn Block, and Emergency Save can change the course of your run. Use the Undo button to reverse a mistake, or the Remove Tile tool (unlocked at Triple Star) to clear an unwanted piece from the board.

Desktop Controls:
↑ (Up Arrow) or W: Move all tiles upward.
↓ (Down Arrow) or S: Move all tiles downward.
← (Left Arrow) or A: Move all tiles left.
→ (Right Arrow) or D: Move all tiles right.
U: Use an Undo charge.


Mobile Controls:
Swipe Up: Move all tiles upward.
Swipe Down: Move all tiles downward.
Swipe Left: Move all tiles left.
Swipe Right: Move all tiles right.
Tap the Undo button (↩) to reverse your last move.
Tap the Remove button (✖) to select and remove a tile from the board.
Tap the Settings gear (⚙) to adjust sound, language, or restart the game.
tags: puzzle, number, merge, brain, logic, casual-games, slide-games, mind-games, 1-player-games, tiles-games

title: Love Archer Hero
description:
Welcome to Love Archer Hero game - one of the games about inspiring love feelings! In this interesting project, you play as a cheerful tricky Cupid, using your archer skills, bow and magic arrows of love to connect everyone and create loving couples!
Play have fun, solve puzzles and throw the arrow to a creature of your choice. After your arrow hits the target, they will fall in a beautiful garden and a magic of love will take them over.

Are you ready, my tiny Cupid hero? Shot your love arrows right into funny creatures' hearts to make them love each other and born a baby. Even the different types of creatures can make a solid couple and become happy parents. Combine orc and human for example and see how love conquers all!
instructions:
Aim and Shoot: Use your finger (on mobile) or mouse (on desktop) to drag and release, aiming your arrow at your intended target. A dashed line indicates the trajectory of your shot.
Matchmaking: Your goal is to make two characters fall in love. This can involve hitting one or both individuals with your arrows.
Obstacles and Features: Levels may include barriers like glass, ropes, or wooden planks. Utilize these elements to guide your arrows to the targets.
Level Progression: Complete levels to unlock new ones. Each level presents unique challenges and characters.

title: Maskinery Idle
description: Maskinery Idle is an incremental clicker game where you explore mysterious islands, fight enemies, and collect powerful masks that grant unique abilities. Clear all tiles on each location's grid to progress through 5 stages. Defeat the Boss on the final stage to complete the zone and unlock the next one. Collect gold to buy upgrades, earn energy to level up your masks, and use the Rebirth system
instructions:
Controls

Left click / Tap -> Attack a tile, activate a mask, press a button
That's it — the entire game is played with a single click/tap. No keyboard required.

Gameplay

1. Click tiles to deal damage equal to your Power stat. Destroyed tiles drop Gold and Energy.
2. Enemies (red tiles) fight back — they reflect damage to you. If your HP is too low to survive a hit, the enemy becomes locked until you heal.
3. Boss appears on stage 5 as a large 3x3 tile. Clear the tiles covering it first, then defeat it to complete the location.
4. Return to the Village (safe zone) to spend gold on upgrades: Max HP, HP Regen, and Power.
tags: tycoon, clicker, combat-games, 1-player-games, incremental-games

title: Balls Animal
description: Balls Animal is an addictive brain teaser where players sort colorful balls into matching tubes to solve challenging puzzles. With over 500 increasingly difficult levels, this cute puzzle game will keep you entertained for hours as you strategize the perfect moves to complete each level. The game features adorable animal characters that add charm to your puzzle-solving adventure, making the experience even more delightful. Perfect for puzzle lovers of all ages, Balls Animal combines simple mechanics with strategic thinking, making it easy to learn but satisfyingly challenging to master.
instructions: Click on the bottle from which you want to take the ball, then click on the one where you want to place it.

title: Traffic Puzzle Game Linky
description: Traffic Puzzle Game Linky is a captivating logic puzzle game set in a lush forest meadow, where players connect pairs of numbered construction blocks with precisely the exact count of road segments—no more, no less—to link all cities and clear the board within time limits, earning stars and trophies in increasingly challenging levels tracked by a dynamic timer and handy undo feature.
